name: Team Tina
subject: Reaching out directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
With your help, we’ll get back on track in no time. |
#
Team, we’ll keep this as direct as possible. We have just hours before our mid-month deadline, and right now we’re behind on our fundraising goal. This is important for a big reason: In two short weeks, we’ll submit our quarterly fundraising numbers to the FEC, which is the best chance at showing the strength of our grassroots movement to National Republicans. **At this rate, It’s not going to be easy to catch up on our quarterly goals.** Tina’s been working hard to build the resources to fight back against Republican attacks against vulnerable Democrats in states like Montana, Ohio, and Nevada — and we’ll need to do even more to stay ahead of them as election season really starts to ramp up. But we know that with your help, we’ll get back on track in no time. **Folks, we’re reaching out to directly ask for your contribution to support our efforts.** No matter how big or small, your donation gets us that much closer to our goals, and fuels the movement to protect the Senate majority. **Right now, we're about three-quarters of the way to our mid-month goal, and need to raise another $1,287 before midnight tonight. Can you chip in with a donation of $10 to help us make up the difference?** Here's a secure link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-june2023?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64906815/411632487/1268205826?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_MMG_AC60_20230615_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGM2MjMwMS1kOTBiLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfQWsW22VfMDwhEtSOCYnCyB_H2baFSUCtvyTyDx2Ds=) Thank you for your support. name: John Fetterman
subject: Can we level with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our power is all in our numbers.
#
Derek, can we level with you?
We’re up against a *lot* of big challenges. The right-wing media won’t stop attacking John. National Republicans are dead-set on blocking all progress in the Senate. And vulnerable Democrat colleagues need John’s help to defend their seats in 2024.
How do we fight back? After all, John doesn’t have super PACs -or- millions in personal wealth to spend.
**The answer, Derek, comes down to you + our grassroots team.**
**[We’re sending this email because it’s pretty much the only way we can reach our goal before tonight’s mid-month deadline. If you can, contribute $3 — or literally whatever amount you can spare now — because the next few donations could put us over the line.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230615-2?refcode=em20230615-2-8413&refcode2=8413_434096_mSj2RN&akid=8413%2E434096%2EmSj2RN)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230615-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230615-8413&refcode2=8413_434096_mSj2RN&akid=8413%2E434096%2EmSj2RN)**
Our challenges are big — but we have one of the BIGGEST grassroots teams in politics. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign the GOP money machine just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why we’re asking you one more time...
**[Please make a donation if you’re ready to help John keep fighting. Whether you can give $5 or $50 or $500, it doesn’t matter. What’s important is that, together with your help, we meet our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230615-2?refcode=em20230615-2-8413&refcode2=8413_434096_mSj2RN&akid=8413%2E434096%2EmSj2RN)**
Our power is all in our numbers. Your donation will add up with grassroots donations from all over to get us to our mid-month goal!
Let’s do this,
💛 Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230615-8413-footer&t=1&refcode2=8413_434096_mSj2RN&akid=8413%2E434096%2EmSj2RN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8413%2E434096%2EmSj2RN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8413%2E434096%2EmSj2RN)

Thanks to your generosity, we've made remarkable strides towards our end-of-quarter early push of raising $11,000. However, Peter, our work is not yet complete.

---
Friend,

For 8 years you’ve had to choose between Trump – _who puts himself before the American people..._

And Biden... _A man who simply isn’t up for the job of being President._

But now - - you have another choice: _**Chris Christie**_.

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

clean_body: Peter – I know your inbox is full but, my mid-month goal is up at midnight tonight and I need your help. Can I count on your urgent donation of any amount in the next 15 minutes, then I’ll explain why your support is so important? | | Peter - I know your inbox is full but, Your investment in this race goes far in the fight for freedom, the fight for right and wrong. The money we collect is used to bring this message to every single corner of North Carolina and every single donor. Your contribution today also shows my competitors that our campaign is a force to be reckoned with. Before the clock strikes midnight, can you chip in to help me reach my mid-month goal? Thank you for being a key member of this team – I hope you have my back in this critical moment! Gratefully, Mark Walker | Meet Mark Walker Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan. In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game. Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children. | | See Mark in Action:** ---|--- | Paid For By Walker4NC

name: Debby Burnett
subject: 51 families devastated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?refcode2=img_logo]
Peter, a massive corporation has decided to shut down the Pueblo printing operation of the longest-running newspaper in Colorado.
While Lauren Boebert is focused on drafting inane articles of impeachment and landing airtime on Fox News, 51 people in our district are losing their jobs. Each of those folks has loved ones who depend on them and a larger community that will be impacted by this loss.
The realities of working families here in CO-03 — from creating good-paying jobs to protecting existing jobs and small businesses — have to be our congresswoman’s priority.
I promise to always put the people of Western and Southern Colorado first, but right now I need your help to reach our mid-month fundraising goal. We still need 29 more grassroots donors to chip in by midnight to get there. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?refcode2=link_CTA]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Give $10 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=abx10] Give $25 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=abx25]
Give $50 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=abx50] Give $100 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode2=abx100]
Give $250 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode2=abx250] Give other now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_mmg?amount=&refcode2=abx-other]

It’s time to elect someone who will make our community and our families their priority.
Thanks for all you do,
Debby
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.

Debby Burnett, PO Box 1761, Gunnison, CO 81230

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ron=20DeSantis?=
subject: Decline is NOT inevitable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
A social agenda has no place within our armed forces... | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ee343bc2bc&e=84ee529f47)
---
Friend, I'm running for President because I don't believe the decline of our country is inevitable. I believe it's a choice that stands before us. **We have it in our power to choose a better path—a path that's going to lead to the revival of this country and a restoration of American Greatness.**
---
| | [STAND UP FOR AMERICA—JOIN THE FIGHT](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=574c238f60&e=84ee529f47)
---
I believe in this American Greatness, FNAME. I’ve spent my life fighting for it. Long before I was elected governor, I served our nation in Iraq as a JAG officer in support of SEAL Team 1. Having seen what the attacks of September 11th did to our country, I felt a responsibility to do my part to help at a time of struggle. _**So I served**_. Friend, the sense of satisfaction I got knowing that I was wearing the cloth of my country, serving alongside so many honorable patriots, and fighting for something bigger than myself was a satisfaction that money just can't buy. Today, our country has lost its sense of national pride.
* Instead of strengthening our military recruiting efforts and building a military for the future...
* Instead of securing our border and holding Mexican drug cartels accountable for the irrevocable harm they’ve done to our citizens...
* And instead of reigning in out-of-control economic and fiscal policy that have left us on the brink of bankruptcy...

...**the Left has been too busy distracting our nation with the woke Olympics.** I find this unacceptable. _**I am ready to keep my campaign promises, restore an energetic executive to the White House, and get the job done**_. I recently took my message directly to the people of Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, and I will continue to spread the message each and every day until we’ve won...until we’ve righted this ship...until we’ve achieved our Great American Comeback.
---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=3b2c21e89e&e=84ee529f47)
---
We are at a critical juncture. I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. I need your help, friend. This cannot stand. [**Will you fight with me?**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=efae4d8110&e=84ee529f47 "Will you fight with me?")

In Freedom,

---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=7cd238d9b1&e=84ee529f47)
---

Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d9341f649f&e=84ee529f47)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

subject: keeping the faith
body:
Peter a special Episode 12 with Skip Heitzig | No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d88fbeb4cc&e=567664f14c)
In our latest episode of the [**No Doubt About It Podcast**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=66dfa2ff41&e=567664f14c) , we have the honor of sitting down with one of the most impactful pastors in the country.

➡ [**WATCH NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=67d54b51b3&e=567664f14c)

Skip Heitzig, the founder and main pastor at Calvary Church, shares his remarkable journey with us, starting from the Jesus Revolution era and his time learning from the influential Chuck Smith at Calvary Chapel.
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5cb947a629&e=567664f14c)
---
# WATCH EPISODE 12:
Skip opens up about the challenges he faced when he moved to Albuquerque and how his faith and God's calling transformed a small Bible study into the thriving community that Calvary Church is today. His unique teaching style, focused on understanding and applying scripture, will encourage you to embrace failure as an integral part of the learning process.
| [WATCH ON YOUTUBE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=276afbdc13&e=567664f14c)
---
Skip also shares his honest and thought-provoking insights into the intersection of faith and politics, recounting a candid conversation with Saudi Prince Mohammed bin Salman regarding the tragic murder of Jamal Khashoggi. We explore the role of political conversations within the church and emphasize the importance of Jesus as the true change agent in our lives.
As the episode concludes, we delve into Skip's profound understanding of the signs of the "last days" as foretold by Jesus, leaving us with a sense of urgency to make the most of our time, stand up for what's right, and make a positive impact on the world.
| [WATCH ON YOUTUBE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a22eb8a367&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
**We encourage you to join us by listening to our podcast.**
Simply search for **No Doubt About It** on your preferred platform, hit the subscribe button, and be sure to leave a like and a comment to let us know your thoughts.
➡ [**SUBSCRIBE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b59d6b2ce3&e=567664f14c)
Moreover, we invite you to visit our website, [**NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bf47d2f980&e=567664f14c), where you can find more information about our podcast, access additional resources, and contribute financially to support our ongoing efforts. Your generous support allows us to continue bringing you compelling stories and thought-provoking content.
Thank you for your time, and we look forward to sharing many more inspiring episodes with you in the future.
Have a great day,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti"No Doubt About It" Podcast
|
---

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: An update on our mid-month goal + what we’re fighting for in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We have the opportunity to accomplish so much, Peter — but only with your help
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from my team recently, but I wanted to personally reach out this evening to give you an update on our mid-month goal.
**We’re less than 75 donations away from raising 7,000 individual contributions before June 15** — and with just hours to spare before our deadline, I’m calling on top supporters like you to help us close the gap.
**Please use this personalized link or click the button below to donate $5 or whatever you can afford to my campaign so we can crush this goal and keep building the grassroots movement that’s going to defeat Josh Hawley next year:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-20230615-2?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230615](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34246?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230615&amount=5&t=1&akid=3267%2E614464%2EwXlmAU)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34246?refcode=em20230615-3267&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3267%2E614464%2EwXlmAU)**
This campaign isn’t just about defeating Josh Hawley and flipping Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. **We’re building a grassroots movement to hold our leaders accountable and fundamentally change who has power in our country.**
Together, we’re fighting to end the filibuster and secure voting rights, ban insider trading for members of Congress, abolish corporate PACs, and stand up to the Big-Brother-style attacks on abortion access in Missouri and across the country.
We can stop handing out money for Wall Street and forever wars, and start rebuilding our communities. And we can invest in workers and create the next generation of energy jobs right here at home.
That’s what this movement is fighting for — but I can’t do it without your help.
**So please, help us accomplish all this and more by using this personalized link or clicking the button below to donate $5 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-20230615-2?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230615](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34246?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230615&amount=5&t=3&akid=3267%2E614464%2EwXlmAU)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34246?refcode=em20230615-3267&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3267%2E614464%2EwXlmAU)**
Let’s hit this goal!
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230615-3267-footer&t=5&refcode2=3267_614464_wXlmAU&akid=3267%2E614464%2EwXlmAU)**

**Peter, the month of June is hugely significant to me.** Pride Month is a beautiful chance to celebrate all members of the LGBTQ community – all unique and all valuable.

As Republicans amp up their attacks on our community, I am 100% committed to fight back at every turn, always advocating for the humanity of LGBTQ folks.

I won’t sit back while far-right Republicans demonize members of the LGBTQ community and set their sights on attacking trans children – **and I know you won’t either.**

[**But my mid-month deadline is fast approaching, and I can’t keep fighting these fights in Congress without your support. name: Lexi Schiff
subject: Can you throw my dad a few bucks?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek —
it’s Lexi! Adam’s smartest, funniest, most fashionable... and only
daughter.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]Old photo of Adam Schiff with his daughter Lexi in a spinning teacup
ride

And while you might think of him as Congressman, Representative, or just
Adam — to me, he’s dad. The guy who rode the spinning teacups with me over
and over again at my request (insistence).

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]Old photo of Adam, Eve, and Lexi Schiff in a car at a parade waving to
the crowd

Or the guy who let me think the parade crowds were there to see me and
only me.

Here’s the thing,
Derek: after all these years,
he hasn’t changed.

Not after he was elected to Congress.

Not after managing Trump’s impeachment and facing the right wing’s
attacks.

Not now that he’s running for Senate — he’s just having the same
conversations about our democracy, our ideals, and our values that we’ve
had around the dinner table for the last 20 years.

He's a really great dad! (And now that he’s running a statewide campaign
in California, I am sure he is STRESSING, even though he would never show
it. He probably feels the weight of this comically-large rock on his
shoulders).

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]Old photo of Adam Schiff pretending to hold up large rock

Running for office is a big task. But it's always been clear to me why my
dad does it. He wants to make a difference in as many lives as possible
and make our country and world a better place to live in.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]My dad’s campaign team told me this is where I plug the big fundraising
deadline at midnight tonight, so here it goes: I would really really
appreciate it if you could make a contribution to my dad’s campaign before
midnight. Can you chip in?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jun2023_abs_em.0Agatv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for hearing me out,
Derek! I’ll always take the
chance to talk about why I’m so proud of my dad (and of course share some
embarrassing pics of him — and cute ones of me).

xx Lexi

P.S. Someone (*my dad*) has a birthday coming up — and rest assured, I’m
cooking up some big plans with my brother Eli.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jun2023_abs_em.hzT4iC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230615_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=2556%2E5257348%2EPnUA4f ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

subject: We will not and cannot let hate win

body:
The story of LGBT history is one of strength and resilience.

| Peter, the LGBTQ community is at a terrifying juncture:
* This year, Republican extremists across the country have passed a **_record number_** of measures attacking gay and transgender rights.
* The Human Rights Campaign just issued a **_state of emergency_** for LGBT Americans.
* Some of the **_most vile_** anti-LGBT leaders, Ron DeSantis and Mike Pence, are now running for President

The story of LGBT history is one of strength and resilience.

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

subject: one reason I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz

I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities — it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda.

**That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz — to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz.** [Will you please split a donation of $10 today between our campaign and The Collective PAC to help send me to the Senate? →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cX7rBFKHMHMTvtXjevH-pDOfFIa0t8HNp57lkzGOG7kUZ5Tn_vDqCWeoeyZdDR3b3ey5VkEdpmr7Ed078_gPMslH1u-6gCki6ZRPUEF4clB_J6e2jXvqG8lBj8avt5uSzvJCbtuIfpXWFOWpwDEJVl4NACkt465PrKkPjarqrgpqIv45A_aF0Vv1UIOamNArpiDVdlALM_PnS3rJukvHG5M36wQQT3c0dTryKbpQToV-hbofn8xhFGtC0SwaKTNvCM27fJjLZfZmMlUsGBCqxETPIB4TW34i5z265EEUDSuLdBcGdGx0kNgwq6lc1qhN_Kx0MuAmHNwMmmAPnfq2KRwxE6ss_a0lyU8pT_foc2UGNmo7zuBGl7zDz8RPRX5Jn/3x3/xP50I5O5Tyecrob5OvyAXQ/h3/FEj4cptw_ZwUyXOdGxMoGFJzUIm6crlvCZ-8CWk6r9o)

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them. Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities — it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda. That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz — to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. subject: FW: The price to save our country is high…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
...but it’s a price I’m willing to pay.
| | Friend,
---
Endless witch hunts, vicious attacks, and politically charged indictments and arrests – the price to save our country in Crooked Joe’s America is high...
_...But as I’ve said, if this is the cost to see our mission through to the end, to restore our free Republic, and to revive the greatest country in the history of the world,**then it’s a price I’m willing to pay.**_
**I could NEVER turn my back on YOU or our beautiful country, Friend.**
If we don’t stand up to the Left’s tyranny here and now, we won’t have a country left to save.
By attempting to put me in **JAIL for** **400 YEARS** as a completely INNOCENT man, Biden, his corrupt DOJ, and all the radical Democrats have crossed a line they will never be able to turn back from.
Which is why if I gave in now, threw in the towel, and said I’ve had enough, it would _never_ end with me.
**I will NEVER SURRENDER our country, because if I do,_every_ president for the rest of your lifetime would be a communist.**
_They would indict and arrest Republican after Republican without batting an eye if that meant endless control of the White House._
**_But do not lose hope!_** Together, with millions and millions of patriots like you by my side, we will see our mission through to the end and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.
We will win back the White House in 2024, obliterate the Deep State once and for all, restore TRUE justice in America, and save our country!
[**So please, if you’re able, make a contribution to peacefully stand with me as I see our mission to SAVE AMERICA through to the end.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGq2zAQRb9G3tnYI1uSF140FdmkBAqFlm6CrJkk87BkY8sv5O-LQvq2517EPRoXlomvz0HogwC4M24CQMhvAuDUHv6c1en3yZbnv4dQWtW1j5zCdwGQngt9Vd-vVBQcT5lqW-AA3oD3BQ2NMsoYaHVf3AeojW6MbmrZI44SkFC2Te-kN6N0NBY8QA2yVo2qAXRnKkVG9WPbjVqPDZEWbf3gWOEc3YQfad3DUvk5FNNwT2nZXpOOAo4b-X2l6sFxJcyNzNwnlS7Qyt6VHzPHVF73iKvjjeOt9HMInBKRgGP0k9LuqnH0Xac7JGWEPO4pXAIh70FI-_ZVGW7zvnoS0nq-uDfzLiyOb1FI-3bq_idzTBSTkLaXqhGgLnFiFNJGmz7H_nmn9gVfF5EWf5ztL33-qYp1wOXB08Sbyh9xywuy278AAAD__1YjjYc)

Friend,
In roughly 24 hours, I will be **ARRAIGNED** in federal court despite having committed _no crime_ whatsoever.
The price to save our country is high in Crooked Joe’s America: vicious attacks, endless witch hunts, and politically charged indictments and arrests.
_**But if this is the cost to see our mission through to the end, to restore our free Republic, and to revive the greatest country in the history of the world, then it’s a price I’m willing to pay.**_
You see, Biden, the radical Democrats, and the Deep State all believed that after Soros’ hand-picked _state_ prosecutor failed to break us, that this _federal_ indictment would finally bring our movement to its knees.
The truth is, I could walk into the courthouse tomorrow, throw in the towel, denounce our mission to save America, and end our 2024 campaign, and magically, the charges would disappear.
**But rest assured, Friend, I will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny!**
Which is why despite their vicious attacks, our campaign to Make America Great Again carries on all the same.
_**And when these sick and twisted radicals see that even tomorrow’s events will NOT break our movement, then in that very moment, they’ll know they’ve already LOST.**_
No matter what happens tomorrow, our resolve to SAVE AMERICA has never been stronger!

Which is why if I gave in now, threw in the towel, and said I’ve had enough, it would never end with me. Peter,
The drug crisis has gotten worse over the years and continues to plague our state.

Since 2019, the number of overdose deaths in our communities has soared, due to the deadly influx of fentanyl. This problem is not unique to our state; it is a national issue that affects the well-being and safety of Oregon and __ALL__ Americans.
_**This is confiscated drugs, guns, and cash that were seized by law enforcement in a single month – We cannot afford to turn a blind eye to this issue.**_

clean_body: | | | | Click to View Image | Peter, The drug crisis has gotten worse over the years and continues to plague our state. Since 2019, the number of overdose deaths in our communities has soared, due to the deadly influx of fentanyl. This problem is not unique to our state; it is a national issue that affects the well-being and safety of Oregon and ALL Americans. This is confiscated drugs, guns, and cash that were seized by law enforcement in a single month – We cannot afford to turn a blind eye to this issue. The only way to stop this is to secure our border and STOP the relentless influx of drugs. | | | | Together, we can take a stand against the drug crisis and work towards securing our borders, safeguarding our communities, and protecting the future of our state and nation. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Are we meeting this summer?
body:
I hope I have a chance to talk with you| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=05a9874475844a75bed043074103c997&_e=4Pip8S5WlpMkMluVfMJ82DmDzAYJO8mz5ta7LYx3TmAXaJl72wo_WJ3npwLeBoCiR_jl1gxWHcefRipQh7UwvuzyxD6rQxAGIcE8_h6tKKJJTwlKZlda8b4aicY-FalvAs3FIcEICW7x9goBmq8psS6OG87CFuEVTDQ0MsMJU52zdrQE1oWHuxHiJGekpHYAWmRaMYuV0H2eflXBajTBg3ULmDwk41yrEmXyMALMD7KDaHRYds5P2iOIy0HnyUFf)
---
Summer is almost officially here, which can only mean one thing, my friend... **It's Parade**** Season!** I love spending my summers in Wisconsin and attending parades... It gives me an opportunity to meet with so many people and hear directly from them. There's something unique about getting to talk with families across Wisconsin as we all celebrate our shared love for our communities and country. [__**After all, what's better than warm weather, tractors, great food, and even greater people?**__](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=05a9874475844a75bed043074103c997&_e=4Pip8S5WlpMkMluVfMJ82DmDzAYJO8mz5ta7LYx3TmAXaJl72wo_WJ3npwLeBoCiR_jl1gxWHcefRipQh7UwvuzyxD6rQxAGIcE8_h6tKKJfFTctdTTEqTrllqPRMwt8qp8LDB7SwSzrB412i7ou5uXh-L9RAZUe_C5OBeQTCEA24xI6WWBNY-D4ilD1OXBm12TdbAY9LjUel4oKRBX-uhXPdq1m3yPqNlpHc3enYtoOLd32CVPiXBQ8V36a0aE6) What about you, my friend? Will I see you at an upcoming parade in your area? [_**Click here to share with me what parades you plan on attending this summer with your families!**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=05a9874475844a75bed043074103c997&_e=4Pip8S5WlpMkMluVfMJ82DmDzAYJO8mz5ta7LYx3TmAXaJl72wo_WJ3npwLeBoCiR_jl1gxWHcefRipQh7UwvuzyxD6rQxAGIcE8_h6tKKIgpprBkon5dtsmHys-oL_n4EA25vWdNQfaPgzWzppK9QGLFvl81_tOkr0hzV01sZyih2bSm4vgkQ5urutYhR6cNAKQq1OHCciLrPFKCJSBDHM5nZnckX9LRNOIjvlV9XdHmffaWxdvGGNPs3A5fruo) Whether it's in Fond du Lac, Oshkosh, Sheboygan, or anywhere else in our great district, [_**I hope to see you at a parade this summer!**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=05a9874475844a75bed043074103c997&_e=4Pip8S5WlpMkMluVfMJ82DmDzAYJO8mz5ta7LYx3TmAXaJl72wo_WJ3npwLeBoCiR_jl1gxWHcefRipQh7UwvuzyxD6rQxAGIcE8_h6tKKL43VO4rECZOlNrTsC65_j4haucVqwjPV6a-1m9lCX7eEWb2YW4f3PrumnheCac1l71ACKc1WiJYGMVAjJIgQlf51H19abtJ2xMqgJw0OEWTpT-xDWqm3dvMmKRNWyMAovgJm082JPYUtMEsQNXmXqH)
---
| | Thank you for your support,
**Glenn Grothman**

clean_body: I hope I have a chance to talk with you| | | Summer is almost officially here, which can only mean one thing, my friend... It's Parade Season! I love spending my summers in Wisconsin and attending parades... It gives me an opportunity to meet with so many people and hear directly from them. There's something unique about getting to talk with families across Wisconsin as we all celebrate our shared love for our communities and country. What about you, my friend? Will I see you at an upcoming parade in your area? Whether it's in Fond du Lac, Oshkosh, Sheboygan, or anywhere else in our great district, | | Thank you for your support, Glenn Grothman | | | | Follow Glenn Grothman on Social Media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden isn’t wasting any time
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Friend,

Five seconds.

That’s how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It’s what he’s running on. It’s what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth.

His ad claims it’s all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to:
* Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars.
* Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals.
* Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers.

Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy—forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn’t stop there.

Within months, he rolled back President Trump’s Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package!

On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child—all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals.

This is not only outrageous—it’s dangerous.

But that hasn’t stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules—including the U.S. Constitution—to get his way.

That’s why I’m emailing you today.

SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives—with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

**[But in order to do this critical work, we need your help.](http://trk.readactnews.)**

Your gift today will allow us to expand our policy research efforts to further educate lawmakers across the country. And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion.

You can make your gift right now using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](http://trk.readactnews._rrMmqT42I8Q)**

But please remember that time is of the essence. As President Biden ramps up his campaign efforts, we must be prepared to counter him every step of the way.

That’s why your gift is urgently needed now.

Make your gift today to fight back against the Biden administration using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](http://trk.readactnews.)**

By doing so, you will help advance a culture of life that protects unborn children and their mothers from abortion.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNjctYWE1MzFmNmE3Nzg1NGU3N2I2M2ZhYzQ2ODY3NTcyOWEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/uBXbFTAGX3PCKAELwZUb6A) to unsubscribe.

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668433%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NbGfRU8h9EP76V8S1brhag&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668434%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dnTe25hGsjEbZ0vcl04dmA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668445%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7NVB98BmC6%2fGeJ9Bcb371g&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

We're running an honest campaign, and the truth is, too

long.

Our grassroots-powered campaign is different from what
the big-money interest groups want, yet we like to do things
differently. We're ignoring the demands of online influencers,
coastal elites, and lobbyists so we can focus on real solutions.

Our Campaign's Promise: On Day 1, we will focus on
securing our country's southern border, shoring up our national
security, unshackling American energy, and retooling our economy
to support working families, not the elites.

As an official member of Team Burgum, you have the power,
not the lobbyists, to decide who gets to be on the Republican
Debate Stage in Milwaukee this August.

With the debate approaching, we need every supporter to

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg77cm1a2gikefun6uokp4sisr5epaldp9t0kkho_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji68ob6cjh2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za5rvsiftq52v68kn0qsi1ttrn02ucl9thf2jijo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji68ob6cjh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ddpt9pr738j38j6pfh5b2v0lv2anu3k0n3js10_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji68ob6cjh2bs)

subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpunc1rm55vc7et21tio4qb7b2krjkkafrv38g48_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji64pj4clh2bs)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z41rvhlqj0epagif5ktq9ssl9teh4bs7bbeaofh0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji64pj4clh2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z45jqj0bgl0o9210ptno2il8jpqahcquo3b49dgo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji64pj4clh2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4aqctgj2jbb35sbkok9ur314pfdfg1crhveq198_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji64pj4clh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zumpdil60u8kcci2k7revrj4bedqe750183uniqo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji64pj4clh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhkgd60reodfenpqsfe36qkuphpugrl8chma9410_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji64pj4clh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpa8vmq4tajoa2r9ojtka7evk41d8258um8ebg98_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji64pj4clh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi62uh8hhufql0jjj6gjahd7tfanpl8rgbuv56no_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji6coj2chh2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze8865iq7o54bv744ka27ti3ivk6b3cedvhdqnqg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji6coj2chh2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk7csqhh20n72ehaha5d2arpvpb8912qt1m9hla0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji6coj2chh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze5elqd4kt79gjuiuna5vhl567pfqu93keiavh70_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji6coj2chh2bs)
---

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Tucker Carlson supported us
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
|
---
Friend, **Tucker Carlson stood up for The Babylon Bee** when we were kicked off Twitter last year. He had me on _Tucker Carlson Tonight_ to talk about the importance of the First Amendment and how critical it is that public social media platforms allow - and embrace - free speech.
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[Stand with FREE SPEECH](http://trk.secureandprosper._Cqk5EBwKePWiOQZFeDA)
---
After sharing our joke - about Rachel Levine being named "Man of the Year" - Tucker was "flagged" on Twitter. He spoke up for us because Tucker knew we were "fighting the power" and believed that if anyone could save FREE SPEECH ... "it's the Babylon Bee." **_But now, one of the biggest opponents of "woke" culture - one that is hellbent on shutting down any speech they disagree with - is no longer on cable news. _** Tucker Carlson had about 3 million viewers every night ... and, according to the Nielsen Ratings, he was the most popular cable news host among young Democrats. I kid you not! Unafraid to challenge ridiculous leftist policies and exercise his free speech rights ... Tucker gained viewers from both sides of the aisle because he went against the mainstream and challenged the absurdity of "woke" culture. **The Babylon Bee has challenged the "mainstream" radical culture in our nation from day one, and we won't stop standing up for FREE SPEECH and sharing jokes that write themselves. ** [**Help me CELEBRATE the free speech that we do have - at least for now - by becoming a Premium Subscriber to The Babylon Bee. And, for a limited time, with the code FREESPEECH, you'll save 10% on your membership.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[ Stand with FREE SPEECH](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Thanks for subscribing today. Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee

After sharing our joke - about Rachel Levine being named "Man of the Year" - Tucker was "flagged" on Twitter. He spoke up for us because Tucker knew we were "fighting the power" and believed that if anyone could save FREE SPEECH ... "it's the Babylon Bee." But now, one of the biggest opponents of "woke" culture - one that is hellbent on shutting down any speech they disagree with - is no longer on cable news. Tucker Carlson had about 3 million viewers every night ... and, according to the Nielsen Ratings, he was the most popular cable news host among young Democrats. I kid you not! Unafraid to challenge ridiculous leftist policies and exercise his free speech rights ... Tucker gained viewers from both sides of the aisle because he went against the mainstream and challenged the absurdity of "woke" culture. The Babylon Bee has challenged the "mainstream" radical culture in our nation from day one, and we won't stop standing up for FREE SPEECH and sharing jokes that write themselves. Thanks for subscribing today. Seth Dillon CEO | The Babylon Bee | | | Copyright © 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._ Our mailing address is: The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New York Sun
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsjRv9MDsN

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced
first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osjRv9MDsN

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
friend,

In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Join the
Sun Now →

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Alan
Dershowitz

Columnist, The New York Sun

Join the
Sun Now →

Paid for by the New York Sun.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

subject: Biden & Child Exploitation: Coming to your kid's library
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a0ffb7aa123339007054bdf6b98e65949ec71b4b33865bcd195718a5f91e26346331af71c686801ae4a82fc045aca58118b4604e945505fcef620cbb70ce26009351280e68edaa9cb28ab18d063868fe

Peter,

In case you missed Biden's latest absurdity...

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a8368c7af05ea5eacc97bfda523d19d724f55e3eacf4e2856fe2be73f66e8e34fbe4886bab6668c9dfb78aec3055d03ea65aa6ef850f6b576aba593e0eaee0f

Joe Biden is taking his support of Tik Tok activists' topless-dancing-in-front-of-the-White-House fiasco to the next extreme by using presidential authority to appoint an "anti-book ban coordinator" AKA, a 'porn enforcer' in YOUR kid's school.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a8368c7af05ea5eacc97bfda523d19d724f55e3eacf4e2856fe2be73f66e8e34fbe4886bab6668c9dfb78aec3055d03ea65aa6ef850f6b576aba593e0eaee0f
JOIN THE FIGHT—PROTECT YOUR KIDS!

The federal government is out of control. You can rest assured that Gov. Ron DeSantis will use his presidential authority to put an end to EVERY ONE of Biden's senseless policies that are wasting YOUR hard-earned tax dollars.

American children have been put through enough nonsense in the classroom through the mismanagement of Covid. It's time we focus on protecting them, NOT forcing sexualization into their classrooms.

Yesterday, Gov. DeSantis posed a simple question to Joe Biden:

"Why do you want to have that curriculum jammed into a second-grade classroom?"

We can't wait to hear what woke nonsense will come in response. As a father of 3 young children, Gov. DeSantis is fed-up. Are you?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a8368c7af05ea5eacc97bfda523d19d724f55e3eacf4e2856fe2be73f66e8e34fbe4886bab6668c9dfb78aec3055d03ea65aa6ef850f6b576aba593e0eaee0f
DONATE TODAY—STOP SEXUALIZING THE CLASSROOM

We need your help getting Biden out of the Oval Office. Will you help out by donating to our cause? We can't win this fight alone.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a8368c7af05ea5ed12b9b6ae87b2d4234625a29d2cd8c4bd54a42317a528dc758774265cdf64535cea6e13fc79858433696a0ac8a1eff7b2aae1873f7c2ab95
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a8368c7af05ea5eacc97bfda523d19d724f55e3eacf4e2856fe2be73f66e8e34fbe4886bab6668c9dfb78aec3055d03ea65aa6ef850f6b576aba593e0eaee0f

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
