Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:

Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhsnk439vtlh7f1pl1sq21kegsqn8h7psgeimdoo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cji6ao32c5h2bs)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: After Donald Trump was arrested, Ted Cruz, perhaps Trump’s biggest suck-up in the Senate and embarrassment to us all, was still defending him by attacking our democracy, justice system & lying about President Biden. Cruz needs to go.
body:
Cruz loves Trump more than the country
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tacc5424a-1ca2-45ee-b2ba-0d2174e8c033/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **After Donald Trump was arrested, Ted Cruz, perhaps his biggest suck-up in the Senate and embarrassment to us all, was still defending him by attacking our democracy, justice system & lying about President Biden.** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b14b590-7eaa-41e5-a126-acf14b866e04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cruz is pure slime. _Luckily, we have a terrific opportunity to replace Cruz with former NFL star, Obama Administration appointee & Texas Congressman, Colin Allred, who knocked out an incumbent GOP Representative to win a key swing seat in 2018._ **_I can't imagine a better resume to take on traitor, coward and all around awful "human being," Cruz. It's why the political prognosticators changed their rankings when Allred got in the race to call it competitive._** [**_As Cruz defends Trump, Allred defends democracy. Let's defend Allred by giving him $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get a real Senator from TX._ **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted70018f-3aab-4d97-a2c0-6c11004ab78e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for the Senate. Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc002e16d-ebe3-4be5-9aec-8e375ee0b320/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=613d82b5344a4d608f8776147eab937e&_e=MBxkNIx-BnNtXEStpW7cOBSCzTtudtrRmSf8rQF2csHiT3WJH2UrjkBoKgnG4d1XaKtlYUk7AX8DADTpMYdO6xtU9POms7AbdJ1d5MU_xIrPd6WBtQc9ynKrJDe80q8ccOkQ-_9e7U5Q2SlxbMoLf7PuqsDrSb06ol0vzdSaDOBVWRSTLLMDM3jpiT3c59pqSsu3iDU9zF6S7whzB6ECIuplvMb-elOzLSr9QbeJ_s5bo-84eGmdZjO_yqJNp1qi) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=613d82b5344a4d608f8776147eab937e&_e=MBxkNIx-BnNtXEStpW7cOBSCzTtudtrRmSf8rQF2csHiT3WJH2UrjkBoKgnG4d1XaKtlYUk7AX8DADTpMYdO6xtU9POms7AbdJ1d5MU_xIoV0Ei0ATsVJB2-TzfG_f7KZrMaCirJ64BOrsLMh3w2zSMoq2M7VDwug8OvBtMsz-QnApodxLT2jeFH6lemKFFBxwJIn_US2DrSGLAa13MNMx6LpFDn8ZWFB8jf10XD9A-RIEFamlT4SlRh8XLhnlzb) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=613d82b5344a4d608f8776147eab937e&_e=MBxkNIx-BnNtXEStpW7cOBSCzTtudtrRmSf8rQF2csHiT3WJH2UrjkBoKgnG4d1XaKtlYUk7AX8DADTpMYdO6xtU9POms7AbdJ1d5MU_xIr4rmVlRodDaKh76IR5lSVDsOWUPHZmPsx9EoX8Ea7frGMKuL0dscgUa5tQDo4LF61UCcvHTxADnskw8ZvcKxKS3H9YSMc0KGMCMuzZS5SglH1vlOp386ssC47SxlJGNJbOQ465Z_WRfRT8m9yUOWea)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Public schools vs. Christians
body:
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f6d4efe4c4e84424be53e73ed6d9b109&_e=17P_3LlIZ7rh8a4OwORRDImOSGrwsNvrFL8ccBTO6kpZqScWeA4QwjgIfraCkZ4RPNCcYZEmY5u6_oR6w8b4i4eTT1R4wjxKCjh_fYTYAhuP_ifB7anRN8fDNn0nZg2LVBjmtxOFGv3bu2mdcVbeSoqgMCCZdZgJ34yg4h_nDd3V1AesiAh9r-rXb_s8Nw69yK61xFMvNmwa8UlVOTE1uSbqR2bYIx9oKFJMuRdiFiSQSSeISzna8q8Hbmwf6l7P)
---
Friend I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. **_America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture._** That's exactly why **TPUSA Faith** launched **Kingdom to the Capitol** -- a series of live worship events in **_ALL FIFTY state capitals_** to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. **As a fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom to the Capitol when we 're in your state capital. ** [**But whether or not you 're able to attend, I hope you'll support TPUSA Faith with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100 to enable us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY worship events.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f6d4efe4c4e84424be53e73ed6d9b109&_e=17P_3LlIZ7rh8a4OwORRDImOSGrwsNvrFL8ccBTO6kpZqScWeA4QwjgIfraCkZ4RPNCcYZEmY5u6_oR6w8b4i4eTT1R4wjxKCjh_fYTYAhvMotctd81xgO6J2jI-UvHMkB0sHJGWf71H4QDhIzgX5kM_tEPxh5UtJQcSI0eHD7D5JI3LEwnC9hKX7RP_NuLuZ_bpyz8nqWXe8DkoSFFSTLh8FmNXNxVH8lJ2msN4liV04Slfhlthqk0HxBFiSRC9)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f63d2dc92a649f0b3e1e86e03d267ee&_e=qGKZjqa4moFk8ECeFZDd8npD-WIWMwLTM8y_0TXSRMPGO4EJ1fApD_NmAeZFGMRQzq1LS5Ev-ZKLL_jGJhHqHd1q6fHiyBD3LWmkRPRaO57H_i1w-XoBvTXHcAxi5ntMz91c67qr03Wdgc0oeaF5SeRqPMH5XRBl-aThL3x2SfUGifPlEW0FmpWuo97TyGR3Wn6y4teCzqq8SROKTcwd1kRkqExZt8acq5LKh1TZAn08ObyMjdP_KNbHRa3Cr6vFcbDrUjskeYPikI3A_ng4FJwjMcqvzaTllzf77Iq-WnJvZlGaZ6QE5X8I4q35Yk71Y2aYPywayy3Lbl_CadfOTQ-YSB1nxFGjhtFpKpUMakUgOkbyRtKz-NJthC105O9PTsNYREjlyCeCUiKN9yO8gWuBnaUJ3cK4OLg6kRJIpK4%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f63d2dc92a649f0b3e1e86e03d267ee&_e=qGKZjqa4moFk8ECeFZDd8npD-WIWMwLTM8y_0TXSRMPGO4EJ1fApD_NmAeZFGMRQzq1LS5Ev-ZKLL_jGJhHqHd1q6fHiyBD3LWmkRPRaO57H_i1w-XoBvTXHcAxi5ntMz91c67qr03Wdgc0oeaF5SeRqPMH5XRBl-aThL3x2SfUGifPlEW0FmpWuo97TyGR3Wn6y4teCzqq8SROKTcwd1kRkqExZt8acq5LKh1TZAn08ObyMjdP_KNbHRa3Cr6vFcbDrUjskeYPikI3A_ng4FJJOcLCYf10ivNiCKYeOMq9KMS2Wk0c2GLSzJdVdl8W7QNolltm2PrDwyi1Ez7ZQDfKvjo_Tg6x3wYDwnMQqrpmNMJpn0eW5y6uDEsKJSq0YBjGbgHczqXlkmUS9gG1QLO2PLL9XnnUYq3au_01Fsy8%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f63d2dc92a649f0b3e1e86e03d267ee&_e=qGKZjqa4moFk8ECeFZDd8npD-WIWMwLTM8y_0TXSRMPGO4EJ1fApD_NmAeZFGMRQzq1LS5Ev-ZKLL_jGJhHqHd1q6fHiyBD3LWmkRPRaO57H_i1w-XoBvTXHcAxi5ntMz91c67qr03Wdgc0oeaF5SeRqPMH5XRBl-aThL3x2SfUGifPlEW0FmpWuo97TyGR3Wn6y4teCzqq8SROKTcwd1kRkqExZt8acq5LKh1TZAn08ObyMjdP_KNbHRa3Cr6vFcbDrUjskeYPikI3A_ng4FJkWhDoLilgXGIc5mFGyUiqBdsQhNpnlygCv28CU2_wu05BxFq6Zm-o-RBJSGkv7J0S4UqVRGy5akfeqRa-1CHcp8X2UNCeSo5Lmn4B0-7PTuEPUUzULe_N528RRhSfP2eCPIDKWcyXpLBZhkG8qTPM%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

# FRIday, JUNE 16, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we celebrate the anniversary of the first roller coaster ride in America. The "Switchback Railway" opened on Coney Island on June 16, 1884; you can [see a video ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAQQL_G3oLsO_ugg4dUFVuqdOqIDD6CIxNHxAHx91U6Z31PetL7PXUnH1O8Xb79zK6MufNDiSt3ig6aDoAdyOBGZmCU7DQ19KGtakBODm3PrBrDpGtvAMHqmpAY2dKA2sroQAEq0qSV0oaqwVBQpvehHsPYkxVGcYglL9U1x1uZeEx7XnmphjzL5KZS7g-BRwGtgHbbtmrPz_Ls-eVfxJdhEtiuAr_Ox-Sv9vy5hx-5uHDfYkrxQbUw6jL7mP6T5f3hXwAAAP__byBQ9Q)of it here. ## Hackers Hit Federal Government, Banks
A Russian ransomware gang known as Clop has begun listing the victims of its ongoing mass hack, [including federal agencies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL8Gd0SwtrFTULyGLq-90lrDEvaCTWSIT_f3p1x99Ugz0nzclhty5v3-HzeyLZYFfeOTFmWkNhL6BbpgIxFQ35HVZjZXPaoZumRjP8bYxzCNuM7rFZW-AgKOfoLBaD93bEFBr4w2Wik9mIsfTFDDimGKIa5mFIOiwK0cl8_Ce0sU83c56bj4snXZptaeVfT_BDgBrpFP_njtPr2xAPeWC3DKCHB6FOC2chI36XN5yg1rlQn9o8oV90eVr51POio3pirAdYcNzy_OmauZxKDuG3L-7ba_N_wEAAD__5q5Xgs) and major financial and educational institutions.

Several hundred companies could be affected, experts said, with their data being intercepted and held for ransom. Clop gave victims until June 14 to respond or risk exposure of their private data. Now it's releasing names of firms affected.

Clop didn't reveal the names of the federal agencies affected, however, saying it [wouldn't disclose the data](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQxvGnMRvIPhsDg4cu3tK1IzL2Ea41dhSuoXn7Kp07f9Lvk_4fl_kSKFO5vocdHa91DpHpgbO0rbIt6Bma5FZEQN2gU3a0k-rlCM3mlghDb_o4jJNBq0cNURrQEyCuy5imhhxI0NIqq6RUxnbR2CTNEtKwpnWxvTASE3G9d5-VCm-45md94L2LdW-y25hvh9BvArwAf55nF0t5bQL8SxbgpRXgVS_A32ompngI8N9He30xZcfC7UbcxueCgTnELwGeSsKfbuM9N3eXbiflTIcdhJHXPVD-O-f_W_wGAAD__92RXzI) from any government or police organizations.
## Support for BLM Falls to New Low
A new Pew Research Center survey shows support for the Black Lives Matter movement has fallen to its [lowest level since 2020,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PtCAYAH8Ndhh4QPQtKN6Gbq-90qA8rmz4MIKS_feXvfr6SWYy34_5YX3w6fllI-q65dmu1d84M0W5oiBm6JzeEAFFh5qrSf3jA5ug27V0zAkm7IRcAB_ctLhhGtdhUsLJkdnOa2AgmOKKM8al6lepHJOLdePmtkUNRDJ0vuazf2Wf6o5beOcbz37NsQt6r_UoRPwnYAiY1lrfbNl9etacqo9YPhwBk7AVAuYjI2BeVyJguCRgDmy0XOeNb1r23Aot13Hks9IlRBrzjRFTpe7MR6EJGw2ZgOlO7Y7mQ_BFjUSyZ7Q-_BbVvwf9BAAA___woWgR) with most respondents saying an increased focus on race hasn't improved black lives.

Though there are sharp differences between Democrats and Republicans, 51 percent overall said they "somewhat" support BLM, [down from 67 percent ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8Gb0TH2ZzdgaELW7p2tEg4YioMyJBE-fsqnTs_6enpfZ_Xs4sp5tuX29n0UFZ37fHBK5BUJHFccfAmMCOPAxtFC30oDQsOmwnaaQDlEQG187wEdosiNxPNi0I_RIOAI5AiBaAmOl0n8jBdnJ-DDxfSYgL2sZfj9FNi7huH9CoPPk7Xsg_JbL3XJsZPgVagza9aWn8jgfYtFmiBBFqlBdpL2mW711qOLmu65xs32YvM_JSpPGXb3FHTS_r4iJ6bzK7HkmUtKQm0w2F8fcaUYqNZTHDbXUx_Ef3_J78BAAD__0GKYqM)in 2020.

Only 8 percent think BLM's work has been highly effective at improving the lives of black people, while a majority, 57 percent, say it hasn't helped at all. clean_body: | | | | | | FRIday, JUNE 16, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we celebrate the anniversary of the first roller coaster ride in America. The "Switchback Railway" opened on Coney Island on June 16, 1884; you can it here. Enjoy the ride! Today, we're talking about Russian mass-hack attacks, a record-high home listing in Texas, and a bridge-sized asteroid whizzing past the Earth. Have thoughts on what we can do better? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover, and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Hackers Hit Federal Government, Banks A Russian ransomware gang known as Clop has begun listing the victims of its ongoing mass hack, and major financial and educational institutions. Several hundred companies could be affected, experts said, with their data being intercepted and held for ransom. Clop gave victims until June 14 to respond or risk exposure of their private data. Now it's releasing names of firms affected. Clop didn't reveal the names of the federal agencies affected, however, saying it from any government or police organizations. Support for BLM Falls to New Low A new Pew Research Center survey shows support for the Black Lives Matter movement has fallen to its with most respondents saying an increased focus on race hasn't improved black lives. Though there are sharp differences between Democrats and Republicans, 51 percent overall said they "somewhat" support BLM, 2020. Only 8 percent think BLM's work has been highly effective at improving the lives of black people, while a majority, 57 percent, say it hasn't helped at all. () Top Cities to Get the Most For Your Money Where can you get the most value for your salary? A new ranking that factors in taxes and cost of living shows that the Top 10 cities in terms of purchasing power are . The No. 1 city for getting the most bang for your buck is Memphis, according to the Smart Assets ranking, followed by El Paso and Oklahoma City. ()➤**Disney is relaunching its 24-day "around the world" private jet tour, hitting all 12 of its global theme parks plus the Taj Mahal, the Pyramids and the Eiffel Tower. The only catch: It costs $115,000. () | Daily Quote | "If you are a government, city or police service do not worry, we erased all your data. You do not need to contact us. We have no interest to expose such information. name: The David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Barack Obama’s True Legacy
body:
Friend, Joe Biden may go down in history as the worst "president" of the United States

| |
---
| | Friend, Joe Biden may go down in history as the worst "president" of the United States...but Barack Obama is still the worst thing that happened to our republic. Because he laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. _ _ _He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs._ _ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage._ _ _ _And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we're seeing today has been over a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why Freedom Center colleagues Robert Spencer, Daniel Greenfield and Jamie Glazov have joined other conservative powerhouses to publish _Barack Obama 's True Legacy_ -[ and why I want you to be one of the first to receive a copy.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0ed1b45143be4aeea3442307e6829929&_e=H64Z4Y8CCq_fSImq1oc4Qi68Q8FF10R8dqJcp30ysqbI97-d9JXFFqN1K-a3KZxZRWt-VewZXzvaPc0MnVPMCONeYGcOfdfgzHRO55jWt4HXZM8e4Itt9GugvJRPAQlXqQGHRJ8X3IqlkzDSemOgqfmVIdcff1j8JRGoc_wW9a5V87z163wdclaUNx9oTO0a3fHpMWYLBObidWhsEyAKSZ9ITvvmRH6hLWGQ3LsGSDtW3WCo8Srb004677BwJ7fdM2AoIhCoswO0vjdkAmYbNrsmuRtX0jL_J69otNrLMzxpkaeM3VJu69Syk20l5y2hGwRO6YpiRcDq8TqfsL3BvUfaHp1EGrOK-x3DGvdSp2MlynM-XumnxytuVhugTHqX)** So many of our fellow citizens think the nightmare we've been living for the past three years came from nowhere. They think that this "administration" is made up of incompetent fools and that our drastically declining standard of living is the result of Joe Biden's cognitive state. But the truth is much darker, friend. **This decline was by design - and in many ways, Barack Hussein Obama was its chief architect.** That's why I believe _Barack Obama 's True Legacy_ is one of the most important books of the year, [**and why if you give a generous gift of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today today, I 'll send you a complimentary copy.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0ed1b45143be4aeea3442307e6829929&_e=H64Z4Y8CCq_fSImq1oc4Qi68Q8FF10R8dqJcp30ysqbI97-d9JXFFqN1K-a3KZxZRWt-VewZXzvaPc0MnVPMCONeYGcOfdfgzHRO55jWt4HXZM8e4Itt9GugvJRPAQlXqQGHRJ8X3IqlkzDSemOgqfmVIdcff1j8JRGoc_wW9a5V87z163wdclaUNx9oTO0a3fHpMWYLBObidWhsEyAKSZ9ITvvmRH6hLWGQ3LsGSDvNxf82iW9snYsxXEdsDkAFKvyAionEMMNEdWY_W742SjE9f6bZM7mVoFgRbTx5Keyny5djWX2KGChRIKrzf0n_SFV-LdJdxyLXUGGOTuHV9zZZs-zwedA4lBWm6vclnwdSTLhr91hgUhCBEC4IBEh2) In his first week in office, Joe Biden signed a record number of executive orders, taking a wrecking ball to all the hard work President Trump did to get our country back on track. He brought us back to where Obama left off, and now, with his White House full of Obama holdovers, he intends to finish what his old boss started. We can't let that happen, friend. But if we can't stop an enemy that we don't understand. That's where this incredible book comes in, and why I need patriots like you to read it immediately.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Michael Finch President, The David Horowitz Freedom Center
---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: My email is less than 400 words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---

Patriot, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--_**it was about demonstrating true leadership. **_

Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--**bucking Fauci,** **bucking the establishment,** and **bucking the media. **
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---

Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics.

But, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. _**Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve.**_ To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation.

This starts with:
* Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border

* Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation

* Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them

In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it.

You can take that to the bank.

As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve.

I pledge to you, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. _**And we are going to start on DAY ONE. **_

As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. **[Will you join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r "Will you join me,
Patriot?") **
---
| | | | | [DONATE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)

---
| | | [DONATE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---
| | | | | [DONATE $500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $1000](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---
| | [DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---

Let's prove to the Left that we have the strength to defeat any adversary.

Success is attainable. Decline is a choice. And freedom is worth fighting for. Are you ready to join the team?
In Freedom,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---
Ron DeSantis

---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831216:Jq_z2bIaN:m:1:3299561967:519AEE24DAA71F9CF96733119E83F69A:r)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

Tallahassee, FL 32315

As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=653ca5261d47474e80d8105ebad723d4&_e=eohdtYCvgOeLUlVjEpTkLXzJya5lUwPuV-m9s_04sihelZtWBwRnwWlp-p_9Tw8OIGk2lRS3na9cgHADsdhZsNVUoMMMEOlcobvXhr043MiXB7eF2w7unj4HXgp9A93aqzTklm4wo-I6OObGoz6L4VN4CQSSXbkxirHq0fMdZSgaz530YCUHypOELUmweY3MPr2lD8cQ-vXStDTVRk_ykGhqai3Q8QfxIVojOZWj2v6UafdF3jY6i-lSUO-KL9AG) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=653ca5261d47474e80d8105ebad723d4&_e=eohdtYCvgOeLUlVjEpTkLXzJya5lUwPuV-m9s_04sihelZtWBwRnwWlp-p_9Tw8OIGk2lRS3na9cgHADsdhZsNVUoMMMEOlcobvXhr043MiAurPnrxyxXBgbURNNLHaMryf0V31uAIf97WdfCfde3ANF6g4WNAUYwYjuaAz4Ly1AqM-2Ep5t2Cexm7THB0U_d6mDiLCrX5qTn2Jkq-NUzrEtnSrW93cWn4n2nN14xUAm0nSNSfMVF13nkN8tWCzP) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=653ca5261d47474e80d8105ebad723d4&_e=eohdtYCvgOeLUlVjEpTkLXzJya5lUwPuV-m9s_04sihelZtWBwRnwWlp-p_9Tw8OIGk2lRS3na9cgHADsdhZsNVUoMMMEOlcobvXhr043MhMp9WVuuKMuOjqpWAwh64GGhfgOpk08eXl6Fjg4sQIZQQEhkAZfYJjGd3Ee_bwkkenF9HLxH5YPD7Pe5zRkokLqozTgYvoVd29Fe0vVfvw86qv4dQIKte286_0ieyN_LMDesKaMXxt_v8vqJ1MYAJo)

[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827229?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827230?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827231?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Imagine walking into the grocery store, looking for some of your favorite foods. Instead, you see _empty shelves_ where there used to be a variety of fruits, veggies, and nuts. This could one day be our reality if **bees and other pollinators continue dying at alarming rates.[Act now before it's too late for bees and the planet: Donate $27 or more immediately and help us reach our $5,320 goal before midnight tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827232?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Neonicotinoid pesticides are a key driver of the pollinator crisis we're facing today. They can impact bees' ability to navigate and reproduce, and _**even kill bees on contact.**_ But they're currently the most widely used insecticides in agriculture.
There's no time to waste, Friend: if we don't act now to ban bee-killing pesticides, our food system, our health, and our planet could face devastating consequences. Today's children could be some of the last people to share the planet with many species of wild bees. Will you join us in this fight?
**Help get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system and protect our planet. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $5,320 goal before midnight!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827228?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827229?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827230?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827231?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees play a crucial role in their ecosystems. From fields of blooming wildflowers to rows of veggies on farms, these insects and other pollinators aid in plant reproduction. Many of these plants support an entire web of life by offering habitat and food for countless other species.
We rely on bees and other pollinators for 75% of the world's food crops, including some of the most nutritious. **If we lose bees, we will also lose many of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, _**people could be at higher risk of heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer,**_ according to a recent study.
The damage doesn't stop there. Neonics can make their way into the very food you eat and can't be washed off. They've been linked to health impacts like birth**defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and autism.**
It's clear that neonics are harmful all-around. But bee-killers like Bayer-Monsanto are sweeping their lethal impacts under the rug. To make matters worse, the United States EPA is giving them a free pass. They're allowing widespread use of neonics and other toxic pesticides instead of shifting away from chemicals we KNOW are killing massive numbers of bees. Now is the time to stand up and demand action!
**Help stop vulnerable bees from vanishing and protect our planet. Make your $27 donation to Friends of the Earth today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827228?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827229?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827230?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827231?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are a canary in the coal mine, signaling that**the toxic way we produce food is on a deadly track.** We must act NOW to protect our health and ensure that we are not among the last generations to share the planet with countless species of wild bees.
The EPA has a chance to ban neonics once and for all. Instead,**it might approve these pesticides for another 15 years and subject even more bees to this fate.** But there's still hope, Friend. Because of supporters like you, we have the chance to make real change -- change that would help protect bees, people, and the planet.
At Friends of the Earth, we are doing everything we can to help save pollinators, protect our health, and stop the destruction of our planet. We're working to pass policies that ban toxic pesticides that are driving the decline of bees and butterflies. At the same time, we're pushing major grocery companies like Kroger to stop selling food grown with these chemicals. With your help and membership support today, we can keep fighting to win and to protect our planet.
But the bees are running out of time **\-- and they need you.**
If we don't stand up to Big Ag now,** we could stand to lose _hundreds_ of wild bee species** in North America alone. Neither of us wants to see a world without these vulnerable pollinators. It's up to you to help protect them before it's too late. Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet.
**Bees, people, and the planet are on the line. Rush your $27 donation and help us reach our $5,320 goal before midnight tonight!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827228?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827229?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1827230?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91a5d2ced6e84172b39780961124afcd&_e=ZbfkUnF-QODHhayrCrLVCQ909_SISwF5x5vIEIOgKEBti3X-3_Dst4kef24-nowgK8ySf8oajQRZZS0NdPykfQ6ZNty2fspaKD0MpUxvfe2-0D4uz47fsVWh1k2zkJc6lar3nTHOBinvtCRmsjg4DOUD3WAGowL_L7nGpVcF342plJ_huHqXy3fn6GGnCdthHPRV3oFY9_J_srKBUVS6TMYpu6Rug5aWu0u-yw7w8LnQkSNrGEMluU_3kmVa727W_RxJgMskzgxpIjYaih0VtQ7SRXg8F65ctNLDXfmzEHO3FihAEmvP7Jw8gsEu92v-ywZduPvDpe6Qq9sKHu5hwuxDrMhyNGwu66xefGDe4SsEdG1btYviDWdGNEwBpNyuiPR9xEcKiHCNW5CNi8nPusxYFUt7at63UhQsHPxqjP4%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91a5d2ced6e84172b39780961124afcd&_e=ZbfkUnF-QODHhayrCrLVCQ909_SISwF5x5vIEIOgKEBti3X-3_Dst4kef24-nowgK8ySf8oajQRZZS0NdPykfQ6ZNty2fspaKD0MpUxvfe2-0D4uz47fsVWh1k2zkJc6lar3nTHOBinvtCRmsjg4DOUD3WAGowL_L7nGpVcF342plJ_huHqXy3fn6GGnCdthHPRV3oFY9_J_srKBUVS6TMYpu6Rug5aWu0u-yw7w8LnQkSNrGEMluU_3kmVa727W_RxJgMskzgxpIjYaih0VtZrH7N6hvUMmdkmktV29_inGoohJHrKRFM-CeXb4bvFhBwuZ3_DltTgdY2vB9m-LrknmZSZIqygWgrncKknTIixdqpS3nHMo6-jgClE4-kxaEqW54R-9Htm6Xi6iZA4u8XAugPHinCkS7BkNhE__v-k%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91a5d2ced6e84172b39780961124afcd&_e=ZbfkUnF-QODHhayrCrLVCQ909_SISwF5x5vIEIOgKEBti3X-3_Dst4kef24-nowgK8ySf8oajQRZZS0NdPykfQ6ZNty2fspaKD0MpUxvfe2-0D4uz47fsVWh1k2zkJc6lar3nTHOBinvtCRmsjg4DOUD3WAGowL_L7nGpVcF342plJ_huHqXy3fn6GGnCdthHPRV3oFY9_J_srKBUVS6TMYpu6Rug5aWu0u-yw7w8LnQkSNrGEMluU_3kmVa727W_RxJgMskzgxpIjYaih0VtWGB3dasa-ucOO3YRmaXmXQ4bHSf7Dx6uh8PoV7-FcRijJBV1qa5sDa3061so11ODLXKVOTmiFQZ3e03ScG7KdDoNyR3h9niqLaLisuORm2_adwDz4vXetOWdwNU76UYdTXIcMLtoIz0ZDC_jkxisaU%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: A.G. Holder
subject: Pursue the full promise of our democracy...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team,
As our nation reflects on 60 years since 1963, a transformational year in the civil rights movement, I am reminded of the progress that we have made in this span of time and the work that lies ahead as we relentlessly pursue the full promise of our democracy.
**[Join All On The Line in reaffirming our commitment to the fight for fair redistricting. Make a donation today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64910217/411670613/-1316552396?refcode=20230616_AOTL_P_EHHA2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmMzkzZGYwLTM0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3VL73RAsAmLEPC-dCh3udH7xvsuOOQAUFBCyRZNV5TQ=)**
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64910218/411670614/-1316552396?refcode=20230616_AOTL_P_EHHA2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmMzkzZGYwLTM0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3VL73RAsAmLEPC-dCh3udH7xvsuOOQAUFBCyRZNV5TQ=)
---
Our movement draws strength from the courage and conviction President Kennedy showed 60 years ago when he called for civil rights legislation in a nationally-televised address -- and the tireless civil rights workers, organizers, and activists who carried the torch of progress forward, even as they were met with fierce opposition, violence, and brutality. It is in these extraordinary moments -- these complex and contradictory chapters in the life of our nation -- that America’s character is revealed, and our future determined.
Our nation’s history since 1963 has been marked by both remarkable struggle and progress. **Last week, our movement for fair maps secured a huge victory with the landmark redistricting decision,_Allen v. Milligan_ , ultimately setting course for Black Alabamians to have equal representation in their state.** And though we are celebrating this momentous victory, we can never be satisfied with mere “progress.” Progress is not our goal; it is simply a measure of our commitment, a marker in time. Our pursuit for equal representation and justice must continue -- and it must endure.
**[Now, more than ever, our work inside and outside the courts, in our communities, and at the ballot box is crucial to achieving fair maps. Will you support our work and chip into All On The Line today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64910219/411670615/-1316552396?refcode=20230616_AOTL_P_EHHA2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmMzkzZGYwLTM0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3VL73RAsAmLEPC-dCh3udH7xvsuOOQAUFBCyRZNV5TQ=)**

clean_body: | Team, As our nation reflects on 60 years since 1963, a transformational year in the civil rights movement, I am reminded of the progress that we have made in this span of time and the work that lies ahead as we relentlessly pursue the full promise of our democracy. = = Our movement draws strength from the courage and conviction President Kennedy showed 60 years ago when he called for civil rights legislation in a nationally-televised address -- and the tireless civil rights workers, organizers, and activists who carried the torch of progress forward, even as they were met with fierce opposition, violence, and brutality. It is in these extraordinary moments -- these complex and contradictory chapters in the life of our nation -- that America’s character is revealed, and our future determined. Our nation’s history since 1963 has been marked by both remarkable struggle and progress. Last week, our movement for fair maps secured a huge victory with the landmark redistricting decision,Allen v. Milligan , ultimately setting course for Black Alabamians to have equal representation in their state. And though we are celebrating this momentous victory, we can never be satisfied with mere “progress.” Progress is not our goal; it is simply a measure of our commitment, a marker in time. Our pursuit for equal representation and justice must continue -- and it must endure. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As we continue to celebrate last week’s triumph in Alabama and honor those who have paved the way for our freedoms, we must set a course for the future. We must strive for true equality and justice in every facet of our society. Our journey toward equal rights and fair representation stretches beyond the horizon. I implore you, my friends, to be inspired -- and, more importantly, to be impatient. Do not settle for mere progress; strive for lasting change. \-- Eric H. ## This WKND At Sheridan.Church
---
I will be pressing pause on our series at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22888924.12803.1.bf956c43fd05e1955a7e53aaf83ed6b6) over the [Book of Acts](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22888924.12804.1.1f8c8d9ff6f5f878ff9213ae04db0642) this WKND to address an issue that I believe is the most pressing issue in our culture. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Ten Truths, No Lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of these facts.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668442%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bpfJfkXDtuBEmRUhue3BYw&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668443%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hxl8O93oV2h1fBj297Wmew&sysid=1)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668444%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PHtDRjhjZ7kWssxMPbw2Fg&sysid=1)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5lKOi3bCbm%2byRif7X04g8w&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668442%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bpfJfkXDtuBEmRUhue3BYw&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669556%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hs6krzcVd0UywIO3yHY%2fCg&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669557%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7JZMiUnBMBekw%2flI6PKcDw&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669558%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xmpvAziAeKuw1woXeNrMMg&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669559%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=15PSZpmrKZwydnLlQJDrdA&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669550%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X4DjeXDXP%2fihR%2f8t5B6X5A&sysid=1)
---|---|---

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
We value your input.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr2bb1sbmktdueo2vea1cje2sk8adq8isdvllu50_rp22sh2s8i66o73cjh69ob2c3h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcbmen3br552clhl0dh9c5391e7lbia7g5en91do_rp22sh2s8i66o73cjh69ob2c3h2bs)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Crystal and Jason
subject: Stop the Mountain Valley Pipeline Extension into NC - add your voice!
body:
Save the date for #StopMVPExtension Community Event July 16! | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yj6cBoP2vcn6KEpSm74SwRHohHAX8g5ATnPCv71yIyljYKEL7y4fDqHaI8IztpoOKrdO9ubOgFe5BwtfSC4GGsWsWfZbH1pDvkP7m2o_2wrMCiXW3pGqoq0iNm3fEGV1xIh0nDJK4chT_ZqFprjXn3sEDIW2uLGg37-SoMIW7QLxzFB96AKGCa_-OKf-yc-3fgMis0QCzbcGQQr97lBvGzCwm97AlohbS43-CKcJCPU0vPlAM44hJo5cA8bq1rce7HlGLjlr3qb7gh8i7MgoSmkh7cc0f1IyHXBTaDHwDMzbKJxOBz4XysUvzg3crCSEQI/3x3/2OoWkX-dTQyMH47OYGVoEA/h0/q1GVUn8I3ilTkODjwfsWvt1_TjO6_C93CocSPeyj1Js)
---
Meku, **** We’re back home from last week’s mobilization on DC against the criminal fast-tracking of the Mountain Valley Pipeline by Congress and the White House. Over 30 frontline representatives participated in a lobby day, and made our voices, our dismay and our rage heard outside the White House at the #StopMVP rally with over 300 people in attendance. Check out the rally recap video by our friend Johnny Barber. Here’s a Washington Post [article](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EOSj-f2GB18S5Jyd3qa9145L9Yqt2xrG9Bc-gCoMZCtlHXN4z2jaldxpFcP_xBC9WckPLQsBA0wF4CqG1Dh55tOjTlbSEU7qhwlcD3IuNdQgGYb0kXhkVjYxtQnBzN7Um0iByF3nz3AESac1CbvQswQS6JUnMCa7CKCWckt3vKEa0iEFEXX1CSm91LU2__FsMyDhOgxkk8xSnpDj0-3osaLJpSAxpll9ViVPzwrrzd_5mjmBZ5cpeRi3wha80LrF77bw9hMQq7YZIXMc22OjfWVtwA7ZDf-mK3uh1wRTPUevuIKynUHCfc2jZlDZzso2Yzs6HROf7EUWxss2TmuyoQWVv5x5pmOnSmMknQ3joGbwuGwHJXretm6u3WZa95dEO58E6ORTTB10prCiWO136_Il62ZDUa5pABcGwQyZvg-5g/3x3/2OoWkX-dTQyMH47OYGVoEA/h1/BnpaK89X4QUo7dnXWYCwJ146FBCiKPNqpvi8MYIT4kc) about the event.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/7m9VDUTsZHJXsX_nbnqDrR4Rdnh4f4mJlHGa4Qn4WTay3SjnmC-gZj8UsgaH9YUvkRsolTtmbNMZ9V2MId1pXzog8VM6ZlPzMMNr33_DZUSzuXpoMIyaQGwO-SARJpf3mQJpTp4LdAdBimulPjRvSoSxOWjqZRod8IRwONrNbbz3IEXajlGrRtb0pdzP8WH5jQ1Exqh7giP0nLDZrc3FwLWVbGw31Akp8BQfodk-dwhUOhlcrxFh5FBmz78Hm8jZHqCC1tY_CTEvbOD-fqFQwBbbPIrqZm3itOhfQyVKNLDNB58RHEnvXZXeA4E2tF_asMTm1apFczquxUx25wivde70D5sO66W4wL3EtsCsYdyP6ByjOLLgYC09qj-2VwZ9p5L0-5A_dfIxBeV5914GEM1Is3kmsr-chvfS5bwVTaSwuen5guVjAwazmMsbDBX_/3x3/2OoWkX-dTQyMH47OYGVoEA/h2/j5kaIpWn-07HNOZ5wrvWJS8-fFVyCohRnPIgL5dWNCM)
---
As y'all know by now, the interference by Congress and the White House to greenlight MVP has been unprecedented. MVP mainline construction has involved over 500 violations, and 75% of the route slices through 'moderate-high' or 'high' landslide risk terrain, including the Jefferson National Forest, and Indigenous burial mounds. Being fast-tracked means forcing the approval of all remaining federal permits within 21 days, and forbidding judicial review of any permits. With MVP mainline set to resume construction in WVA and VA, many concerned community members along the route have begun shifting their attention to pipe safety issues. The pipe has been sitting in the open sun for years, which leads to degradations that increase the risk of explosion. clean_body: Save the date for #StopMVPExtension Community Event July 16! | | Meku, ** We’re back home from last week’s mobilization on DC against the criminal fast-tracking of the Mountain Valley Pipeline by Congress and the White House. Over 30 frontline representatives participated in a lobby day, and made our voices, our dismay and our rage heard outside the White House at the #StopMVP rally with over 300 people in attendance. Check out the rally recap video by our friend Johnny Barber. Here’s a Washington Post about the event. | As y'all know by now, the interference by Congress and the White House to greenlight MVP has been unprecedented. MVP mainline construction has involved over 500 violations, and 75% of the route slices through 'moderate-high' or 'high' landslide risk terrain, including the Jefferson National Forest, and Indigenous burial mounds. Being fast-tracked means forcing the approval of all remaining federal permits within 21 days, and forbidding judicial review of any permits. With MVP mainline set to resume construction in WVA and VA, many concerned community members along the route have begun shifting their attention to pipe safety issues. The pipe has been sitting in the open sun for years, which leads to degradations that increase the risk of explosion. Follow and for ways to support, and real-time updates from the frontlines. WHAT ABOUT THE MVP SOUTHGATE EXTENSION INTO NC? We still have a chance to cancel the MVP Southgate Extension, which WAS NOT explicitly named in the fast-tracking provisions. As was anticipated, MVP Southgate developers just submitted their request for an extension of their original FERC (Federal Energy Regulatory Commission) certificate, despite missing necessary authorizations and recently abandoning eminent domain proceedings for the project’s route through Rockingham and Alamance Counties, NC. Please sign and share the telling FERC to deny their request! Upcoming MVP Resistance Events: June 22 How We Protect Us: A Community Call about MVP Pipe Safety - July 16 #StopMVPSouthgate Community Event at the Haw River Ballroom - save the date! Check the 7DS for event announcements! | Come to our Justice Film Series kick-off & cookout on July 9! | In solidarity, Crystal and Jason | | | Sent via . name: Joe Sweeney
subject: Stand Against Illegals Getting Licenses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Protect Our Laws, Support Granite Solutions!

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

Manchester Mayor Joyce Craig, a gubernatorial wannabe, wants to give New Hampshire drivers licenses to illegal immigrants. **Yes, you read that correctly.**

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/1/01000188c430bf2c-fc5a704d-a0b8-4263-948e-cd64d4ff7f6a-000000/pkoTkaLmahOrfyXWP2JZ828tnMc=326)
---
Her support of this misguided policy suggests a willingness to sidestep our nation's immigration laws, rather than uphold them. It's a stark reminder of the challenges that lay ahead for our state and underscores the urgency of our mission here at Granite Solutions.

So, I'm writing to you today with a simple but significant request:

[Will you donate $25, $50, $100, or even $250 to help Granite Solutions continue fighting for the rule of law and promoting responsible governance in New Hampshire?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/2/01000188c430bf2c-fc5a704d-a0b8-4263-948e-cd64d4ff7f6a-000000/1tDtT76dVED-vpLaN_PtSkK5q7I=326)

Our focus should always be on respecting the rule of law, promoting legal immigration, and safeguarding the welfare of our lawful residents. However, Mayor Craig's approach to governing not only disregards these principles but undermines the integrity of our legal system and jeopardizes the prosperity of our great state.

Granite Solutions exists to ensure that we have leaders in place who prioritize the needs of the Granite State and stand firmly against policies that compromise our laws and values. We need your support to continue this essential work.

[By contributing to Granite Solutions, you're making a clear statement that you, too, believe in preserving the rule of law and safeguarding our state's future.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/3/01000188c430bf2c-fc5a704d-a0b8-4263-948e-cd64d4ff7f6a-000000/nnMTJQmrIH_o5aq99FZIzw2RMDk=326) You're investing in leaders who will resist such detrimental policy initiatives and continue to uphold New Hampshire's proud tradition of fiscal conservatism and responsible governance.

[Thank you for standing with us, and for your ongoing commitment to Granite Solutions. Together, we can ensure a stronger, safer, and more prosperous New Hampshire.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/4/01000188c430bf2c-fc5a704d-a0b8-4263-948e-cd64d4ff7f6a-000000/14kx4IeuRHJpF4M_faa5_AgTGds=326)

For Freedom,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Founder and Chair, Granite Solutions

[ _P.S. Remember - our fight against misguided policies like the one proposed by Mayor Craig requires vigilance, unity, and resources. Your generous donation to Granite Solutions will help us continue this essential work. Please consider donating today._](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/5/01000188c430bf2c-fc5a704d-a0b8-4263-948e-cd64d4ff7f6a-000000/MZHuFRDgLQMuQrl3bD6j6wDR6-4=326)

# _Another Big Week of Economic News_
---
It was another big week for the Hoosier economy. On Monday, General Motors announced a $632 million investment in Fort Wayne to support the plant's production of next generation trucks. The next day, General Motors announced a $3.5 billion investment alongside Samsung SDI in New Carlisle that will create 1,700 new manufacturing jobs and over 1,000 construction jobs. And the day after that, Nucor announced a $115 million investment in Crawfordsville that will create up to 200 new jobs. To recap, that's over $4.2 billion, 1,900 new jobs, and over 1,000 construction jobs, all announced in just one week! And today, the Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that Indiana's unemployment rate stands at 3.1% (compared to the national rate of 3.7%) and the state's labor force participation rate held at 63.6% (compared to the national rate of 62.6%). This marks 35 consecutive months that Indiana's unemployment rate has been below the nation's. It's clear that the Indiana Way is working despite the Biden administration, not because of it. That's why this past session, statehouse Republicans doubled down on this winning economic development strategy — strengthening our quality of life, investing in our workforce, future-proofing our manufacturing sector, and enabling our state to continue to compete and win major investments. Under conservative leadership, Indiana is growing in all the right ways. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer

# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Historic Investments in Indiana_
---
| |
---
_**Governor Eric Holcomb** speaks during a roundtable discussion with business leaders in Portugal._**
---
This week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** announced plans for a $3 billion EV battery cell plant in St. Joseph County. The new plant, which will provide 1,700 new jobs, is a cooperative venture between General Motors and Samsung SDI, and will open in 2026. **What he's saying:** “This historic investment is further proof that Indiana has turned it up and shifted into a higher gear when it comes to helping create the future of mobility and more customer options out on the open road," said **Gov. Holcomb**. **What this means for Indiana:** This joint venture represents the single largest economic development project in St. Joseph County in 75 years. Projects and partnerships like this will strengthen Indiana's position as a global business destination.
* General Motors also announced its plans to invest $632 million at Fort Wayne Assembly to support the truck production process, and another $491 million to upgrade its facilities in Marion to be compatible with EV production.

Construction will begin at the site in the next year and will provide 1,000 jobs during the building phase.
---
|
---
| | **More: Gov. Holcomb **[released an op-ed](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/418d4e96dc8aa134/af4bdab6bbeda421c3d6b838967d376c/40313) discussing the disparity between campaign-trail advertising and in-office actions of federal leaders. Gov. Holcomb says leaders should 1) have a plan 2) demonstrate a bias to action and 3) listen and learn.

# _WNDU: Bipartisan Legislation Introduced to Crack Down on Illegal School Bus Passing_
---
From [WNDU](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/418d4e96dc8aa134/dabd3cc4a6aa3569c3d6b838967d376c/40313): "On Monday, **Congressman Rudy Yakym** , R-IN 2nd District, and Congresswoman Julia Brownley, D-CA 26th District, introduced legislation to analyze and prevent illegal school bus crossings across the country." "The legislation ... is called the [Jackie Walorski Enhancing Necessary Data on (END) Illegal School Bus Passing Act](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/418d4e96dc8aa134/99d09d05fc1fa920c3d6b838967d376c/40313). The END Act would require the National Highway Transportation Safety Administration to gather data on illegal school bus passings throughout the school year, including frequency, circumstances, and demographics of and consequences for the driver." “'Our community in northern Indiana knows all too well the tragic consequences when drivers illegally pass a stopped school bus,' Congressman Yakym said. 'My predecessor and dear friend,**Jackie Walorski** , sprung into action to pass the Stop for School Buses Act of 2021. Congresswoman Brownley and I are proud to carry on her legacy.'” _[Story continues.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/418d4e96dc8aa134/9c5cb76575ae075cc3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _State Rep. Olthoff: Smart Policy, Sound Investments Make Indiana a Destination for Workers, Families _ __
---
From [State Rep. Julie Olthoff](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/418d4e96dc8aa134/a2afd2b4aeedf56fc3d6b838967d376c/40313): "We all know the classic refrain from Field of Dreams: “If you build it, they will come.” And while this year’s NCAA baseball tournament is peppered with Hoosier representation, I am not reciting that quote for baseball purposes. It turns out that this line is the embodiment of the work the Indiana General Assembly has done to position our state as a top destination for workers and families.

"When looking at the workforce challenge facing Indiana, I like to break the solutions down into three buckets: How do we attract talent to our state? How do we retain that talent? How do we make sure that Indiana is a place where these workers want to raise their families and stay for the long haul? If you can enact measures that address these key points, then your state is going to lead the pack when it comes to economic growth and standard of living. I am happy to report that Indiana is checking all these boxes in spades." _[Op-ed continues.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/418d4e96dc8aa134/4c333de35bc17dcac3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _ICYMI: RNC Launches 'Bank Your Vote' Initiative_
---
---
Last week, Republican National Committee (RNC) **Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel** announced “Bank Your Vote,” a nationwide campaign focused on maximizing pre-Election Day voting. **The details:** "Bank Your Vote" will encourage, educate, and activate Republican voters on when, where, and how to lock in their votes as early as possible, through in-person early voting, absentee voting, and ballot harvesting where legal.
* Building on Republicans' absentee return rate, early in-person voting, and ballot harvesting success in 2022, "Bank Your Vote" is the next step to improve the overall number of pre-Election Day voters to ultimately secure victory in 2024.

---

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/418d4e96dc8aa134/b18951bfa9da3ad1c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
|
