name: News Alert
subject: re: funding for PBS...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need you to make your voice heard!
| | | **BREAKING: Republicans move to DEFUND PBS!**
_Far-right House Republicans are trying to cut off funding for VITAL public institutions --**we MUST stand against them to SAVE PBS!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=11072%2E9716520%2EkxpA4z)
**Tell us: Do you support keeping PBS funded?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=11072%2E9716520%2EkxpA4z)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=11072%2E9716520%2EkxpA4z)
---

Ultra-conservative Republicans have spent YEARS attacking PBS and its world-class news and children's programming -- **and now, House Republicans have a plan to BAN all federal funding for PBS!**

PBS has brought free, educational programming into American homes for _over fifty years_ \-- we just CAN'T let the far right threaten this amazing resource!

We've launched an urgent LIVE POLL to find out where Democrats stand, but **_your name is missing,_ and we have just hours to go until the poll closes!**

**Tell us:** **Do you support keeping PBS funded?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=11072%2E9716520%2EkxpA4z)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230616-NewsAlert-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=11072%2E9716520%2EkxpA4z)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=11072_9716520_kxpA4z&akid=11072%2E9716520%2EkxpA4z)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=11072%2E9716520%2EkxpA4z)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=11072%2E9716520%2EkxpA4z)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Keep Congress Republican
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkDGL4zAQhX-N3NlII2UcFSoOjjRHrjq40kxGY0dEso3ksOTfL9li623fe7wPvv_X6Uopp3X5S0XCg-tU21TLlGUhfvVlW-XVF-L7BBpsr7E3ONkuhugZCTsJBs_orR_h1N2D86TnM0AEJEbvGMTNp3m08-zJi-5SeP9oNGicG40bYgSyPDIy3Iwhp5ymLPUYHiI7b-tSpbUq-_OWE9M68Fa6HO7HsTdlfym4KLg04WeVoW7LU4S3dSuJ23v5ru2FU1T29_XPv9HC2YAClO_EOWOwqyHuHynn1HBUTi-FUv4iHT9W8hkAAP__sBBnwA) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkDGL4zAQhX-N3NlII2UcFSoOjjRHrjq40kxGY0dEso3ksOTfL9li623fe7wPvv_X6Uopp3X5S0XCg-tU21TLlGUhfvVlW-XVF-L7BBpsr7E3ONkuhugZCTsJBs_orR_h1N2D86TnM0AEJEbvGMTNp3m08-zJi-5SeP9oNGicG40bYgSyPDIy3Iwhp5ymLPUYHiI7b-tSpbUq-_OWE9M68Fa6HO7HsTdlfym4KLg04WeVoW7LU4S3dSuJ23v5ru2FU1T29_XPv9HC2YAClO_EOWOwqyHuHynn1HBUTi-FUv4iHT9W8hkAAP__sBBnwA) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkDGL4zAQhX-N3NlII2UcFSoOjjRHrjq40kxGY0dEso3ksOTfL9li623fe7wPvv_X6Uopp3X5S0XCg-tU21TLlGUhfvVlW-XVF-L7BBpsr7E3ONkuhugZCTsJBs_orR_h1N2D86TnM0AEJEbvGMTNp3m08-zJi-5SeP9oNGicG40bYgSyPDIy3Iwhp5ymLPUYHiI7b-tSpbUq-_OWE9M68Fa6HO7HsTdlfym4KLg04WeVoW7LU4S3dSuJ23v5ru2FU1T29_XPv9HC2YAClO_EOWOwqyHuHynn1HBUTi-FUv4iHT9W8hkAAP__sBBnwA) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkDGL4zAQhX-N3NlII2UcFSoOjjRHrjq40kxGY0dEso3ksOTfL9li623fe7wPvv_X6Uopp3X5S0XCg-tU21TLlGUhfvVlW-XVF-L7BBpsr7E3ONkuhugZCTsJBs_orR_h1N2D86TnM0AEJEbvGMTNp3m08-zJi-5SeP9oNGicG40bYgSyPDIy3Iwhp5ymLPUYHiI7b-tSpbUq-_OWE9M68Fa6HO7HsTdlfym4KLg04WeVoW7LU4S3dSuJ23v5ru2FU1T29_XPv9HC2YAClO_EOWOwqyHuHynn1HBUTi-FUv4iHT9W8hkAAP__sBBnwA)

body:
HER Time PAC [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP46/1/102543/images/HerTimePrimary.png]
Hey Peter,

We fell just a bit short of our emergency $5,000 abortion access fundraising goal last night — but we extended our deadline by just 24 hours!

We’ve got another shot at raising what we need to fight back against the overwhelming attacks on abortion, particularly the mifepristone case making its way to the Supreme Court, but now we REALLY cannot afford to come up short.

I’m asking you personally if you’d be able to chip in any amount today to support our abortion access efforts. I know we ask alot, but there’s too much on the line right now to not hit this goal.

Here’s a personal link for you to use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-june2023? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-june2023?]

Thanks in advance!

— Katie

Sent from my iPhone

---
Friend,
---
On day ONE the Biden Administration eliminated Trump-era immigration policies that began our historic border crisis.
---
They decided we were going to stop building the wall, going to end Remain in Mexico, and we're gonna release illegal migrants into this country.
---
_Well, now Americans are paying the economic price of these open-border policies as Joe Biden prioritizes illegals over citizens of this country._
---
**Our county is facing a real-life humanitarian crisis created by Biden himself.**
---
I will do everything I can to fight for YOU and to put America FIRST once again, but I need your help by filling out this poll so we can put pressure on Biden and the open-border Democrats.
---
[**Please take my Official Biden Border Crisis Poll so I can hear from YOU about our border crisis and show my colleagues in Congress what Americans are concerned about.**](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=df72c622e8ec43a3811bdeb111a663b7&_e=3LAvR9UZWS_ICP3gIBKZg7yrEvvx4o3tOyEhF88q-7wZJUfnR4Y_nBWS4qEe-2r7JoZjVsoKgZ9UJNb_7f1-lIaGCmxA0BL7Bv26b_a7JV_Zd2b1Pv2JsXIPGICXwFo4OzHZjCD4Li39tH7HU-5Yj73nraM2I4qhqsy8k2XRljY1Muk16w0zqbHzJBd2HZyuSKV38GyRh0_Dfm2qM4gyoaUt-Xl1JF8eB9z6-4ooJLWs3i4pr1B4fD3P3Pmbyh-IYk_EpG0zqIlJbQXIJm7eNUZKERY9I7friC-mR_4ApF8RMgVR1UkVkosKGo2ZV_jduGKFgCmk-SXzO6ro_8iymNbkcN6Q-jr2zgoYaPPVh4oU-8IDKdJTklHO_dfFZ-a3u5K5hU0MJKt0--uvnEfmUniBsJvtp61sEF84kYrbatb4KOPvdHOKzWRFtJK__fz7zFKB4tCx-7tdr0-Blc4HQA%3D%3D)
---

**_Official Biden Border Crisis Poll_ ** **Respondent:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Response Status:** [Pending] **[TAKE THE POLL >>](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=df72c622e8ec43a3811bdeb111a663b7&_e=3LAvR9UZWS_ICP3gIBKZg7yrEvvx4o3tOyEhF88q-7wZJUfnR4Y_nBWS4qEe-2r7JoZjVsoKgZ9UJNb_7f1-lIaGCmxA0BL7Bv26b_a7JV_Zd2b1Pv2JsXIPGICXwFo4OzHZjCD4Li39tH7HU-5Yj73nraM2I4qhqsy8k2XRljY1Muk16w0zqbHzJBd2HZyuSKV38GyRh0_Dfm2qM4gyoaUt-Xl1JF8eB9z6-4ooJLWs3i4pr1B4fD3P3Pmbyh-IYk_EpG0zqIlJbQXIJm7eNUZKERY9I7friC-mR_4ApF8RMgVR1UkVkosKGo2ZV_jdphgFmKf3iMo-NKI6acv2uXYc76RH7ooSF1mPYGKDpKTG_wTIhUlhhRsWuZtbQF-L81mb3U9NbZOxxa7mJgsf63jqPUQCax0554gP4QWOMElOY_rS3C7mNK0Eg_LQMnXN0biPUQGuOFchIuQowTPxdQ%3D%3D)**
---

Our cities are crumbling and as every town becomes a border town it’s only going to get worse.
---
Americans are living in abject poverty as homelessness floods across the country.
---
_If this was Ukraine I can guarantee that Biden and the government would be printing money like crazy to offer aid._
---
_But not for our own citizens._
---
**Democrats are providing the American Dream for illegal aliens but not Americans.**
---
While Biden caters to every need of illegal migrants, doing things like putting them up in hotels while kicking out veterans, our citizens are left on the streets.
---
**The death of the American Dream is upon us as this administration puts illegals FIRST ahead of law-abiding American citizens.**
---
And unless we stand up and stop the open-border Democrats, it will only get worse.
---
[**So please, take my Official Biden Border Crisis Poll so I can hear from YOU about our border crisis and show my colleagues in Congress what Americans are concerned about.**](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=df72c622e8ec43a3811bdeb111a663b7&_e=3LAvR9UZWS_ICP3gIBKZg7yrEvvx4o3tOyEhF88q-7wZJUfnR4Y_nBWS4qEe-2r7JoZjVsoKgZ9UJNb_7f1-lIaGCmxA0BL7Bv26b_a7JV_Zd2b1Pv2JsXIPGICXwFo4OzHZjCD4Li39tH7HU-5Yj73nraM2I4qhqsy8k2XRljY1Muk16w0zqbHzJBd2HZyuSKV38GyRh0_Dfm2qM4gyoaUt-Xl1JF8eB9z6-4ooJLWs3i4pr1B4fD3P3Pmbyh-IYk_EpG0zqIlJbQXIJm7eNUZKERY9I7friC-mR_4ApF8RMgVR1UkVkosKGo2ZV_jdJQ_RssxLFM80DxKo9GQccKhXq0wBaUvGIZLWygmKn4sm0I158qe63DnL7pvX2jL1MtYPVGl2Y6kucrVBvcYn2IBxaooZmO7XaLRnG_iOsGHBuido0siBulQ4CWsz6Y9x-QIEbBHA1XFJhaECQjTAFw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

They decided we were going to stop building the wall, going to end Remain in Mexico, and we're gonna release illegal migrants into this country. Well, now Americans are paying the economic price of these open-border policies as Joe Biden prioritizes illegals over citizens of this country. Our county is facing a real-life humanitarian crisis created by Biden himself. I will do everything I can to fight for YOU and to put America FIRST once again, but I need your help by filling out this poll so we can put pressure on Biden and the open-border Democrats. Americans are living in abject poverty as homelessness floods across the country. If this was Ukraine I can guarantee that Biden and the government would be printing money like crazy to offer aid. But not for our own citizens. Democrats are providing the American Dream for illegal aliens but not Americans. While Biden caters to every need of illegal migrants, doing things like putting them up in hotels while kicking out veterans, our citizens are left on the streets. The death of the American Dream is upon us as this administration puts illegals FIRST ahead of law-abiding American citizens. And unless we stand up and stop the open-border Democrats, it will only get worse. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain Paid for by Hunt for Congress. > As a lifelong Pennsylvanian, I’ve seen Mad’s dedication to serving her friends and neighbors of the Commonwealth, as well as working families, women, and children across the country. You don’t have to take my word for it, just look at what she’s accomplished:

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. That message can and will shape the campaign for the coming months. = – Team Dean Begin forwarded message: Madeleine is a strong Democrat who knows how to deliver real solutions for her constituents and the American people while taking Republicans to task. But if we don’t act now to defend this seat, Mad could be in big trouble. This month’s public FEC deadline is looming and TWO opponents have recently announced their intentions to take this seat. That means= | | = --- | = --- As a lifelong Pennsylvanian, I’ve seen Mad’s dedication to serving her friends and neighbors of the Commonwealth, as well as working families, women, and children across the country. You don’t have to take my word for it, just look at what she’s accomplished: Lowered drug prices for Americans who need it most Protected Americans living in public housing from fire risk Helped invest billions of dollars into green energy solutions We only have so many opportunities to show our recent challengers that Mad is ready for whatever comes her way. = Thanks for all that you do, Cole Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. name: Val Hoyle
subject: celebrating resilience and joy ​​🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍⚧️
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
CW: self harm, hate, violence against LGBTQIA+
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64932631/411731261/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTY1ODJlMS01NjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0ipjZQvbyOYxJ-L6klgd3iM5gEbiNkLfpHuPIw9JZ0=&emci=54715770-c30b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=856582e1-560c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)

| | Peter, This Pride Month I am evermore grateful for the events celebrating the resilience and joy of the LGBTQIA+ community. name: Rick Larsen
subject: hate and vitriol met instead with resilience and joy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
🏳️🌈🏳️⚧️
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64933372/411733952/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDA4YmNiNC01NzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xBYP3jRVQZ3e2ZogCkjb-y7VCUNNBeJmN5_2twuAto=&emci=e987646a-c10b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ad08bcb4-570c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Lately our elections, Supreme Court decisions, and MAGA Republican talking points have posed a fundamental question: Will we wind the clocks back, or will we continue to work towards the promise of liberty and justice for all? The relentless smear campaigns on the LGBTQ+ community — from drag queen story time, to damaging lies and attempted attacks on character — have to stop. They are gross misrepresentations, a distraction from important issues, and just plain dangerous. **But still, in the face of the hate and vitriol, this community remains resilient, dedicated to living their truth, spreading joy, and inspiring others along the way.** This month, as communities across the country celebrate LGBTQ+ Pride events, I am grateful to be in a position to both attend these events at home in Washington and advocate for the advancement of our LGBTQ+ friends and family in Congress. **Because of their dedication, we have made monumental progress towards equality and the advancement of human and civil rights writ large.** I will not allow the MAGA Republicans that are openly running on a platform calling to undo our progress to diminish these achievements. This Pride month, please join me in celebrating our friends and family in the LGBTQ+ community. And as we look ahead, let us continue fighting for civil and human rights for all. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: 🏳️🌈🏳️⚧️ | | | | Lately our elections, Supreme Court decisions, and MAGA Republican talking points have posed a fundamental question: Will we wind the clocks back, or will we continue to work towards the promise of liberty and justice for all? The relentless smear campaigns on the LGBTQ+ community — from drag queen story time, to damaging lies and attempted attacks on character — have to stop. They are gross misrepresentations, a distraction from important issues, and just plain dangerous. But still, in the face of the hate and vitriol, this community remains resilient, dedicated to living their truth, spreading joy, and inspiring others along the way. This month, as communities across the country celebrate LGBTQ+ Pride events, I am grateful to be in a position to both attend these events at home in Washington and advocate for the advancement of our LGBTQ+ friends and family in Congress. Because of their dedication, we have made monumental progress towards equality and the advancement of human and civil rights writ large. I will not allow the MAGA Republicans that are openly running on a platform calling to undo our progress to diminish these achievements. This Pride month, please join me in celebrating our friends and family in the LGBTQ+ community. And as we look ahead, let us continue fighting for civil and human rights for all. Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . subject: Joe Biden’s inner circle must be quaking in their boots.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The details are BREATHTAKING - but it gets even worse for Democrats.

| |
---
| | | **EXPLOSIVE BIDEN FAMILY UPDATE:
Republicans blow the lid off Biden family corruption investigation **
Buckle up... THERE ARE TAPES!

After a months-long investigation, House Republicans exposed shocking details about alleged influence peddling, shady business dealings, off-shore bank accounts, and over a dozen shell companies linked to the Biden family.

**_[The details are BREATHTAKING- but it gets even worse for Democrats.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831465:JE2BvbIdN:m:1:3299561967:CDBC4230819BE1E655539ED05F4FF5ED:r "The details are BREATHTAKING
– but it gets even worse for Democrats. ")_**

Now, Senate Republicans CONFIRMED Joe and Hunter Biden were caught on SEVENTEEN recordings that could crack the case wide open.

Joe Biden's inner circle must be quaking in their boots. Here is the latest:
---
| | | [ READ THIS BIDEN REPORT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831465:JE2BvbIdN:m:1:3299561967:CDBC4230819BE1E655539ED05F4FF5ED:r " READ THIS BIDEN REPORT")
---
| **HUNTER BIDEN: FIFTEEN AUDIO RECORDINGS**

**Subject:** Ukrainian oligarch + Joe Biden's son, Hunter Biden
**Allegation:** Confirmation of bribery scheme
**Reason Kept:** Alleged insurance policy
---
**JOE BIDEN: TWO AUDIO RECORDINGS

Subject:** Ukrainian Oligarch & then-Vice President Joe Biden
**Allegation:** Confirmation of influence peddling
**Reason Kept** : Alleged insurance policy
---
| | | [ READ THIS BIDEN REPORT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831465:JE2BvbIdN:m:1:3299561967:CDBC4230819BE1E655539ED05F4FF5ED:r " READ
THIS BIDEN REPORT")
---
With Joe Biden himself in the White House and Chuck Schumer in control of the Senate, we may never see the bottom of this bombshell investigation. But Majority Leader Steve Scalise, Oversight Chairman James Comer, and House Republicans won't stop digging - no matter how much Biden's inner circle tries to cover up the evidence.

But we have a SERIOUS problem...

The Liberal Media, House Democrats, and Joe Biden's cronies are doing everything they possibly can to attack us and discredit everything we've worked for.

Democrats know these investigations will evaporate into thin air if they take back the House. The cases will go cold. And the Biden Family can then go back to business as usual. That's why they're relentlessly attacking House Republicans and trashing our reputations.

_**[We're DESPERATELY searching America for Patriots with enough grit and determination to stand up to Democrats - and Joe Biden's inner circle - alongside us.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62831465:JE2BvbIdN:m:1:3299561967:CDBC4230819BE1E655539ED05F4FF5ED:r "We’re DESPERATELY searching America for Patriots with enough grit and determination to stand up to Democrats – and Joe
Biden’s inner circle – alongside us.")**_

**The ONLY thing that will stop us from exposing this corruption is losing our House Majority. But with your help, we will prevail. **

_Can we count on you? _

Thanks for all you do,

OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN COMMUNICATION
Sent via Team Scalise

body:
Here’s a meaningful way you can ensure we have all the tools we need to win:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64933958/411736358/-456841951?refcode=EM_FR_230616MR_TG_6_90DO_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjlmMzc4NjYtNTkwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i0jrU-QOhXfmwtntqn34WI3suc-aGQ3z2NA6KGO5buU=) Peter, we’re reaching out today with a very specific ask of you.

We’re officially counting down the weeks until our election, and we’re in an all-out sprint to get the word out to every single voter in Mississippi about why we need to elect Greta as AG.

This work takes serious resources, Peter - from things like pens, clipboards, and chargers for volunteers, to transportation to get Greta to events and constituent meetings across the state, we need to make sure we have every tool in our toolbox to get this campaign across the finish line.

Here’s where you come in, Peter. You can sign up to contribute on a monthly basis to make sure our team has solid, sustainable support to bring real change to Mississippi by ousting the politician who led the charge to overturn Roe, and instead elect a champion for the people as Mississippi’s AG. This is a truly meaningful way to support Greta’s campaign to fight for Mississippians and ensure we can win.
[You can sign up as a monthly contributor through Election Day here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64933959/411736359/-456841951?refcode=EM_FR_230616MR_TG_6_90DO_l1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjlmMzc4NjYtNTkwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i0jrU-QOhXfmwtntqn34WI3suc-aGQ3z2NA6KGO5buU=) [SIGN UP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64933960/411736360/-456841951?refcode=EM_FR_230616MR_TG_6_90DO_b1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjlmMzc4NjYtNTkwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i0jrU-QOhXfmwtntqn34WI3suc-aGQ3z2NA6KGO5buU=) We truly appreciate your support, Peter – we couldn’t do this without you!

– Team Greta | Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections in the next month, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2023 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

name: Nina Harris, Field Director for Gabe Amo for Congress
subject: Join us for Pride tomorrow in Providence! 🏳️‍🌈
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/Gabe%20Amo%20Header_V6.png]

Hi Friend,

This is Nina Harris, Field Director for Gabe Amo’s campaign for Congress. We wanted to personally invite you to join us tomorrow, June 17, for Pride [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/566489/] ! 🏳️🌈

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/FxU9DYGX0AglQX1.jpeg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/FyYNn4JX0AMfZiZ-min.jpeg]

Pride is a time to celebrate our LGBTQ+ community and all that they have accomplished. It is also a time to remember the work that still needs to be done to achieve equality for all.

You can also sign up to volunteer in other ways this weekend. Sign up to phone bank for Gabe on Thursdays & Saturdays: https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/565884/

Campaigns are never won by a candidate alone. It takes a community. Together we can make our voices heard and fight for the issues that Rhode Islanders hold dear.

Hope to see you Saturday! Feel free to reply to this email with any questions.

Best,

Nina Harris
Field Director, Gabe Amo for Congress

Gabe Amo for Congress
P.O. Box 40457
Providence, RI 02940
United States

name: Joe Vogel
subject: The skies over the Northeast last week are a wake up call!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOGEL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Joe Vogel believes the generational challenges we face call for a new generation of leadership. In Congress, Joe will continue fighting for solutions and delivering for all Marylanders. To unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/oObdowbUrk-MGxOLwsSDAw2?unsubscribedata=uiLbF7CdPLsA7992VbhHdWg%2F5Px1%2BuCEp%2FhUXWRdXMnsR%2BEJw7Z34EOohScuwlpENTTybcU%2BZbRvD7m%2FmmxyKDiu105eKlizXSyPw2XIjzkHFx9POZJNd2sVvyBXAsw03IuKM5ZZcB8%2FSz3ID1t0zIlFONkky9%2BAXfse0kwZd6GENbR16jKVS7cVlxfAgYQeIQ3noZLqotFDh1PFwevG7HqPGpc6G%2Bj2oCP7SqbAUonEQ5iXl93%2B%2B85l8nxw%2F3TlvnJsYpsFCo%2FTYr%2BBvoIfanKdJ4eIMLyLpWYpp21SMKIX35TzZs%2F3Qt8cabjnpvT322xlmFefwqUg1cSRcURWabnXlKBHYjTFyIjJznEJgQEC7T9PHvSHVtvweSFM7XBpx5AHo6pq6IVSisjjBX8Xp14CqZzFiTA4srbfjrAZFIs%3D)
---
| |
---
I’m sure you’ve seen the dystopian images circulating of the orange, ash-filled skies in New York City over the past few weeks.
We can’t allow this to become our new normal.

**The climate crisis is real and it’s here. Now.**

One of my top priorities will be investing in real climate solutions, rather than wasting hard earned taxpayer dollars by handing out tax cuts and subsidies to fossil fuel corporations.

**But first, I want to know where you stand.**

**[I’m hoping to hear from at least 750 supporters in the next 48 hours: do you think Congress needs to take bolder, more immediate action on the climate crisis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64934883/411739802/-896769152?source=EM_NBI_JV_20230615_PT_Climate_JoeVogel_NA_NA_Climate1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU4NjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmM0MTYyNmMtNWIwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFhFRCOcWQxOUgrdf6SiPW_Dr0o9HEMhAG7fCvr9Zm8=&emci=4d8e2ee8-5a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6c41626c-5b0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=503367)** | [YES!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64934887/411739804/-896769152?source=EM_NBI_JV_20230615_PT_Climate_JoeVogel_NA_NA_Climate1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU4NjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmM0MTYyNmMtNWIwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFhFRCOcWQxOUgrdf6SiPW_Dr0o9HEMhAG7fCvr9Zm8=&emci=4d8e2ee8-5a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6c41626c-5b0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=503367) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64934896/411739807/-896769152?source=EM_NBI_JV_20230615_PT_Climate_JoeVogel_NA_NA_Climate1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU4NjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmM0MTYyNmMtNWIwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFhFRCOcWQxOUgrdf6SiPW_Dr0o9HEMhAG7fCvr9Zm8=&emci=4d8e2ee8-5a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6c41626c-5b0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=503367)
---|---
We are at a critical point in time and it’s time we get serious about taking action to prevent catastrophic climate change. I believe we have a moral obligation to protect our planet and ensure that we leave behind a sustainable, livable home for my generation and future generations.

**[Should Congress act now to take bold and necessary actions to address the climate crisis before it’s too late?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64934901/411739816/-896769152?source=EM_NBI_JV_20230615_PT_Climate_JoeVogel_NA_NA_Climate1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU4NjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmM0MTYyNmMtNWIwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFhFRCOcWQxOUgrdf6SiPW_Dr0o9HEMhAG7fCvr9Zm8=&emci=4d8e2ee8-5a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6c41626c-5b0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=503367)**

clean_body: Joe Vogel believes the generational challenges we face call for a new generation of leadership. In Congress, Joe will continue fighting for solutions and delivering for all Marylanders. To unsubscribe, | | I’m sure you’ve seen the dystopian images circulating of the orange, ash-filled skies in New York City over the past few weeks. We can’t allow this to become our new normal. The climate crisis is real and it’s here. Now. One of my top priorities will be investing in real climate solutions, rather than wasting hard earned taxpayer dollars by handing out tax cuts and subsidies to fossil fuel corporations. But first, I want to know where you stand. | | ---|--- We are at a critical point in time and it’s time we get serious about taking action to prevent catastrophic climate change. I believe we have a moral obligation to protect our planet and ensure that we leave behind a sustainable, livable home for my generation and future generations. | ---|--- Thank you for standing with me, Joe * = | The generational challenges we face call for a new generation of leadership. name: The Republican Team
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLGK9CAUhZ_GdAl6dTQWFj_8TLPMVgtbirneSQRNBnVY5u2XbLH1tucczgff583fQsppX99DIddr97X5WnymNeBrLMdOr7EE3DxwkCPXo9BeDtEpA1HqgZzQs7ZKguXD5pQNFNHcwQLGJdgFL6TICjHDfDdxHpI7f7gWWlyUEXwKnHQUFLXBRZFVTPGQqfY29Y0qPZ5LThj2TqFMeJQhu633R2PyH4Mrg2sjfFaa6rE-ifDYj5KwncuzlldMkcn_t7cPI2EWwEDTb6KUEPNQXXx8pZxT04YpvpaQ8g-p_1nHdwAAAP__-5VmUg) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLGK9CAUhZ_GdAl6dTQWFj_8TLPMVgtbirneSQRNBnVY5u2XbLH1tucczgff583fQsppX99DIddr97X5WnymNeBrLMdOr7EE3DxwkCPXo9BeDtEpA1HqgZzQs7ZKguXD5pQNFNHcwQLGJdgFL6TICjHDfDdxHpI7f7gWWlyUEXwKnHQUFLXBRZFVTPGQqfY29Y0qPZ5LThj2TqFMeJQhu633R2PyH4Mrg2sjfFaa6rE-ifDYj5KwncuzlldMkcn_t7cPI2EWwEDTb6KUEPNQXXx8pZxT04YpvpaQ8g-p_1nHdwAAAP__-5VmUg) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLGK9CAUhZ_GdAl6dTQWFj_8TLPMVgtbirneSQRNBnVY5u2XbLH1tucczgff583fQsppX99DIddr97X5WnymNeBrLMdOr7EE3DxwkCPXo9BeDtEpA1HqgZzQs7ZKguXD5pQNFNHcwQLGJdgFL6TICjHDfDdxHpI7f7gWWlyUEXwKnHQUFLXBRZFVTPGQqfY29Y0qPZ5LThj2TqFMeJQhu633R2PyH4Mrg2sjfFaa6rE-ifDYj5KwncuzlldMkcn_t7cPI2EWwEDTb6KUEPNQXXx8pZxT04YpvpaQ8g-p_1nHdwAAAP__-5VmUg) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLGK9CAUhZ_GdAl6dTQWFj_8TLPMVgtbirneSQRNBnVY5u2XbLH1tucczgff583fQsppX99DIddr97X5WnymNeBrLMdOr7EE3DxwkCPXo9BeDtEpA1HqgZzQs7ZKguXD5pQNFNHcwQLGJdgFL6TICjHDfDdxHpI7f7gWWlyUEXwKnHQUFLXBRZFVTPGQqfY29Y0qPZ5LThj2TqFMeJQhu633R2PyH4Mrg2sjfFaa6rE-ifDYj5KwncuzlldMkcn_t7cPI2EWwEDTb6KUEPNQXXx8pZxT04YpvpaQ8g-p_1nHdwAAAP__-5VmUg)
---

The Republican Team
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkL1qwzAURp9G3hz05-to0BAI3tK1o7mSbmKBZBtJpuTtSzJl6ND5HL4D3_dtvmFMcX18YSbbSptLnUueEz3QP_u8rfTsM_plllyqnkMvYFZdsHqUQUFHVsAZjFbS8G6xBoMJwpm70FrxsxyU9sgHJwYwdxdUF-1rh4MAMehR8BNygiAowOidJqOZ5piotHpqCxXaD5eix7UR5pPfcpfs0tpembowOTE5bXvbjva3zOR0rPVw1Zfo6OWryTF1vWJMz_7yzjAJxNQ17D8xpVhhZHLQ_JExpnev2A_0Cdq_3_oNAAD__5eEcvA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMz71u7CAQQOGngc7W8LPDuqC4zXZ725RoDGMbCbwWJon89lFSp0h_9Enn7RmelEve1_9U2ffWQztDq6HwSvEa6mvna6gUt6BBmwFwUBiMTN46nQxK9grvOFmjJ5CbB7RO3yBN86Knu4rL7NRtsSYS0kKAMvtvB1ChulmnYCRgTIoTujhbnqywQIVbP8e-cePjfS450t6Z6hhfVRa_9X6cwvwT-iH049dK6MfR8gfFa9x6LbL5dHzmUvKJTlhYK-Xyo_U_L38FAAD__58rX_U)_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: America Is a Christian Nation
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be2335aa70554932bce17a00f7673863&_e=ybaiYZNDn8hVV5_LLFsqn3KGJRxtRRrmmd8X8B5q7zYor6TRKNlKFd9-N43HXnXO-aFbGMIbSWB74IKY8N80EdxsoPK2-QWNfiNfXyNSm9ogxL_giWD9WXiib5sm_JT3rbFdRniP9FF96Vcn46xZpxqvC8Jf_0s_q-piwi0b4rwpQdHFl1Kf3_KSV8tvFLucc1iZDWVih9iKroznW4za36UmIMCWWm0vUVKPgFL9CQoRXyMYJ8A9bf-Np0zMd5D_5-iyl31YiLZ-ZaXLdbLL-a8dPaqHfw2EqYUDNsSiXhu_VXODbxGywC7WQIma4Xw8yP8sp5ua1YiUHY8zAyP2SlhfwKUoGbx7slX5MQn7BWMs8YtrEXXZ1AmU5E-C928T4ZcXIc-0onV00geLIKZgFSw6o0vtkkwAQgKTOal-5Hg%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be2335aa70554932bce17a00f7673863&_e=ybaiYZNDn8hVV5_LLFsqn3KGJRxtRRrmmd8X8B5q7zYor6TRKNlKFd9-N43HXnXO-aFbGMIbSWB74IKY8N80EdxsoPK2-QWNfiNfXyNSm9ogxL_giWD9WXiib5sm_JT3rbFdRniP9FF96Vcn46xZpxqvC8Jf_0s_q-piwi0b4rwpQdHFl1Kf3_KSV8tvFLucc1iZDWVih9iKroznW4za36UmIMCWWm0vUVKPgFL9CQoRXyMYJ8A9bf-Np0zMd5D_5-iyl31YiLZ-ZaXLdbLL-QUcx5IHu50TC4jeovGgwIzNZhq8jM0ewgjbgc2zmt0Jr8RVaFtG7s3PLi_Tck7BI1Vbje85ENFB2tR7TtawyaVRcZER_4PPC_ctuajlRPf4mbNRUO_kwibQf5Z7g3zHuiC73TPhZllSAiSplr0DJ8o%3D)

Peter –
This week, I led the effort in Congress to debunk the false narratives from the left about the "benefits" of "transgender care" for minors. I also unveiled legislation to boost research into psychedelic treatments for our service members living with PTSD.
If you enjoy receiving my newsletters, please consider donating to my campaign. These updates, along with my entire operation, take a team of writers, editors, and content creators. I am only able to continue providing these free, regular updates with the resources provided from patriots like you. [Any amount helps, and you can help me grow our conservative movement by donating to my campaign here. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V3XKuUGQkNxXuB0v39kc4OHGRBPjDhzvkLM2-7XlM9WD-WaSaFOUoogH25DUVnvgZk52o78m8HkUwzUAsnmCJyo-yMr_GMDyRRjKriUa4hm-N2BMJKeZ11lI2iNz8y6iSTvna-4xJeRpUIFRZUD7LclnlPkEqcxGs4ztuaqt3JtMCR1s4HrFoDPkT9r17zsOQ8f_dtoB49g9rtbvYwMDdJcnBxhoxjtTn7YjGa7g_wz98uykdut8cuQfLd45sQpLrcESceY2NrHQN28F9_732U8SvMPyNQzv3rfnZaNl3N6Wf6goM-BxHNiq4YKOBcFid5OFFFlZXugcj60oxhG7pCRIM1B-oCRNvDINAdOatxc=&c=QSIJ39vue21dktKizSkAfKZZddlxyQrDU7N4HqvmL3E2_LOdP65R5A==&ch=WIf_FLJrTqOCsjr-bE5-05jul7dxP2A1oiRERd7YBmQbONTCjnGs6Q==)

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V3XKuUGQkNxXuB0v39kc4OHGRBPjDhzvkLM2-7XlM9WD-WaSaFOUoogH25DUVnvgFZp8xItJ152AVHYMNl46ArHHxsrmG77JCXB6sCMBvlr1D8Q_Xl8THeUL2XFMpNtDfZg3g139VCQrooGz22W52tYP9Tn5nqqwJhnN-5cq8rQ=&c=QSIJ39vue21dktKizSkAfKZZddlxyQrDU7N4HqvmL3E2_LOdP65R5A==&ch=WIf_FLJrTqOCsjr-bE5-05jul7dxP2A1oiRERd7YBmQbONTCjnGs6Q==)

| |

| As I told you last week, I introduced legislation that would prevent federal funding under the Graduate Medical Education program from going to children's hospitals that provide "gender affirming care" to minors. This week, my committee held a hearing on that legislation. Democrats invited a doctor from Yale to speak in opposition to my bill and in support of continuing to provide puberty blockers, hormone therapy, and even transgender surgery for minors. So I took the opportunity to confront this Democrat witness directly. You can watch the full exchange in the link above.
During the hearing, I asked the Yale doctor to name ONE clinical review citing the benefits of gender transition for minors. The entire hearing, she was citing "evidence" of the benefits of "gender affirming care," so I asked her for specifics. I asked her to name one study that pointed to the supposed benefits.
Spoiler alert: she couldn't. Why? Because there is ZERO evidence to support her ridiculous claims.
The idea that we should allow and even encourage children to permanently change their gender is a new, dangerous phenomenon. This phenomenon is sweeping across medical institutions, including at our children's hospitals. And yet there's no serious evidence of the safety or benefits of "transgender care" for minors, and no long-term studies to truly evaluate the impact this "treatment" could have decades later. None. The science is clearly not on their side for this critical issue.
The British Journal of Medicine analyzed 61 other systematic reviews and came to this conclusion: "there is great uncertainty about the effects of puberty blockers, cross-sex hormones, and surgeries in young people."
The effects of transgender care are not temporary--when doctors provide this "care" to minors, they are permanently altering the physiology of a child for the rest of their lives. The good news is the American people are not supporting this madness. According to the latest polls, nearly 70% of Americans disapprove of providing puberty blockers to minors.
Those advocating we encourage children to transition genders claim they are being "compassionate." But there is nothing compassionate about walking a child down a path from which they cannot return. It's time for adults--doctors, teachers, and political leaders--to act responsibly and stop treating our children like lab rats for the latest fad in pseudoscience.
---

| RESEARCH PSYCHEDELICS TO TREAT PTSD

| This week, I also unveiled legislation to expand research into the use of psychedelics to treat PTSD among our service members. The legislation is called the Douglas 'Mike' Day Psychedelic Therapy to Save Lives Act, named after legendary Navy SEAL Mike Day.
Mike served as a Navy SEAL for 21 years. On one mission, Mike got shot 27 times. Most people would have died from much less, but Mike kept killing the terrorists who were surrounding him and somehow made it home. When you think of a war hero, you think of Mike Day. Yet like so many other warriors, after Mike made it back home, he began an entirely different, more insidious battle with the demons that follow our service members from war. Ultimately, those demons won their battle against Mike Day, and he tragically killed himself earlier this year. Mike's personal struggle isn't an isolated case. While the estimates vary, research has found that more than 20 veterans kill themselves every day. That is unacceptable. We must do more to make progress in the fight against PTSD, including thinking of innovative solutions to treat it. That's why I'm introducing this bill to direct the Secretary of Defense to provide grants for further research into the use of psychedelics to treat PTSD.
The research is promising. Recent private sector research into the use of MDMA to treat PTSD found that 88% of trial participants had a significant reduction in symptoms and 67% no longer had PTSD. And that study isn't an outlier. The first use of MDMA assisted psychotherapy for PTSD in 2010 found that 83% of the patients given MDMA no longer met the criteria for PTSD.
And beyond the research, the testimonials of the people who've used this treatment are even more compelling. When I unveiled the bill this week, I was surrounded by former Navy SEALs and other service members who said this treatment turned them away from suicide, rescued their marriage, rescued their families and pulled them out of the depths of despair that only service members living with PTSD can describe.
The problem is that, under current law, active-duty service members suffering from PTSD must travel abroad to receive this treatment or risk losing their active-duty status if they do so. That is unacceptable.
We should allow service members to retain their active-duty status and seek this treatment within the borders of the country they were willing to die for. That's why my bill allows service members to keep their status if they participate in this treatment and directs the Defense Department to start the research that will allow us to fully study the efficacy of this innovative way to treat our service members who gave so much for our country. They deserve nothing less.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – This week, I led the effort in Congress to debunk the false narratives from the left about the "benefits" of "transgender care" for minors. I also unveiled legislation to boost research into psychedelic treatments for our service members living with PTSD. If you enjoy receiving my newsletters, please consider donating to my campaign. These updates, along with my entire operation, take a team of writers, editors, and content creators. I am only able to continue providing these free, regular updates with the resources provided from patriots like you. == As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your Campaign Brief: | | | | | | | | "NAME. ONE. STUDY." | | | == | == | | | As I told you last week, I introduced legislation that would prevent federal funding under the Graduate Medical Education program from going to children's hospitals that provide "gender affirming care" to minors. This week, my committee held a hearing on that legislation. Democrats invited a doctor from Yale to speak in opposition to my bill and in support of continuing to provide puberty blockers, hormone therapy, and even transgender surgery for minors. So I took the opportunity to confront this Democrat witness directly. You can watch the full exchange in the link above. During the hearing, I asked the Yale doctor to name ONE clinical review citing the benefits of gender transition for minors. The entire hearing, she was citing "evidence" of the benefits of "gender affirming care," so I asked her for specifics. I asked her to name one study that pointed to the supposed benefits. Spoiler alert: she couldn't. Why? Because there is ZERO evidence to support her ridiculous claims. The idea that we should allow and even encourage children to permanently change their gender is a new, dangerous phenomenon. This phenomenon is sweeping across medical institutions, including at our children's hospitals. And yet there's no serious evidence of the safety or benefits of "transgender care" for minors, and no long-term studies to truly evaluate the impact this "treatment" could have decades later. None. The science is clearly not on their side for this critical issue. The British Journal of Medicine analyzed 61 other systematic reviews and came to this conclusion: "there is great uncertainty about the effects of puberty blockers, cross-sex hormones, and surgeries in young people." The effects of transgender care are not temporary--when doctors provide this "care" to minors, they are permanently altering the physiology of a child for the rest of their lives. The good news is the American people are not supporting this madness. According to the latest polls, nearly 70% of Americans disapprove of providing puberty blockers to minors. Those advocating we encourage children to transition genders claim they are being "compassionate." But there is nothing compassionate about walking a child down a path from which they cannot return. It's time for adults--doctors, teachers, and political leaders--to act responsibly and stop treating our children like lab rats for the latest fad in pseudoscience. | | | | | | | | RESEARCH PSYCHEDELICS TO TREAT PTSD | == | == | | | This week, I also unveiled legislation to expand research into the use of psychedelics to treat PTSD among our service members. The legislation is called the Douglas 'Mike' Day Psychedelic Therapy to Save Lives Act, named after legendary Navy SEAL Mike Day. Mike served as a Navy SEAL for 21 years. On one mission, Mike got shot 27 times. Most people would have died from much less, but Mike kept killing the terrorists who were surrounding him and somehow made it home. When you think of a war hero, you think of Mike Day. Yet like so many other warriors, after Mike made it back home, he began an entirely different, more insidious battle with the demons that follow our service members from war. Ultimately, those demons won their battle against Mike Day, and he tragically killed himself earlier this year. Mike's personal struggle isn't an isolated case. While the estimates vary, research has found that more than 20 veterans kill themselves every day. That is unacceptable. We must do more to make progress in the fight against PTSD, including thinking of innovative solutions to treat it. That's why I'm introducing this bill to direct the Secretary of Defense to provide grants for further research into the use of psychedelics to treat PTSD. The research is promising. Recent private sector research into the use of MDMA to treat PTSD found that 88% of trial participants had a significant reduction in symptoms and 67% no longer had PTSD. And that study isn't an outlier. The first use of MDMA assisted psychotherapy for PTSD in 2010 found that 83% of the patients given MDMA no longer met the criteria for PTSD. And beyond the research, the testimonials of the people who've used this treatment are even more compelling. When I unveiled the bill this week, I was surrounded by former Navy SEALs and other service members who said this treatment turned them away from suicide, rescued their marriage, rescued their families and pulled them out of the depths of despair that only service members living with PTSD can describe. The problem is that, under current law, active-duty service members suffering from PTSD must travel abroad to receive this treatment or risk losing their active-duty status if they do so. That is unacceptable. We should allow service members to retain their active-duty status and seek this treatment within the borders of the country they were willing to die for. That's why my bill allows service members to keep their status if they participate in this treatment and directs the Defense Department to start the research that will allow us to fully study the efficacy of this innovative way to treat our service members who gave so much for our country. They deserve nothing less. | | | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | | | | | | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thanks for reading and your support. Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | == | If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. | | | == == == | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

Peter, it's Elissa Slotkin, the Democrat running in Michigan's OPEN Senate seat.

In 2019, President Trump won in Michigan. In 2020, President Biden won Michigan by barely 3%.

Why am I telling you this? Because we all know that Michigan is a perennial swing state - one that could very well decide the fate of the Presidency AND the Senate majority. National Republicans have already said they are going to aggressively target this seat in 2024.

My team knows what it takes to win competitive races - I've ran and won three times in a Republican-leaning district. But with election experts listing Michigan in their lists of top Senate seats to flip in 2024, we must be prepared. That's why I'm reaching out.

Raising funds early helps us plan, be strategic, and win races by bigger and bigger margins. But open seats are notoriously costly, meaning Democrats will need more money to defend this seat. As a Democrat running for this seat, I need your help.

clean_body: My team knows what it takes to win competitive races - I've ran and won three times in a Republican-leaning district. | = Peter, it's Elissa Slotkin, the Democrat running in Michigan's OPEN Senate seat. In 2019, President Trump won in Michigan. In 2020, President Biden won Michigan by barely 3%. Why am I telling you this? Because we all know that Michigan is a perennial swing state - one that could very well decide the fate of the Presidency AND the Senate majority. National Republicans have already said they are going to aggressively target this seat in 2024. My team knows what it takes to win competitive races - I've ran and won three times in a Republican-leaning district. But with election experts listing Michigan in their lists of top Senate seats to flip in 2024, we must be prepared. That's why I'm reaching out. Raising funds early helps us plan, be strategic, and win races by bigger and bigger margins. But open seats are notoriously costly, meaning Democrats will need more money to defend this seat. As a Democrat running for this seat, I need your help. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Elissa * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. body:
| | | Kids are struggling—from falling behind in school during the pandemic, to mental health challenges, to the constant fear of being gunned down, and the very real fear that the climate crisis will destroy their futures.

**_[It’s up to us to fix these problems. Future generations are counting on us. **_Original Message from Annie:_**

Practicing pediatrics, I’ve seen many things in the hospital that led me to launch Their Future PAC. From children with gunshot wounds to trans teenagers who attempted suicide because they are marginalized by adults they should be able to count on. These aren’t always stories you read on the news, but these tragic events happen in communities all across this country far too often.

And they are entirely preventable. But we need leaders who actually pass legislation that protects kids, not makes their lives harder.

At the end of the month, Their Future PAC is facing our first major Federal Election Commission (FEC) public reporting deadline since we started our organization. This is a critical opportunity to prove we’re starting in a strong place. But we need your help.

**_[Our team needs to raise $8,000 online by the end of this week to get on track for our FEC report. name: Alex-Padilla.com
subject: We can’t afford to come up short
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hey there,
We’ll get right to the point — we’re now just _over halfway_ through June, and as of this morning we’re _less than halfway_ toward our fundraising goal for the month.
This month’s fundraising goal is particularly important, because after our deadline on June 30, we’re going to report our numbers publicly — **and that means everyone from Mitch McConnell to the national media will be able to see exactly how ready we are to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
A big number of donations shows that we’re fired up and prepared to grow our majority... but a small number of donations sends the opposite message, and signals to the GOP that we won’t have the resources to organize across California and across the country.
**With so many eyes on us, we can’t afford to come up short. Not with control of the Senate at stake. So please:**
[**Make a donation today to help us catch up ahead of our important FEC deadline. The amount doesn’t matter as much as the donation itself, because we’re counting on lots of individual donations from people like you to hit our goals.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23.Jo0i-7&refcode=em230616-1-30&t=1&akid=1351%2E159979%2Edh-00N)
Thank you so much. It means the world to Alex to know you’ve got his back.
\- Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1351%2E159979%2Edh-00N)

Dear Friend,

Last weekend, a group of Believers gathered in the Rotunda of the U.S. Capitol. We praised, worshiped, and prayed a blessing over our great nation. Apparently, though unsurprisingly, the church of satan took exception to that. God's powerful movement through the Let Us Worship revivals caused these satanists to lash out and mock our movement.

The satanists are launching their own "tour," mockingly called, "Let Us Burn." We know the enemy "prowls around like a roaring lion looking for someone to devour." But Jesus gives _**LIFE**_ , and we will continue to point people to _**HIM**_ , the one who _**SAVES**_ , not _**DESTROYS**_. _The enemy wants to see the world burn— we want to see the world**WORSHIP**!!!_

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I have a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, the path to retaking control of the House and defending our Senate majority runs directly through New York state.
Last year, New York was one of the only places in the country to see a red wave materialize. And when all the votes were counted, the four seats that the GOP picked up here were enough to help give Kevin McCarthy control of the House. It was the best election cycle for Republicans here in decades.
Now, they're gearing up to expand on their victories in 2024. And we have to get to work right now if we want to have any chance of stopping them.
That's why I'm teaming up with Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Gov. Kathy Hochul and the New York Democrats to launch the New York Democratic Majority Fund. I'm incredibly excited about this partnership, so I've launched a 24-hour, $20,000 goal to start our June fundraising off on a strong foot.

**[_Please, friend, I'm counting on reliable, strong Democrats like you to stand with me and fight for our House and Senate majorities. Will you rush $5 or more before my midnight deadline tonight?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64936891/411747654/-1970126955?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4194-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU2NzI4OC01ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWgW5uWM9z_PUBsRwi8B1EgShJX1wL6Czdj-unJuDDM=)**

Democrats only need to win **[_five seats_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64936896/411747659/-1970126955?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4194-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU2NzI4OC01ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWgW5uWM9z_PUBsRwi8B1EgShJX1wL6Czdj-unJuDDM=)** to retake control of the House. **[_Four_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64936897/411747660/-1970126955?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4194-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU2NzI4OC01ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWgW5uWM9z_PUBsRwi8B1EgShJX1wL6Czdj-unJuDDM=)** of the GOP-held seats that we're targeting here in New York came down to less than 2 points in 2022. And **[_six_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64936898/411747661/-1970126955?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4194-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU2NzI4OC01ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWgW5uWM9z_PUBsRwi8B1EgShJX1wL6Czdj-unJuDDM=)** are GOP districts that President Biden won in 2020. We can retake control of the House right here in New York. But _only_ if we lay the groundwork for a coordinated, effective campaign.
That means knocking doors, registering voters, hiring an incredible campaign team and hitting every single one of our grassroots goals. We can't wait until next fall or even next year to start this work. To regain the momentum advantage, we have to start _now._ And that's exactly what the New York Democratic Majority Fund will allow us to do.
This fundraising partnership will allow us to hire **regional directors** in battleground regions like Long Island, Westchester County and the Hudson Valley and **outreach directors** who can build inroads with key constituencies. It'll allow us to **recruit and train thousands of volunteers** to turn out voters on Election Day. And it will help us build the infrastructure for long-term, sustainable organizing that will **keep New York blue for generations to come.**
As the only statewide Democrat at the top of the ticket next year, I'm taking my responsibility in this fight very seriously. The kind of campaign that we run will directly impact these crucial down-ballot races. **[_That's why I've launched the New York Democratic Majority Fund. And it's why I'm asking people like you to join me in this fight by making a donation before my 24-hour deadline at midnight tonight. Please, will you rush a gift now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64936899/411747662/-1970126955?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4194-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU2NzI4OC01ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWgW5uWM9z_PUBsRwi8B1EgShJX1wL6Czdj-unJuDDM=)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, the path to retaking control of the House and defending our Senate majority runs directly through New York state. Last year, New York was one of the only places in the country to see a red wave materialize. And when all the votes were counted, the four seats that the GOP picked up here were enough to help give Kevin McCarthy control of the House. It was the best election cycle for Republicans here in decades. Now, they're gearing up to expand on their victories in 2024. And we have to get to work right now if we want to have any chance of stopping them. That's why I'm teaming up with Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Gov. Kathy Hochul and the New York Democrats to launch the New York Democratic Majority Fund. I'm incredibly excited about this partnership, so I've launched a 24-hour, $20,000 goal to start our June fundraising off on a strong foot. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to New York Majority Fund will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Democrats only need to win = to retake control of the House. = of the GOP-held seats that we're targeting here in New York came down to less than 2 points in 2022. And = are GOP districts that President Biden won in 2020. We can retake control of the House right here in New York. But only if we lay the groundwork for a coordinated, effective campaign. That means knocking doors, registering voters, hiring an incredible campaign team and hitting every single one of our grassroots goals. We can't wait until next fall or even next year to start this work. To regain the momentum advantage, we have to start now. And that's exactly what the New York Democratic Majority Fund will allow us to do. This fundraising partnership will allow us to hire regional directors in battleground regions like Long Island, Westchester County and the Hudson Valley and outreach directors who can build inroads with key constituencies. It'll allow us to recruit and train thousands of volunteers to turn out voters on Election Day. And it will help us build the infrastructure for long-term, sustainable organizing that will keep New York blue for generations to come. As the only statewide Democrat at the top of the ticket next year, I'm taking my responsibility in this fight very seriously. The kind of campaign that we run will directly impact these crucial down-ballot races. = | | = Thank you, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. body:
Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of these facts.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cfb402a88094212b68c71165f1d391f&_e=qVKc9oOBbjYsCgFbhzdYpRxSKjbVO0Yd0ynMgno-9UOU2Qp0XlLaxpgC3M59meIrrytN4lp0XYwHt4SOiB0WpMMnTwZugWICJ4vBiH5-51U0uFOTmpJlQxMWBh_LgivYqeybVOUI8oq0FqhZtawv-S9TwWTBNZXVubOeneWtU_UX4SzYbSPD974zU08ZxZ8-7hXSUs4ngqew4K_sYydh8yENUy4to_2jj5CNTKOz2j8G6xGpRnQHLtnK7Ap3LckOvMJhS2l3_xJr6XLUhGOWuWK2dQhdiEye_S0Q9W8hAprSu9EESt68u46ns4QwDMb_KYgeluUdBHnpx87P6p9-lEKzY8En0AnRHdiI9I-PVRwTuMqM4uIunDT2B3AMnFbunIfYMN64YQDeNLiS8AEbIg%3D%3D)

Friend,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cfb402a88094212b68c71165f1d391f&_e=qVKc9oOBbjYsCgFbhzdYpRxSKjbVO0Yd0ynMgno-9UOU2Qp0XlLaxpgC3M59meIrrytN4lp0XYwHt4SOiB0WpMMnTwZugWICJ4vBiH5-51U0uFOTmpJlQxMWBh_LgivYqeybVOUI8oq0FqhZtawv-S9TwWTBNZXVubOeneWtU_UX4SzYbSPD974zU08ZxZ8-7hXSUs4ngqew4K_sYydh8yENUy4to_2jj5CNTKOz2j8OLLtpSuC8icc5kfgKTRILgHTNcaOjlvw1F34Ml--Ew_hwa_1gQlNh3N81KXTG453qEuI0XUpBXPJFG4yA6GtKJy2xs9bPQafzdV5fKb3qwlSeYEU5gfzSzaRU5Ij-Hzcx1C_sjNV4EiqTygfMSccSpp8Ofldvq1a_zWK3fP4yzQ%3D%3D)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cfb402a88094212b68c71165f1d391f&_e=qVKc9oOBbjYsCgFbhzdYpRxSKjbVO0Yd0ynMgno-9UOU2Qp0XlLaxpgC3M59meIrrytN4lp0XYwHt4SOiB0WpMMnTwZugWICJ4vBiH5-51U0uFOTmpJlQxMWBh_LgivYqeybVOUI8oq0FqhZtawv-S9TwWTBNZXVubOeneWtU_UX4SzYbSPD974zU08ZxZ8-7hXSUs4ngqew4K_sYydh8yENUy4to_2jj5CNTKOz2j-fU7dZG_Y8JIDCdw9n2U6suCJ-K7JswLn47WvH85LzXK582V-wWsoyk31ZRpOGYFao-BQiim5-7iJ4TTJTt8PJSyePypyqV6s5ChB6tKqQz1nLXZfIoquzovABZ_qyiJrfhoy9NGFESRDFsCwYlw3wX9nZbZoz9OpjT0pLFm_J9w%3D%3D)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cfb402a88094212b68c71165f1d391f&_e=qVKc9oOBbjYsCgFbhzdYpRxSKjbVO0Yd0ynMgno-9UOU2Qp0XlLaxpgC3M59meIrrytN4lp0XYwHt4SOiB0WpMMnTwZugWICJ4vBiH5-51U0uFOTmpJlQxMWBh_LgivYqeybVOUI8oq0FqhZtawv-S9TwWTBNZXVubOeneWtU_UX4SzYbSPD974zU08ZxZ8-7hXSUs4ngqew4K_sYydh8yENUy4to_2jj5CNTKOz2j__IfqAcFmcatwWMBqk23_q8hyK8QntcpJ9EOHelDatYcVqZj_bVrBNARsfB4Bcfco_9GdN7zjdncM62m9teCpV2ffjfIcyWcfu0UZWyiPOgWRoWmTK2bGnWS0mY_kp_VMA_qAMo6Gd4cE55oudfxkK8XtUQUSafPd5pDQDiAo-7g%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cfb402a88094212b68c71165f1d391f&_e=qVKc9oOBbjYsCgFbhzdYpRxSKjbVO0Yd0ynMgno-9UOU2Qp0XlLaxpgC3M59meIrrytN4lp0XYwHt4SOiB0WpMMnTwZugWICJ4vBiH5-51U0uFOTmpJlQxMWBh_LgivYqeybVOUI8oq0FqhZtawv-S9TwWTBNZXVubOeneWtU_UX4SzYbSPD974zU08ZxZ8-7hXSUs4ngqew4K_sYydh8yENUy4to_2jj5CNTKOz2j_CXTjkRASxAO4ybh99pq67nVl-iivamqXeugZAgrRFWkTA3yrscdSBLXMavlUCZA-b_9RAjO9k7r-pEKZCMNbU8yyir6Hr58E61mNNM-OaB8ySQZ8H7qpcXQZHlERxW6M_su4z3dixttFPzUBI72iMkSSqGdQPUB8EVJyWp6g5-Q%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cfb402a88094212b68c71165f1d391f&_e=qVKc9oOBbjYsCgFbhzdYpRxSKjbVO0Yd0ynMgno-9UOU2Qp0XlLaxpgC3M59meIrrytN4lp0XYwHt4SOiB0WpMMnTwZugWICJ4vBiH5-51U0uFOTmpJlQxMWBh_LgivYqeybVOUI8oq0FqhZtawv-S9TwWTBNZXVubOeneWtU_UX4SzYbSPD974zU08ZxZ8-7hXSUs4ngqew4K_sYydh8yENUy4to_2jj5CNTKOz2j9UksOtq26fNGAZGzHNXCWLHCLJo_AYMGACpozCXwSlpD5vGCReYbTEN0J1eJ4iexTlqhX2HHuQyasiq5UrV8MQHvv5zfbt4Hs_IeHh1JH0VpLPoxQ25vFU0VXRJK_HwGV_fOCtCRVYOXddBS3xVw3V7oeebPkqIKAiEvkSFH-QTw%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cfb402a88094212b68c71165f1d391f&_e=qVKc9oOBbjYsCgFbhzdYpRxSKjbVO0Yd0ynMgno-9UOU2Qp0XlLaxpgC3M59meIrrytN4lp0XYwHt4SOiB0WpMMnTwZugWICJ4vBiH5-51U0uFOTmpJlQxMWBh_LgivYqeybVOUI8oq0FqhZtawv-S9TwWTBNZXVubOeneWtU_UX4SzYbSPD974zU08ZxZ8-7hXSUs4ngqew4K_sYydh8yENUy4to_2jj5CNTKOz2j86Y6NkSwnZwEdr0vNWACOC3i5ik9iunPlNOfBx4DpFaaIO-yejTv811xwicDlVBVgxZMbKEVT84U1JTEHAkV2_xmWgDIfS3BtidcgOanky61AAKySX-VXMJ9jo77E7RRFcgoeBO74uFy-AboflUorRfNNVc5p4Q_MrV0AQhlhN5w%3D%3D)

I *think* you know him — lifelong Pennsylvanian + 1⁄2 of the iconic Senate duo from the Commonwealth.
Throughout my run for Senate, Bob was there to support my campaign. When Republicans attacked me + my values, Bob always had my back.
Now, Republicans are attacking Bob + are preparing to spend millions to try to unseat him. But I’ll keep repeating: **Pennsylvania is not for sale.** I have Bob’s back, too.
That’s why we need as many folks as possible to chip in what they can to support Bob. Republicans are willing to spend millions of dark money and we need to be prepared to fight back.

subject: THE MOMENT THAT CHANGED HISTORY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
See for yourself:
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX-NfLORR7IkH3zoVoRCIIdC2c0paKVxMoskG1tuuv--OGT3-r3H8D7GpTnS-Dkw_cIAbhRWBsDEDwZwlC9vJ3V8Pdr69dwttVWdvO8p_GQA5XPG7-rzSoPJUdyptlUYwBvwvsKhVUb1AkzfVbdhHLVHxSWX2HvzLp3hndbIHfdjaGVX0QAcBFetahWYtm1aqbt-BG_aVgaEkUl-p9yEKbsYPsqypbnxU6ricCtlXh-TDgwOK_ptweZOecGwN3bm_mLtEi7kXf0xUS71uOWwOFopX2s_pUSlIDI4ZB9dQGNMb_i77p0CycRhK-mSMNCWmLBPX7XDddoWj0xYTxf3ZN6l2dE1M2G_nL6SKRfMhQnbC80ZqEuOFJiwSfz7_edXBswP-PiIsPztfFp1PJ-qZQjznWKkVWkm-XVfsLv9DwAA__8i6I0y)

Friend,
Today marks the 8-year anniversary of the moment that forever changed the trajectory of American history.
This is the moment I’m talking about:
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUFv4yAQhX8NvjkyA8Zw8GG7KKoUbY5tc4oojJOpAFs2Xqv_fuUo3ev3nkbv07g0RRq-e9a9MIA7hYUBMPGLAZzky8dZnd5Ptn6_tHNtVSu3PYXfDKB8T_i_-rxywOQo7rSzVejBa_C-wp4rrYwAbdrq3mvJW2x5K7XrpDQKkHsF3g_GSPU5DBX10IBoFFdcgeb8wGXXmgG85lwGhIHJZqN8CGN2MXyVeU3TwY-piv29lGl5TDoyOC7o1xkPG-UZw97YmfuLtUs4k3f110i51MOaw-xooXyr_ZgSlYLI4Jh9dAG11kY3n51xCiQTx7Wka8JAa2LCPn3VDpdxnT0yYT1d3ZN5lyZHt8yE_XH6ScZcMBcmrBFdw0Bdc6TAhD2__pHh9U28bQ_4-IiwzcflvHTxcq7mPkwbxUiL6phsbvuC3e1fAAAA__9jkYxW)
---
8 years ago, I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my candidacy as a political outsider committed to restoring power to **YOU** , the American people.
This was the moment that We The People REFUSED to be led by the Washington Uniparty of Marxists, RINOs, and globalists who _never_ had your interests at heart.
_**The Fake News mocked us.**_
_**The pollsters said we had no path to victory.**_
_**The New York Times gave Crooked Hillary a 99% chance of winning.**_
_**The so-called “experts” said we had ZERO CHANCE.**_
But YOU didn’t give up...
...And honestly, how _could_ you give up? We could never give up on America.
And when our many haters and doubters said that it would be “IMPOSSIBLE” to run a campaign without funding from the globalist special interests, I said, “WATCH ME!”...
...I decided that I would run the FIRST-EVER PRESIDENTIAL CAMPAIGN powered by the greatest and most powerful force in the nation: **_America’s grassroots donors._**
_We didn’t have a George Soros – and I sure as hell didn’t want one._
Because when a shadowy left-wing globalist writes you a check, he expects you to sell your soul and your nation in return.
But instead of Soros, we had MILLIONS of donors like you, giving $1, $5, $25, $50...
_Now,_ the single most vicious attack has been hurled at our movement. The Department of Justice is trying to unlawfully take down our movement in federal court, because they can’t beat us at the ballot box.
**[On our 8-year anniversary, please make a grassroots contribution of _even just $1_ to send a powerful message to the ruling class that our movement is UNBREAKABLE and that we WILL NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kTGP4yAQhX8N7mzBgDEULi6H0kRKm2SbiAWczAqwZeOz9t-fHGW3_d7T6H0am6aIw3dPugMBeKJfCADhfwjASRyuZ3m6nEx9ubVzbWQrtj2FvwSgfE_ht_q-0oRkMe60M5XvwSlwrgo9k0pqDkq31bNnTrdDEK3wlmrdtqAZ9ZoDWOGEClBhDxQ4lUwyCYqxhomu1QM4xZjwAQYi6Ia58WO20X-VeU1T48ZUxf5ZyrS8Jh0JHJfg1jk0G-Y5-L2xM_sv1DaFGZ2tv0bMpR7W7GeLC-ZH7caUsJQQCByzi9YHpZRW9LPTVoIg_LiWdE_B45oIN29fucNlXGcXCDcO7_bNnE2TxUcm3Pw4_SRjLiEXwo3mHSUg7zmiJ9zwq-s-Pg6f4vKCr49wQ6-389LF27maez9tGCMusiOCPvYFu9v_AAAA__8bQYwF)**

clean_body: See for yourself: | | | Friend, Today marks the 8-year anniversary of the moment that forever changed the trajectory of American history. This is the moment I’m talking about: | 8 years ago, I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my candidacy as a political outsider committed to restoring power to YOU , the American people. This was the moment that We The People REFUSED to be led by the Washington Uniparty of Marxists, RINOs, and globalists who never had your interests at heart. The Fake News mocked us. The pollsters said we had no path to victory. The New York Times gave Crooked Hillary a 99% chance of winning. The so-called “experts” said we had ZERO CHANCE. But YOU didn’t give up... ...And honestly, how could you give up? We could never give up on America. And when our many haters and doubters said that it would be “IMPOSSIBLE” to run a campaign without funding from the globalist special interests, I said, “WATCH ME!”... ...I decided that I would run the FIRST-EVER PRESIDENTIAL CAMPAIGN powered by the greatest and most powerful force in the nation: America’s grassroots donors. We didn’t have a George Soros – and I sure as hell didn’t want one. Because when a shadowy left-wing globalist writes you a check, he expects you to sell your soul and your nation in return. But instead of Soros, we had MILLIONS of donors like you, giving $1, $5, $25, $50... Now, the single most vicious attack has been hurled at our movement. The Department of Justice is trying to unlawfully take down our movement in federal court, because they can’t beat us at the ballot box. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
