name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Five reasons for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
There aren’t that many stories like mine in Congress.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938068/411752152/395464674?refcode=email_061623_5reasons&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk3ODVlMS02MjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XD9Dy7rsFSVgDLXI19QaiXA4KtDQFWDOY76mUa3IIww=) **** Team — With only two weeks to go until the FEC’s quarterly fundraising deadline, we’ve got a lot of work to do if we’re going to hit our benchmarks. **So my team has set an ambitious goal: 250 contributions of any amount between now and 6/30. If you already know you’re with us and ready to be one of those contributors (THANK YOU!) here is a link to pitch in: [secure.actblue.com/donate/june-bp-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938070/411752153/-1140694937?refcode=email_061623_5reasons&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk3ODVlMS02MjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XD9Dy7rsFSVgDLXI19QaiXA4KtDQFWDOY76mUa3IIww=)** But if you’re not yet convinced, and need some more information about why this fight, right here, right now, is so important, then here are five reasons I’m asking for your support today: **1) There aren’t that many stories like mine in Congress.** To put myself through school, I waited tables, worked registers, served drinks — whatever it took to make ends meet and make my tuition payments. And I’m fighting hard every day in Congress for the regular people whose needs so often go overlooked in favor of special interests. **2) I will always do everything I possibly can to protect your civil rights.** Whether it’s the right to an abortion, the right to vote, the right to be free from discrimination regardless of who you are or who you love — I will always stand up for Americans’ fundamental freedoms. **3) Despite the challenges, I’m still working to make bipartisan progress.** I will never go against our fundamental values, but there are still opportunities to get important things done. In my first six months on the job, I’ve put forward bipartisan legislation to tackle the opioid epidemic, improve mental health services in schools, and help Colorado families struggling with rising costs. **4) Right-wing super PACs tried hard to defeat me last year — and they’re going to try just as hard to stop me from getting re-elected.** The attacks we can expect are as vicious and personal as it gets, and we need the resources ahead of time to fight back and get the truth out. **5) This is a must-win seat if we’re going to retake our House Majority and stop Kevin McCarthy from serving another term as Speaker.** McCarthy hasn’t just put forward a horrendous policy agenda — he’s empowered extremists like Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene. Taking House control away from McCarthy means taking it away from all the extremists he spends his days catering to. **Team, if I’ve convinced you that this campaign matters, then I need your support today to put us on a path to victory — because unlike others, I can’t write myself a giant check, and I don’t cater to corporate special interests.** **[So can you pitch in $5 — or any amount that works for you — to help us catch up to our fundraising goal? Every single dollar goes such a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938073/411752154/395464674?refcode=email_061623_5reasons&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk3ODVlMS02MjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XD9Dy7rsFSVgDLXI19QaiXA4KtDQFWDOY76mUa3IIww=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938074/411752155/-1140694937?refcode=email_061623_5reasons&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk3ODVlMS02MjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XD9Dy7rsFSVgDLXI19QaiXA4KtDQFWDOY76mUa3IIww=)

name: Steny Hoyer
subject: Proud to endorse Angela Alsobrooks as Maryland’s next U.S. Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
Dear Peter,

I’m proud to officially announce my endorsement of County Executive Angela
Alsobrooks to become Maryland’s next U.S. Senator in 2024.

Angela’s track record of exceptional, effective leadership in Prince
George’s County gives me full confidence that she is the most qualified
candidate to fight for a strong, equitable, and prosperous future for all
Marylanders.

That’s why I’m committed to doing everything in my power to help Angela
win Maryland’s upcoming Senate race—and why I’m personally reaching out
today to ask for your help.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2436?t=1009&amount=10&akid=152%2E52803%2E-OXf_c ]Please, Peter, will you join me in supporting Angela
Alsobrooks for Senate by contributing $10 or $25 to her campaign right
away? Maryland deserves a leader we can be proud of—but first, we must
support Angela’s bid for Senate with all of our might.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2436?t=1010&amount=25&akid=152%2E52803%2E-OXf_c ]Donate Now!

Early investments will be crucial in a Senate race as competitive as this
one, Peter.

That’s why I’m asking for your support now,
Peter. Not next year, or next
month, but today, as Angela begins one of the most consequential campaigns
in Maryland’s storied history.

Angela needs an army of small-dollar, grassroots supporters behind her
from the start to compete and—ultimately—win this Senate seat.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2436?t=1011&amount=10&akid=152%2E52803%2E-OXf_c ]So please, join me by supporting Angela’s bid for Senate by donating
$10, $25 or whatever amount you can manage right now. Together, we will
build on our progress and help Marylanders thrive.

clean_body: Dear Peter, I’m proud to officially announce my endorsement of County Executive Angela Alsobrooks to become Maryland’s next U.S. Senator in 2024. Angela’s track record of exceptional, effective leadership in Prince George’s County gives me full confidence that she is the most qualified candidate to fight for a strong, equitable, and prosperous future for all Marylanders. That’s why I’m committed to doing everything in my power to help Angela win Maryland’s upcoming Senate race—and why I’m personally reaching out today to ask for your help. [ ]Please, Peter, will you join me in supporting Angela Alsobrooks for Senate by contributing $10 or $25 to her campaign right away? Maryland deserves a leader we can be proud of—but first, we must support Angela’s bid for Senate with all of our might. [ ]Donate Now! Early investments will be crucial in a Senate race as competitive as this one, Peter. That’s why I’m asking for your support now, Peter. Not next year, or next month, but today, as Angela begins one of the most consequential campaigns in Maryland’s storied history. Angela needs an army of small-dollar, grassroots supporters behind her from the start to compete and—ultimately—win this Senate seat. [ ]So please, join me by supporting Angela’s bid for Senate by donating $10, $25 or whatever amount you can manage right now. Together, we will build on our progress and help Marylanders thrive. name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Have we met yet, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Peter,
Hi, I’m Sen. Heidi Campbell and I'm running to be Nashville’s next mayor.
Peter, whether you've been following me since I was Mayor of Oak Hill or whether you’re meeting me for the first time today, my mission is the same:
I’m committed to fostering inclusive, safe spaces for our community and putting Music City first.
I'd like to tell you a little more about myself, but I understand if you can't stay and read the whole thing. Before you go, I'm relying on grassroots support to get us past the primary election – can I count on you to chip in any amount today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Peter, I’m not your typical politician. I’m a mom, singer/songwriter, and community advocate above all else.
When a big developer in Oak Hill announced that he intended to lobby city hall to turn a beloved residential green space into another strip mall, I led the charge to protect the neighborhood – we won.
When the Oak Hill city budget needed to be tightened and measures needed to be cost-cut, I decreased my own pay so that critical municipal services could continue.
Ever since then, I've organized in my community and even represented us in the Tennessee State Senate.
Peter, Nashville has been running like an instrument out of tune for a while now. I have the proven experience to get in there, tune it up, and have the whole band performing at a perfect pitch.
But I can’t do that without a broad community coalition behind me. Peter, this movement to put Nashville first will take a solid foundation of early grassroots support – can our team count on your support? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
With gratitude,
Heidi [http://voteheidicampbell.com/policy-book]
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230616_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Colin Allred
subject: Peter, this race is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.

I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938177/411752681/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230616_FR_MMFR.1.4_0_6MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_mmfr.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmJjNDQwNy02MzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OIX--Ov9AKLIeI7WeGstqFrGAggGwXx6_IUwrRfj_PM=)
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938180/411752683/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230616_FR_MMFR.1.4_0_6MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_mmfr.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmJjNDQwNy02MzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OIX--Ov9AKLIeI7WeGstqFrGAggGwXx6_IUwrRfj_PM=)
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights.

I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and Brown voters.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938182/411752686/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230616_FR_MMFR.1.4_0_6MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_mmfr.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmJjNDQwNy02MzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OIX--Ov9AKLIeI7WeGstqFrGAggGwXx6_IUwrRfj_PM=)
**It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help._[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Democrats Win Seats today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938184/411752688/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230616_FR_MMFR.1.4_0_6MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_mmfr.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmJjNDQwNy02MzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OIX--Ov9AKLIeI7WeGstqFrGAggGwXx6_IUwrRfj_PM=)_**

We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.

**Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. But I’ve learned that even the most difficult task can be accomplished with the right team and the right plan of action. if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, we can get this done but I need you with me.

_[So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Democrats Win Seats to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938187/411752691/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230616_FR_MMFR.1.4_0_6MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_mmfr.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmJjNDQwNy02MzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OIX--Ov9AKLIeI7WeGstqFrGAggGwXx6_IUwrRfj_PM=)_**

Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.

Colin Allred

**[Team, in just a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of my campaign to be Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938256/411752907/-414306994?refcode=email_061623_foundingdonor_t3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGZlZDUyYS02MzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3zD3vrfjyu__WRTaAHN0b3vpLaQl8-adB0H-52115g=)** **But first, let me explain why:**

I was born and raised in Pittsburgh. Growing up, my family was working class. My parents owned a restaurant, and worked day in and day out to put food on the table and a roof over our heads.

Like so many, we faced challenges. When I wasn’t bussing tables, I umpired little league games and worked as a janitor to pay for college.

I see my family in the folks I meet across our commonwealth – waiters, janitors, teachers, nurses, and others. I also see a system that’s stacked against them by the powerful and well-connected.

The people I grew up and worked with simply wanted a fair shake.

That’s why I’ve dedicated my career to tirelessly fighting for working people, our most vulnerable, and the people who never seem to get ahead in this economy. I know people are struggling, I understand the challenges they face every day. I pledge to fight every day to make sure their voices are heard and be someone they can count on to have their back.

That’s what I did as a state legislator from York, as Pennsylvania’s two-term Auditor General, and it’s what I’ll do as your next Attorney General.

In recent years, we’ve seen too many people elected to office who forget about the people they’re supposed to serve.

They’re self-interested–protecting the rights and privileges of their donors instead of bettering the lives of every-day Pennsylvanians.

_That’s not who I am._

Throughout my career, I’ve fought to make a real difference in the lives of all Pennsylvanians.

I cracked down on waste, fraud and abuse–recovering over $1 billion in misused taxpayer funds. I fought to reduce the backlog of nearly 3,000 untested rape kits and brought sexual predators to justice. I exposed 58,000 unanswered phone calls at the child abuse hotline and demanded improvements to our child protection services. I went after millions in wasteful spending in our charter school system and got more resources for our students and teachers. And I used every tool at my disposal to protect every Pennsylvania’s right to vote.

Those fights weren’t easy. Even when members of my own party told me to give up, I never backed down. I don’t shy away from tough fights and I will always stand up for those I serve.

I'm proud of what we've accomplished together, and as your next Attorney General, I will continue to root out waste, fraud and abuse, hold the powerful accountable, and protect our workers, seniors, and every Pennsylvanian just looking for a fair shake. But I can’t do this on my own.
[**This will be an extremely competitive election and right-wing extremists want to flip this seat. If we’re going to win, we need to build a grassroots campaign in every corner of the Commonwealth. Can I count on you to be a Founding Donor by making a donation today? →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64938273/411752924/-414306994?refcode=email_061623_foundingdonor_t3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGZlZDUyYS02MzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3zD3vrfjyu__WRTaAHN0b3vpLaQl8-adB0H-52115g=)

I see my family in the folks I meet across our commonwealth – waiters, janitors, teachers, nurses, and others. I also see a system that’s stacked against them by the powerful and well-connected. The people I grew up and worked with simply wanted a fair shake. That’s why I’ve dedicated my career to tirelessly fighting for working people, our most vulnerable, and the people who never seem to get ahead in this economy. I know people are struggling, I understand the challenges they face every day. I pledge to fight every day to make sure their voices are heard and be someone they can count on to have their back. name: Julia DeGraw
subject: FWD: Important climate votes coming up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Hi Peter, A couple of walkout Republican lawmakers returned to work yesterday, so I expect things to move very quickly until the end of session. Although the vote for HB 3630 of the Climate Resilience Package passed the House on Wednesday, the vote for HB 3409 has been delayed to early next week. [**Will you write to your lawmakers today urging them to vote YES on HB 3409 of the Climate Resilience Package?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64938653/411754288/511841315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNWM0MWE3LTY0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT5dJa2LvXqoJzkb40O54AKfTCHRsD4Yxnb61QSFQ1c=&emci=76ccfdca-5c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=915c41a7-640c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) HB 3409 contains significant climate bills, including our priorities the Resilient, Efficient Buildings package (SB 868-871) and the Natural Climate Solutions bill (SB 530). HB 3409 was strategically crafted to leverage unprecedented federal funding for climate and clean energy. **It will be vital to harnessing and translating these federal investments into meaningful near-term benefits for Oregon families, workers, and local economies, and it will ensure an equitable transition to a clean energy future for our state.** Big polluters are trying to use the delayed vote on this bill to do whatever they can to sabotage it in the final days, and we can’t let that happen. [**Please email your lawmakers today urging them to vote YES on this bill. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64938654/411754289/511841315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNWM0MWE3LTY0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT5dJa2LvXqoJzkb40O54AKfTCHRsD4Yxnb61QSFQ1c=&emci=76ccfdca-5c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=915c41a7-640c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Thank you for all that you do,
Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64938655/411754290/511841315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNWM0MWE3LTY0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT5dJa2LvXqoJzkb40O54AKfTCHRsD4Yxnb61QSFQ1c=&emci=76ccfdca-5c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=915c41a7-640c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, Some of our Priorities for a Healthy Oregon are joining forces with more than a dozen game-changing bills to form the most comprehensive climate action package in Oregon history: the new, bipartisan Climate Resilience Package (HB 3409 and HB 3630). The House is scheduled to vote on this package today and tomorrow. [**Can we count on you to take action now and urge your lawmakers to vote YES on the Climate Resilience Package?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64938656/411754291/1274810701?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNWM0MWE3LTY0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT5dJa2LvXqoJzkb40O54AKfTCHRsD4Yxnb61QSFQ1c=&emci=76ccfdca-5c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=915c41a7-640c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The Climate Resilience Package (HB 3409 and HB 3630) is a combination of almost 20 bills to reduce climate and air pollution; support healthy, affordable, resilient communities; and create family-wage jobs across Oregon. **Two of our priorities** , the Resilient Efficient Buildings package (SB 868-871) and the Natural Climate Solutions bill (SB 530), **are part of this new package that will invest $100 million to bring home 10 times that—up to $1 billion in federal funding to Oregonians.** This new package offers real hope — that’s why it already has the support of lawmakers on both sides of the aisle. We all know that the climate crisis demands bold and broad action, and we’re so grateful for everything you have done to hold strong and advance meaningful climate action so far this session. [**But we need your continued support as we push to make sure this package is a top priority for our lawmakers in their final days of work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64938657/411754292/1274810701?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNWM0MWE3LTY0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT5dJa2LvXqoJzkb40O54AKfTCHRsD4Yxnb61QSFQ1c=&emci=76ccfdca-5c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=915c41a7-640c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) We can’t afford to miss out on this once-in-a-generation opportunity to address the climate crisis. Lawmakers must act urgently to tackle Oregon’s second largest source of climate pollution — our homes and buildings — and take advantage of historic federal funding. If they don’t, Oregon won’t just leave billions of federal dollars on the table, we will leave Oregonians — especially frontline communities — vulnerable to the worsening effect of the climate crisis. And we can’t let that happen. [**Please write to your lawmakers today asking them to vote YES on the Climate Resilience package.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64938658/411754293/1274810701?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNWM0MWE3LTY0MGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT5dJa2LvXqoJzkb40O54AKfTCHRsD4Yxnb61QSFQ1c=&emci=76ccfdca-5c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=915c41a7-640c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) In partnership,
Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, A couple of walkout Republican lawmakers returned to work yesterday, so I expect things to move very quickly until the end of session. Although the vote for HB 3630 of the Climate Resilience Package passed the House on Wednesday, the vote for HB 3409 has been delayed to early next week. HB 3409 contains significant climate bills, including our priorities the Resilient, Efficient Buildings package (SB 868-871) and the Natural Climate Solutions bill (SB 530). HB 3409 was strategically crafted to leverage unprecedented federal funding for climate and clean energy. It will be vital to harnessing and translating these federal investments into meaningful near-term benefits for Oregon families, workers, and local economies, and it will ensure an equitable transition to a clean energy future for our state. Big polluters are trying to use the delayed vote on this bill to do whatever they can to sabotage it in the final days, and we can’t let that happen. Thank you for all that you do, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV Dear Peter, Some of our Priorities for a Healthy Oregon are joining forces with more than a dozen game-changing bills to form the most comprehensive climate action package in Oregon history: the new, bipartisan Climate Resilience Package (HB 3409 and HB 3630). The House is scheduled to vote on this package today and tomorrow. The Climate Resilience Package (HB 3409 and HB 3630) is a combination of almost 20 bills to reduce climate and air pollution; support healthy, affordable, resilient communities; and create family-wage jobs across Oregon. Two of our priorities , the Resilient Efficient Buildings package (SB 868-871) and the Natural Climate Solutions bill (SB 530), are part of this new package that will invest $100 million to bring home 10 times that—up to $1 billion in federal funding to Oregonians. This new package offers real hope — that’s why it already has the support of lawmakers on both sides of the aisle. We all know that the climate crisis demands bold and broad action, and we’re so grateful for everything you have done to hold strong and advance meaningful climate action so far this session. We can’t afford to miss out on this once-in-a-generation opportunity to address the climate crisis. Lawmakers must act urgently to tackle Oregon’s second largest source of climate pollution — our homes and buildings — and take advantage of historic federal funding. If they don’t, Oregon won’t just leave billions of federal dollars on the table, we will leave Oregonians — especially frontline communities — vulnerable to the worsening effect of the climate crisis. And we can’t let that happen. In partnership, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. body:
Peter, I wanted to bump Ben’s message up because it’s important. This upcoming end-of-quarter deadline is crucial to our viability as a campaign. I know we are a strong team, and we need the numbers to prove it to John James. | | | Peter,I wanted to bump Ben’s message up because it’s important. This upcoming end-of-quarter deadline is crucial to our viability as a campaign. I know we are a strong team, and we need the numbers to prove it to John James.**[Today is the last day of our $5,000 mid-month deadline. Can you chip in $15 or more now to get us to $5,000? ](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=e722d72c9e014cc38ec2707fd1a86b13&_e=pfM9ICdWjrqpmM-K_5aQoX-EHKyQzuxF0ONyP6b_B3z9RV-tC_bL3WuGYKczkVDkvusV9RsfJIAYmDV8XHpb4KdrukFIKMmXls7b0CkEG4iHOOySR9nN-zirVYiXxjF-X4E2At_MvZdEUKuWxCDcUStxNXLviya5Q8jHRdeqZtyr_yRZ68kLzYxIDOaYkyRdmrbI6EJ2bKvm1SzHJ7rBdPWVygAsZcR2-xFkqRa31Wi3ODnzSRh7-TUCDfEhoq6kFiNrLyzvgCPlGC_CmpMrptHHuHAFEBON64Yc0Qt2sJHFNUrDnHyG3-95X-fgyOWLXG4NOqCDIm9dLSn2NBtMoS6QKaXuiQax3jZpQiSCE4tVSNWoPycnTwDe3nHq4KpbzSkNyt_0wcifwr0bEqUtnrBm6rnKr2d7FxNV0Xt3tKyLH2ET759Z7qjpKcv2MMyz)**This $5,000 will give us a HUGE boost in numbers as we pull together our financial reports!Thanks a million,
Emily\------ Original Message ------ [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=e722d72c9e014cc38ec2707fd1a86b13&_e=pfM9ICdWjrqpmM-K_5aQoX-EHKyQzuxF0ONyP6b_B3z9RV-tC_bL3WuGYKczkVDkvusV9RsfJIAYmDV8XHpb4KdrukFIKMmXls7b0CkEG4iHOOySR9nN-zirVYiXxjF-X4E2At_MvZdEUKuWxCDcUStxNXLviya5Q8jHRdeqZtyr_yRZ68kLzYxIDOaYkyRdmrbI6EJ2bKvm1SzHJ7rBdPWVygAsZcR2-xFkqRa31Wi3ODnzSRh7-TUCDfEhoq6kmubugpgj3wQyYmyGG70ESHc62y_rVPp-9DRRJo1oJyYBD1nirjezDUpRdyYNvCvveBGA2rR98KVRAKHgapJ14K5cGB8Gar7NKKSKIgf2X76B7ma3qbLIn9unu2GcIeAOU5GUF9j0I8cDv_Hlwznsih3Quxp8dJ5Dip8pukNHpKU%3D) Hey Peter – I wanted to reach out and explain just why this upcoming deadline is so important. But before I get into it, I wanted to mention that we have just 15 days left of the quarter. **[Can you chip in now to give us a boost?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=e722d72c9e014cc38ec2707fd1a86b13&_e=pfM9ICdWjrqpmM-K_5aQoX-EHKyQzuxF0ONyP6b_B3z9RV-tC_bL3WuGYKczkVDkvusV9RsfJIAYmDV8XHpb4KdrukFIKMmXls7b0CkEG4iHOOySR9nN-zirVYiXxjF-X4E2At_MvZdEUKuWxCDcUStxNXLviya5Q8jHRdeqZtyr_yRZ68kLzYxIDOaYkyRdmrbI6EJ2bKvm1SzHJ7rBdPWVygAsZcR2-xFkqRa31Wi3ODnzSRh7-TUCDfEhoq6kmubugpgj3wQyYmyGG70ESH697f3cI9tSQ5uSC7Y0cz5ctk8WMjuDxFxhaW8405lj_afFGtyhpwyVuExamEKJIcW6mHcRz59lNvI5sonXVp9_mypc9TK9ibNGC5hI43NyHjO7fceRvt3IWEiJoh6ixdKENoHy2IqxgQOeesli2X4%3D)** As you may know, each quarter we have to publish everything we’ve raised so far. In the campaign world, everyone monitors these numbers: The amount of cash campaigns bring in determines just how viable it is.I know we have a strong campaign – Emily is the strongest candidate in the race and has an incredible group of supporters like you by her side. But the one thing we lack is dark money – which we would never want in the first place. We are a people-powered campaign, first and foremost.That’s why we have to work so hard to fundraise. We rely solely on people like you, not the Marjorie Taylor Greene’s of the world. **[So can you rush in a donation of any size to ensure Emily is able to end this quarter strong?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=e722d72c9e014cc38ec2707fd1a86b13&_e=pfM9ICdWjrqpmM-K_5aQoX-EHKyQzuxF0ONyP6b_B3z9RV-tC_bL3WuGYKczkVDkvusV9RsfJIAYmDV8XHpb4KdrukFIKMmXls7b0CkEG4iHOOySR9nN-zirVYiXxjF-X4E2At_MvZdEUKuWxCDcUStxNXLviya5Q8jHRdeqZtyr_yRZ68kLzYxIDOaYkyRdmrbI6EJ2bKvm1SzHJ7rBdPWVygAsZcR2-xFkqRa31Wi3ODnzSRh7-TUCDfEhoq6kmubugpgj3wQyYmyGG70ESGmg1DKJ00MgYmutLA1e7vfvkcPxKpFq6tqsMptlPRMi46iEGLLrURDLq_jkJOTHmwzuzaiqcwdnbKAhl9yQjVqnxcopO2m5RE9XXqZT83Qa3c5l5kqZ-ySf-cGa1TeEAqF_ICOGJoBrU5GrB2ZwuYI%3D)** I appreciate your support.– Ben PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS

# YOUR VOTE HAS POWER
---
| | Michigan is a state with a rich history and boundless potential, despite the economic challenges it faces. The impact of job losses and industry decline on communities cannot be denied, but **_opportunities for revitalization and growth do exist._** We can overcome these economic struggles with strong leadership and effective policies. Michigan requires leaders who are confident and ready to tackle these challenges head-on.
---
| [ ](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=c36d3c7323&e=a2af77507c "Economy")
---

It's essential that you participate in the process. Your vote has the power to shape Michigan's future. In the upcoming elections, we have the chance to elect Republican representatives who will prioritize economic growth and address the challenges we face.

Please consider donating to MIGOP, a party that shares your vision for a stronger Michigan. Together, we can rebuild and revitalize Michigan's economy.

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy

disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Yesterday was a dark day in the United States.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | **BREAKING:_TRUMP INDICTED _**
Yesterday was a dark day in the United States.

It is unconscionable for President Joe Biden to INDICT the leading candidate opposing him as he himself kept classified documents for DECADES.

I and House Republicans are standing with President Trump over the ABUSE OF POWER that the Biden DOJ has unleashed.
**Every American who believes in the rule of law should stand with President Trump against this grave injustice.**
You may be sitting at home wishing that you could do something. I understand the feeling - but I am also here to tell you that there IS something that you can do.

We need every patriot reading this message to GO ON THE RECORD to defend the ideals that make this country great. _**[Take 2 minutes to add your name to stand with House Republicans to END the witch hunts against President Trump.](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkT2P2zAMhn-NvMmQKJ9sDR4KHNwpHbrcKCgSnbC1ZEOh8_Hvi1zRduiSkS-Ilw8efhz8IdBC5fQtZBxr9vXi-epzjPJ2Diwf6y5jKDKtHhQYqazU1psmjdZBP-gGR20H67pe911zHlU6Img0KgwwzM5p0APC29zhPEfnQkPjs0dZbbXteu3aGY-DiUfTKWNDMFF0quK2HxeKoeTwY63Ej7YgN8t4Zt4uwnwRMAmYLhj3iu2NSsXUxjULmH7ilYrMMYbK54eACUqSXPe8SSqJImcsLMyEd2Iq_Dm8c91RgK3Pvkrl9C_aOfsY8hboVIR5_42unP_4Kr8foNXKKKc8a_OmOqVl74wAi3fPlF5e_7yx_mW5yprlH0cC7H0v1__ypo5pu9Gy0MX2olOnHGh5Kmj49Sf-CgAA__9VIZ0Q "Take 2 minutes to add your name to stand with House Republicans to END the witch hunts against President Trump.")**_

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Republicans are trying AGAIN to end Social Security and Medicare. Tell them to BACK OFF
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Republicans: HELL NO to Social Security and Medicare cuts! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ee457cc-69e3-4d9b-8398-b2aa8bbca5d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7fb8fc5c-5f53-4c9e-9c23-e8335a03a6b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Once again, Republicans are putting Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block. They shouted en masse, during President Biden’s state of the union, saying they wouldn’t do it, but no surprise, they were lying. House Republicans just released their 2024 budget proposal, which guts Social Security and Medicare and [raises the retirement age](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5fe3773b-d695-4246-8612-8f0b49d89c70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). This is ridiculous! These clowns have been trying for years to strip seniors of the benefits they’ve worked hard to pay into their entire lives. Even though Social Security and Medicare are wildly successful and popular, Republicans are hell-bent on destroying them. We need to turn up the pressure, and tell Republicans to BACK OFF. [Add your name to tell Republicans: HELL NO to Social Security and Medicare cuts! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d83a8b1-be3d-458e-b3a6-4b3d1863b138/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And then share this, and get our signature number as high as possible. The more supporters we get, the more pressure there will be on Republicans. So sign, share, and help make a difference. [Add your name to tell Republicans: HELL NO to Social Security and Medicare cuts! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04fafb82-9237-4385-a0a1-e5b073cc918f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: One of the best things we can do this PRIDE month:
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Pride Month is all about celebrating the LGBTQI+ community—in TX-07 and across our country.
It’s also a reminder of the importance of fighting for the dignity and rights of all people and of how much we can accomplish when we work together for what’s right. Our work together is especially important right now when our LGBTQI+ friends and neighbors are facing increased hostility and discrimination—especially at the state level.
I’m doing all I can in Congress to advance civil rights and protections for LGBTQI+ Americans. To bring about that change, there’s something else we need to do:
We need to win elections.
To win, we need friends and allies and organizations and campaigns working together in the ways they can to elect the leaders we can trust and who trust us.
That is why I am honored and proud to join the board of the Equality PAC this year. Since its founding in 2014, the Equality PAC has supported LGBTQI+ candidates and allies and raised millions of dollars to support their campaigns.
This month, I ask you to join me in supporting the Equality PAC and its work to recruit and elect LGBTQI+ candidates and allies. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230616?refcode=folf230616]
Every dollar raised goes toward supporting candidates who are committed to joining me in passing the Equality Act and ensuring full civil rights and protections for the LGBTQI+ community.
This Pride Month, I’m hoping you’ll make a contribution to the Equality PAC to support its important work. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230616?refcode=folf230616]
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie_Signoff [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230616?refcode=folf230616]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: A View from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=5e0801c0c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Throughout my campaign for Governor, I have been blessed to meet and share my vision for Indiana with Hoosiers. We are hitting the ground running with so much support across the state. This week, I am honored to share five endorsements I received...
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=5e0801c0c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"As a former State Representative, I worked closely with Suzanne Crouch for almost a decade. I have witnessed her work ethic, her depth of knowledge in all facets of government, and her sincere desire to make the lives of Hoosiers better. In her attempt to become the next Governor of the State of Indiana, I have no doubt that she will make all Hoosiers proud."
Randy Borror, Former State Representative, HD-84
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=5e0801c0c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"Suzanne is a woman with the courage, vision, and integrity to lead the Great State of Indiana. I am humbly honored with getting to know her over the past 10 plus years. Starke County appreciates her taking the time to actually visit as she does. Her support to constituent issues and the problem solving do not go unnoticed. We support Suzanne Crouch as the next Governor of Indiana."
GOP Chairman Dave Kesvormas, Starke County
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=5e0801c0c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"My pick for the next Governor of Indiana is Suzanne Crouch. Her long history of focusing on Republican values for the benefit of Hoosiers has been a major contributing factor in the continued growth of our State. Her experience has given her an extensive knowledge of the inner workings of government and industry. She is a fiscal conservative who knows how to bring the power of the State to benefit all who live here. She will be one of the best Governors Indiana has ever had. I am very pleased to endorse her for Governor."
GOP Chairman & Former Prosecutor Dan Murphy, Pulaski County
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=5e0801c0c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"Having worked with Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch during our years together in the State Legislature, I know first hand her commitment to improving the everyday lives of all Hoosiers. She understands what needs to be done to move Indiana forward and is tough enough to get the job done."
Rebecca Kubacki, Former State Representative, HD-22
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=5e0801c0c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"I support Suzanne for her strong conservative Hoosier values, which will keep Indiana moving in the right direction."
Sheriff Ron Heeg, LaPorte County

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: EXCLUSIVE: 80,000+ Grassroots Call for Don Tracy's Removal
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Illinois Republican Party (https://www
body:
In an open letter shared exclusively with Illinois Review, over 30 grassroots organizations representing 80,000+ activists call for Tracy to resign.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/0df604985b9e/exclusive-80000-grassroots-call-for-don-tracys-removal?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IR Exclusive: 30 Organizations Across Illinois Representing Over 80,000 Grassroots Activists Sign Open Letter of "No Confidence" in IL GOP Chair Don Tracy's Leadership (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/ir-exclusive-30-organizations-across-illinois-representing-over-80000-grassroots-activists-sign-an-open-letter-of-no-confidence-in-il-gop-chair-don-tracys-leadership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/ir-exclusive-30-organizations-across-illinois-representing-over-80000-grassroots-activists-sign-an-open-letter-of-no-confidence-in-il-gop-chair-don-tracys-leadership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Embattled Illinois Republican Party Chairman Don Tracy. (Source: Illinois Review)

On Thursday, 30 organizations representing over 80,000 conservative grassroots activists from across the state, signed an open letter, and shared exclusively with Illinois Review, calling on the Illinois Republican State Central Committee to remove Don Tracy as chairman of the state party in a motion of “No Confidence.”

“The state of the Illinois Republican Party is not good. Under chairman Don Tracy’s leadership, fundraising is a struggle, party infighting has made its way into the pages of the Chicago Tribune, Politico and Crain’s Chicago Business – and more importantly, the conservative grassroots base – the heart, soul and backbone of the Illinois Republican Party, feels ignored – and their volunteer efforts minimized,” the letter states.

The letter also points out the “significant gains” that Democrats have made in local, state and federal races under the embattled chairman’s tenure as leader of the Republican party.

“Under chairman Tracy’s leadership, the Democratic Party of Illinois has made significant gains. In November, Republicans lost every statewide office; Democrats increased their supermajority control in the Illinois legislature; Republicans lost 14 of 17 congressional races; and in the Illinois Supreme Court, Republicans lost winnable races giving the Democrats a 5-2 majority in the state’s highest court.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/ir-exclusive-30-organizations-across-illinois-representing-over-80000-grassroots-activists-sign-an-open-letter-of-no-confidence-in-il-gop-chair-don-tracys-leadership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A copy of the first page of an open letter to the Illinois Republican State Central Committee representing over 80,000 grassroots activists from across the state, requesting a motion of “No Confidence” and remove Don Tracy as chair of the Illinois Republican Party, shared exclusively with Illinois Review.

During the 2022 Primary, conservative grassroots candidates were viciously attacked by IL GOP-endorsed candidates in mailers paid for by the Illinois Republican Party (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-il-gop-postage-discount-on-mailer-attacking-trump-republican-candidate-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – falsely claiming that their conservative opponents were “fake” Republicans and “not one of us.”

One
mailer (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) even deceptively photoshopped a picture of a grassroots candidate posing for a photo with Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker, to purposely trick Republican primary voters into thinking that this conservative candidate was really a Democrat.

And who paid for this mailer full of lies? The Illinois Republican Party.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/ir-exclusive-30-organizations-across-illinois-representing-over-80000-grassroots-activists-sign-an-open-letter-of-no-confidence-in-il-gop-chair-don-tracys-leadership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A copy of the second page of an open letter to the Illinois Republican State Central Committee representing over 80,000 grassroots activists from across the state, requesting a motion of “No Confidence” and remove Don Tracy as chair of the Illinois Republican Party, shared exclusively with Illinois Review.

The letter also expresses frustration with the state party’s support for the anti-grassroots candidate for governor – Aurora Mayor Richard Irvin, writing,

“The gubernatorial race was another embarrassment for chairman Tracy and the state party, as nearly 100 Illinois Republican Party leaders, officials and candidates endorsed the anti-grassroots candidate Richard Irvin – a man who pulled Democratic Primary ballots in 2014, 2016 and 2020. Irvin also spent years referring to Gov. Pritzker as a ‘great friend and a great leader.’ But in the end, Irvin would lose to the grassroots candidate by a shocking 43 points – in one of the biggest election defeats of an establishment-backed Republican primary candidate in modern history.”

And during the school board races this past April,
Tracy (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-silent-abandons-republican-school-board-candidates-while-il-democratic-party-funds-school-board-races-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and the IL GOP were nowhere to be found – abandoning the grassroots base of the party while Gov. Pritzker and the Democratic Party of Illinois spent $800,000 to support their far-left school board candidates and attack their conservative opponents.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/ir-exclusive-30-organizations-across-illinois-representing-over-80000-grassroots-activists-sign-an-open-letter-of-no-confidence-in-il-gop-chair-don-tracys-leadership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A copy of the last page of an open letter to the Illinois Republican State Central Committee representing over 80,000 grassroots activists from across the state, requesting a motion of “No Confidence” and remove Don Tracy as chair of the Illinois Republican Party, shared exclusively with Illinois Review.

Last month, Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/il-gop-secretly-supported-a-slate-of-anti-grassroots-candidates-in-will-county-during-april-4th-election-and-improperly-used-mailers-to-attack-the-conservative-base-of-the-party.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) revealed that while the IL GOP remained mostly silent during the school board races – in Will County, they were secretly supporting a slate of anti-grassroots candidates – even providing that slate with the state party’s postage discount – a perk not afforded to their conservative opponents.

The open letter also expresses irritation that the Illinois Republican Party has “drifted” away from its core principles and
values (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-il-gop-leaders-endorsed-a-pro-choice-pro-same-sex-marriage-pro-transgender-candidate-who-voted-for-barack-obama-violating-gop-party-platform.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

“Under chairman Tracy’s leadership, the Illinois Republican Party has drifted further away from our guiding principles, choosing, instead to support candidates that are pro-choice, pro-gay marriage and pro-transgender rights – positions contrary to the Illinois Republican Party Platform.”

Tracy and IL GOP leaders often point out that both President Ronald Reagan and President Donald Trump used to be Democrats, however, as the letter points out,

“It is true, the late President Ronald Reagan and President Donald Trump used to be Democrats – but as Republican President’s – they were always defenders of the unborn and defenders of traditional family values – values that were uniquely Republican. As President Reagan so famously said, ‘I can’t help but notice that everybody that is for abortion has already been born.’ And there’s no doubt in anybody’s mind that the justices that President Trump appointed to the US Supreme Court were pro-life and pro-traditional families.”

The mindset within the ranks of the IL GOP is that Republicans win elections by compromising traditional Republican values and core principles – and moving more to the middle to be closer to the Democrats way of thinking. However, that logic is flawed, as the letter so pointedly states.

“Republicans don’t win elections by becoming more moderate – Republicans win elections by standing up for Republican values – strong families, limited government, respect for the life of the unborn and freedom.”

The letter states that Tracy’s “lack of understanding of our movement and the critical role that we play every election, will never be fully appreciated under his leadership.”

And while the co-chair of the IL GOP grassroots committee Larry Smith – who was appointed by Tracy and remains a staunch defender of the embattled chairman – claims that Tracy supports the grassroots movement – his words and actions tell a different story.

“Over the last several months, chairman Tracy has gone out of his way to attack and diminish the rise of the grassroots movement. Last month he created an ‘endorsement policy committee’ after going on radio to blame the top of the ticket for midterm election losses. In December, he offended the grassroots by not making us feel welcome during the state central committee meeting in Bolingbrook; and a few weeks ago, he gave a speech to a Lake County Republican group where he criticized the grassroots base of the party.”

And while many on the state central committee argue that they do not have a succession plan should Tracy be removed as chairman, the letter offers a thoughtful suggestion.

“If the state central committee cannot agree upon an immediate successor, then form a Chairman Search Committee and appoint members of the grassroots base and other constituencies from across the state to serve alongside the other committee members – and come to a decision as a team.

At the end of the day, it’s about winning without compromising our values – and we’re confident that with a new leader of the party, we’ll be united and hard to beat.”
https://youtu.be/dM20tahY-w0?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Publisher Scott Kaspar joins Peggy Hubbard live on Real Talk 93.3 FM (St. Louis) to discuss the unprecedented federal indictment against 45th President and presidential candidate Donald J. Trump and the two-tiered justice system.
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=86b2059430-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_15_08_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-86b2059430-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Team Cori
subject: RE: Wokeness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Republicans need to understand, unless you’re saying, “I'm racist, white supremacist, and I'm bigoted” -- stop talking about wokeness. | |
---
Peter, **Thank you.** Yesterday, we asked our supporters to stand up and get Cori’s back in the fight against anti-woke Republicans and the response was incredible. Make no mistake: **Republicans don’t want a strong, confident, Black woman like Cori standing up and fighting for real people, against oppression and delivering results.** And they definitely don’t want her in Congress. That’s why they’re preparing to spend hard against our re-election. They think they can pick her off in this red state. **But they’re wrong, because we have you.** We’re half-way through the month and coming up fast on the end of the quarter deadline, but we’re not yet halfway to our goal. subject: The power of a grassroots team →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Team, did you see this note from Andrea? **[Since Andrea first reached out to you on Wednesday, we’ve raised $3,820 toward our $5,000 goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64940886/411762759/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.16_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDNjNjUzZS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMWhuF4JiZM7k8PbsoIT2y00ypWUVUtGD8-U-nBPmTk=) _That’s the power of a grassroots team!_** We’re facing unprecedented challenges: Between the NRCC listing us as a top target and GOP-aligned dark money groups launching attack ads, our 2024 campaign has gotten off to a rocky start. _But now we have an opportunity to fight back._ [**We need a surge of grassroots donations to help us close the gap. Can you chip in $10 right now to help us reach our goal and ensure we’re on track to win in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64940887/411762760/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.16_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDNjNjUzZS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMWhuF4JiZM7k8PbsoIT2y00ypWUVUtGD8-U-nBPmTk=) Thank you, _Team Salinas_ On Wednesday, June 14, 2023, **Andrea Salinas** wrote: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64940888/411762761/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.16_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDNjNjUzZS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMWhuF4JiZM7k8PbsoIT2y00ypWUVUtGD8-U-nBPmTk=)
---
Folks, it’s Andrea here! 2023 is halfway over, so my team just met to discuss what we need to do in the coming months, and I want to take a moment to pull back the curtain on our campaign strategy. Already, Republicans and outside dark money groups are zeroing in on our race, _and you can bet they will do whatever they can to steal this seat._ Nonpartisan election experts are calling our race one of the most competitive in the country, **but I know that we can win if we have the grassroots support we need.** [**My team and I just set a goal to raise $5,000 in grassroots donations before Friday at midnight to ensure we head into the second half of the year in the strongest position possible. So please, can you chip $10 in right now and help us reach our goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64940889/411762762/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.16_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDNjNjUzZS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMWhuF4JiZM7k8PbsoIT2y00ypWUVUtGD8-U-nBPmTk=) | _[CHIP IN $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64940890/411762763/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.16_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDNjNjUzZS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMWhuF4JiZM7k8PbsoIT2y00ypWUVUtGD8-U-nBPmTk=)_
---
Running a campaign is expensive – we need to pay for things like TV ads, Get-Out-The-Vote efforts, mailers, and offices, just to name a few. We learned last year that the earlier we can make investments in our campaign, _the stronger our campaign infrastructure will be_ , so it’s critical that we ramp up our campaign now. **And as we planned out what the next six months of 2023 would look like, I knew we had to turn to our grassroots team for support.**
**[We won in 2022 thanks to grassroots donations, and now we need you to step up and help this campaign gain momentum for the challenges ahead. So please, can you chip in a grassroots donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64940891/411762764/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.16_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDNjNjUzZS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMWhuF4JiZM7k8PbsoIT2y00ypWUVUtGD8-U-nBPmTk=)**

clean_body: Team, did you see this note from Andrea? = That’s the power of a grassroots team! We’re facing unprecedented challenges: Between the NRCC listing us as a top target and GOP-aligned dark money groups launching attack ads, our 2024 campaign has gotten off to a rocky start. But now we have an opportunity to fight back. = Thank you, Team Salinas On Wednesday, June 14, 2023, Andrea Salinas wrote: = Folks, it’s Andrea here! 2023 is halfway over, so my team just met to discuss what we need to do in the coming months, and I want to take a moment to pull back the curtain on our campaign strategy. Already, Republicans and outside dark money groups are zeroing in on our race, and you can bet they will do whatever they can to steal this seat. Nonpartisan election experts are calling our race one of the most competitive in the country, but I know that we can win if we have the grassroots support we need. = | = Running a campaign is expensive – we need to pay for things like TV ads, Get-Out-The-Vote efforts, mailers, and offices, just to name a few. We learned last year that the earlier we can make investments in our campaign, the stronger our campaign infrastructure will be , so it’s critical that we ramp up our campaign now. And as we planned out what the next six months of 2023 would look like, I knew we had to turn to our grassroots team for support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for your help, Andrea = | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =_

name: Congresswoman Shontel Brown
subject: A crucial victory in the fight for fair elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Let’s continue the fight: Demand Congress strengthen the Voting Rights Act.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64941005/411763110/1328625984?refcode=EM_FR_230616VotingRights_VR_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGI2MjQ2OS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNZB8LAe_8WN-XCpZoCMwgwmloxG_F785NE7s6d7VQY=) Peter,

The recent Supreme Court decision in _Allen v. Milligan_ will have a profound impact on the upcoming 2024 elections.

This Supreme Court decision overturned an Alabama Republican legislative map that disenfranchised Black voters. The move upholds precedent to challenge unfair maps in other states. **Now, leading election experts are saying this could tip the scales toward Democrats and make the House a toss-up in 2024.**

This is a big victory for the integrity of our democracy and reaffirms the simple truth that **when voting rights are respected, Democratic majorities are elected.** But we can’t rest on this victory alone, Peter. Congress must pass legislation to strengthen the Voting Rights Act, ensuring every American can exercise their right to vote without discrimination.

[**_Will you sign my petition urging Congress to protect our constitutional right to vote by strengthening the Voting Rights Act? Every American deserves to have their vote matter, and your voice can contribute to ensuring that’s the case._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64941006/411763111/627500040?refcode=EM_FR_230616VotingRights_VR_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGI2MjQ2OS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNZB8LAe_8WN-XCpZoCMwgwmloxG_F785NE7s6d7VQY=&emci=f3ab04f4-570c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=48b62469-690c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64941007/411763112/627500040?refcode=EM_FR_230616VotingRights_VR_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTA_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGI2MjQ2OS02OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNZB8LAe_8WN-XCpZoCMwgwmloxG_F785NE7s6d7VQY=&emci=f3ab04f4-570c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=48b62469-690c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) You deserve to be heard,

Rep. Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I want to make something clear:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I will never stop fighting to protect Social Security.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64941530/411765113/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQzMDMwYjgtNmEwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=THbaGiSic1hICb-pv1V8ZGc-O3UpKAFgq6eOGiEMFZc=&emci=430e4066-5f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9d3030b8-6a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

As a member of Congress and a public servant, it's my job to protect the programs that are vital to the well-being of millions of Americans and countless people in Washington.

But — after the recent debt ceiling negotiations, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy openly declared the debt limit legislation was only "the first step" toward his party's broader agenda. If he has his way, our country could see cuts to Social Security, which would jeopardize the security and future of Americans who have worked tirelessly to pay into the system with the expectation of a dignified retirement. And just this week, a group of 175 House Republicans announced a plan to make significant cuts to Social Security that would affect the retirement plans of millions of Americans.

**Peter, I want to make something clear:** Social Security is more than a government program; Social Security is a promise. It's a promise from your government that if you pay your fair share, your government will have your back down the line. When you retire, when disaster strikes, or when you lose a loved one, you should get the help you've been promised — _and that you've earned._

**Will you join me in defending Social Security? Your voice matters, and your advocacy is essential in urging Congress to prioritize the needs of our citizens over political posturing.[Please take a moment to add your name to our petition to demand the preservation of Social Security for years to come →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64941533/411765116/-69203580?ms=em23_230616_ss_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230616_ss_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230616_ss_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230616_ss_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=fo+Ib4SlOxXsEuRNO2pMwafx54dvInKGSIWHVTbw5/wYqQFov/YKXgfa9Oyb0SfBnJ6MR0hI/ycQpsCIlbtNGQ0kkj+AF10mzo/2IViELa+Pl+Oxx4CWCTgdZH6IbTft/O31uDo+oL2hY742mq9D9mu4r3I5PfHvnFjfe6A+blE=&refcode2=9d3030b8-6a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQzMDMwYjgtNmEwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=THbaGiSic1hICb-pv1V8ZGc-O3UpKAFgq6eOGiEMFZc=&emci=430e4066-5f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9d3030b8-6a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64941535/411765118/-69203580?ms=em23_230616_ss_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230616_ss_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230616_ss_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230616_ss_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=fo+Ib4SlOxXsEuRNO2pMwafx54dvInKGSIWHVTbw5/wYqQFov/YKXgfa9Oyb0SfBnJ6MR0hI/ycQpsCIlbtNGQ0kkj+AF10mzo/2IViELa+Pl+Oxx4CWCTgdZH6IbTft/O31uDo+oL2hY742mq9D9mu4r3I5PfHvnFjfe6A+blE=&refcode2=9d3030b8-6a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQzMDMwYjgtNmEwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=THbaGiSic1hICb-pv1V8ZGc-O3UpKAFgq6eOGiEMFZc=&emci=430e4066-5f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9d3030b8-6a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)
---

The work to defend Social Security is personal to me. My Oma lived to be almost 109 years old, and Social Security is a huge reason why she was able to live with dignity well into her second century. I'm committed to doing everything I can to ensure Social Security continues its long and successful life.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

clean_body: I will never stop fighting to protect Social Security. Peter, As a member of Congress and a public servant, it's my job to protect the programs that are vital to the well-being of millions of Americans and countless people in Washington. But — after the recent debt ceiling negotiations, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy openly declared the debt limit legislation was only "the first step" toward his party's broader agenda. If he has his way, our country could see cuts to Social Security, which would jeopardize the security and future of Americans who have worked tirelessly to pay into the system with the expectation of a dignified retirement. And just this week, a group of 175 House Republicans announced a plan to make significant cuts to Social Security that would affect the retirement plans of millions of Americans. Peter, I want to make something clear: Social Security is more than a government program; Social Security is a promise. It's a promise from your government that if you pay your fair share, your government will have your back down the line. When you retire, when disaster strikes, or when you lose a loved one, you should get the help you've been promised — and that you've earned. Will you join me in defending Social Security? Your voice matters, and your advocacy is essential in urging Congress to prioritize the needs of our citizens over political posturing. The work to defend Social Security is personal to me. My Oma lived to be almost 109 years old, and Social Security is a huge reason why she was able to live with dignity well into her second century. I'm committed to doing everything I can to ensure Social Security continues its long and successful life. It's an honor to represent you, Derek Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

We've been having a debate at Team Barr headquarters: | _Who have you seen more of: Rep. Jack Bergman or Bigfoot?_

It sent us down a deep internet rabbit hole that we'll spare you from. But it's definitely not a great sign when googling "Bigfoot in Michigan" has better results about the latest sighting than "Jack Bergman district visit."
**Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan families deserve better than a representative who puts in less face time with us than Bigfoot.**
Callie on the other hand? You'll never wonder if she's only a myth.
You can count on Callie to show up for Northern Michigan because this place has always been her home. Her family roots go back five generations here. She was born and raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan. And when she and Matt decided to settle down after moving around as a military family, there was no question they'd move back home to Northern Michigan.
[Let's replace Rep. Bergman with someone who will actually represent Yoopers and Northern Michiganders. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: When I came out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter, can I tell you a story?

When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public
service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between
pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]Young Tammy Baldwin

Seeing others in the LGBTQ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming
out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they
love — I came to realize that I could do both. I could run for office and
be honest about who I am. And that’s exactly what I did.

When I became the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history, I
understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a
difference in people's lives. And from lowering prescription drug prices
to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, I’ve
worked hard every day since to do just that.

That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but
to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted
to make a difference, too. Now, as we celebrate together the lives of
LGBTQ folks everywhere, I'm asking you again:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]Will you help me continue to make a difference by pitching into my
reelection campaign today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-jun23.ORXv9s&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jun23.0mNvpg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-jun23.gK03B0&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-jun23.JbTJlr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-jun23.1iZx5Q&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=422%2E35263%2Esi2182 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for
equality. But Peter, we cannot mistake that progress for a
total victory.

Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass
harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and
LGBTQ youth.

It’s going to take all of us this Pride Month and every other month to
counter these right wing attacks so everyone — even a kid like me — grows
up knowing they belong, and that kindness and inclusion, not hatred and
division, are American values.
