| | Peter,

We hope to see you at the sixth annual Rock the Ride Napa Valley benefit event on Saturday, June 24!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64951025/411779348/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230616_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWE5NDYxMS03NTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DfugABrOAxUscd1M6c9ThwBmjx_TIusaqPwc4UokTC0=&emci=b0c49904-750c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b5a94611-750c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)
Rock the Ride is dedicated to raising funds for national and local nonprofit organizations that tackle the significant issue of gun violence in our country.

In the past year, we celebrated a milestone when Congress took action to pass the first federal gun reform legislation in three decades. However, we recognize that there is still much work to be done.

Mike is steadfast in his commitment to addressing the gun violence epidemic and advocating for common-sense solutions. As a lifelong hunter and gun owner, he understands the importance of responsible firearm ownership and usage. He works tirelessly to promote responsible practices and ensure the safety of our communities.

**_[Will you make your voice heard and join us for Rock the Ride on June 24? **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friends, We _all_ know Republicans have a penchant for burying the facts in their ridiculous culture wars to get a bit of media relevance. But as we get closer and closer to 2024, we’re not going to let the MAGA megaphone distract voters from the heavy lifting Democrats have done to improve the lives of working Americans. **In just two and a half years in office, President Biden has:** ✅ Created **13.1 million jobs** — that’s _six times_ the number of jobs created than the previous three Republican presidents _combined_.
✅ Secured **the lowest unemployment rate** our nation has seen in decades — and achieved a _record low_ for unemployment rates among Black Americans.
✅ Reduced annual inflation to its **lowest level** since December 2020. Meanwhile, Republicans — including presidential candidate Ron DeSantis — have followed their wins in 2020 by: ❌ **Passing extreme anti-LGBTQ+ bills** banning everything from books in schools to life-saving gender affirming care.
❌ **Enacting overreaching abortion bans** , largely without exceptions for rape or incest.
❌ **Entangling themselves in a myriad of federal investigations** , including _lying to get elected to federal office_. **Chaos or competency, friend — _that’s_ what the 2024 election will come down to.** [**If you’re sticking with the side that’s delivered consistent results for American families, please make a donation of any amount today. clean_body: We’ll stick with the side that’s been delivering consistent results for Americans. HBU? | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Friends, We all know Republicans have a penchant for burying the facts in their ridiculous culture wars to get a bit of media relevance. But as we get closer and closer to 2024, we’re not going to let the MAGA megaphone distract voters from the heavy lifting Democrats have done to improve the lives of working Americans. In just two and a half years in office, President Biden has: ✅ Created 13.1 million jobs — that’s six times the number of jobs created than the previous three Republican presidents combined. ✅ Secured the lowest unemployment rate our nation has seen in decades — and achieved a record low for unemployment rates among Black Americans. ✅ Reduced annual inflation to its lowest level since December 2020. Meanwhile, Republicans — including presidential candidate Ron DeSantis — have followed their wins in 2020 by: ❌ Passing extreme anti-LGBTQ+ bills banning everything from books in schools to life-saving gender affirming care. ❌ Enacting overreaching abortion bans , largely without exceptions for rape or incest. ❌ Entangling themselves in a myriad of federal investigations , including lying to get elected to federal office. Chaos or competency, friend — that’s what the 2024 election will come down to. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Swalwell | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! subject: Trump and DeSantis are trying to out-MAGA each other

body:
While Trump and DeSantis spend the next few months trying to out-MAGA each other, we’re going to be working day in and day out to reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris -- and we want you to join us. | | |
---
Peter, Here are the facts: The 2024 GOP front-runners are currently in a race to the bottom to see who can push the most extreme right-wing agenda. Just take a look at their thoughts on abortion:

**But that’s not all.** Both Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis have supported cuts to bedrock programs like Social Security and Medicare, key services Americans across the country rely on. Trump incited a violent insurrection on the Capitol and DeSantis has said he would consider pardons "on Day One" for January 6 insurrectionists and convicted criminals. While Trump and DeSantis spend the next few months trying to out-MAGA each other, we’re going to be working day in and day out to reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris -- and we want you to join us. Just take a look at their thoughts on abortion: But that’s not all. Both Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis have supported cuts to bedrock programs like Social Security and Medicare, key services Americans across the country rely on. Trump incited a violent insurrection on the Capitol and DeSantis has said he would consider pardons "on Day One" for January 6 insurrectionists and convicted criminals. body:

Pearson and Jones are running for their old seats, and they need our help to ensure Republicans don't stop them from rejoining the statehouse.** Not just that –

clean_body: Special elections are critical for chipping away at Republican power and flipping chambers nationwide – and you're a key part of how we win. | | | | | Here's why we're so focused on the upcoming special elections in Tennessee right now: Earlier this year, Representatives Justin Jones and Justin Pearson of the Tennessee Three stood firmly against Republican inaction in the face of gun violence in the state – and in response, Republicans expelled them from the House. Now, Reps. Pearson and Jones are running for their old seats, and they need our help to ensure Republicans don't stop them from rejoining the statehouse. Not just that – Losing these races would show Republicans they can simply expel anyone who dares to speak out against them – a dangerous precedent some Republicans are already embracing! In states like New Hampshire, we've seen how Democrats in Republican-controlled states are stopping the worst of the GOP’s agenda, like abortion bans, anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and more. We've won 18 special elections this year alone – and we can win these, too! But these victories only happened because people like you chipped in $7, $25, or more at a time.That's why it's so critical we have you on this team now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We'll only do this together – so thank you so much for all you do. name: Lateefah Simon
subject: I know this much is certain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
As a movement, we are going to fight this unjust system.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)
I am so energized by the hundreds of friends, family, and neighbors -- the backbone of Team Lateefah -- who joined us at our community kickoff event this past weekend.
**This much is certain: We're ready to fight, win, and bring this stunning community's voice to Washington D.C.**
**[If you're with us, can you make a contribution to power our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230616-1?refcode=em20230616&refcode2=44_1163_P8vrtb&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)**
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230616-1?amount=10&refcode=em20230616&refcode2=44_1163_P8vrtb&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)**
It's no secret that special interests and super PACs have an outsized influence on our political processes. That's why one of the earliest stands I took in this race was to reject corporate PAC money in favor of grassroots contributions from folks like you.
While $10 might not sound like a lot compared to the thousands of dollars that dark money groups funnel into elections like mine, grassroots contributions of $10 at a time from hundreds of supporters make a real impact.
**[If you're ready to join our small-dollar movement to help us build a powerful campaign operation, then please chip in any amount to our grassroots campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230616-1?refcode=em20230616&refcode2=44_1163_P8vrtb&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)**
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230616-1?amount=10&refcode=em20230616&refcode2=44_1163_P8vrtb&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)**
I couldn't be more grateful for each and every one of you. 🙏🏾
Onward,
Lateefah
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230616-1?refcode=em20230616&refcode2=44_1163_P8vrtb&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230616&t=2&refcode2=44_1163_P8vrtb&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=44%2E1163%2EP8vrtb)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)

name: Team AOC
subject: We have something to tell you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
$3.
It may not seem like a lot of money compared to Republican corporate mega-donors and super PACs, but **when we put all of our grassroots donations together, it amounts to a really powerful movement.** So far this year, we've received 127,812 donations of $50 or less.
That adds up to $1,676,840.10 for the fight for social, racial, and economic justice for all.
[Please, will you make a donation today to power our campaign to make Alexandria the representative for NY-14 in the next Congress? $3 goes a long way when everyone is chipping in.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230616.aytpmd&refcode=em20230616-4488-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4488%2E2526796%2E8g-zqT)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Here’s how we’re going to end child poverty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_061623_CTC_Act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_061623_CTC_Act]
Friend,
Before I was in the Senate, I was the Superintendent of Denver Public Schools. I heard from parents all the time who were working two or three jobs, and no matter what they did, they couldn't get their kids out of poverty.
I introduced the original Child Tax Credit (CTC) in 2015 to give working families the breathing room they desperately needed.
I fought for years in Congress to get it passed. In 2021, we finally got it done, along with an expansion of Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC). These policies were an undeniable success:
*
We
cut
child
poverty
in
the
United
States
nearly
in
half
*
60
million
children
benefitted
across
the
country,
including
1
million
children
in
Colorado
*
We
cut
food
insecurity
in
families
with
children
by
26
percent
Unfortunately, these policies only lasted a year, and despite my best efforts, Congress failed to renew them. But I haven’t given up on our fight.
On Wednesday, I introduced the Working Families Tax Relief Act to restore the expanded CTC and EITC.
This bill will increase the income of 40 million households and benefit 65 million children. Qualifying families can depend on monthly payments to help them keep up with the cost of living, get food on the table, and pay for child care. We’ll be putting money back in the pockets of hardworking Americans who need it most.
Every piece of grassroots support we get will make it easier to pass this bill. That’s why I have to ask: will you take a minute to become a citizen co-sponsor of the Working Families Tax Relief Act? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_061523_ctceitc]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_061523_ctceitc]
Thank you for your support,
— Michael

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: GOP power grab attacking reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
This could not be more urgent, friend: **C****orrupt GOP lawmakers in Ohio passed a bill through the state legislature that’ll make it harder for folks to have a voice in our democracy.** **I’m furious.**
This is a GOP power grab, plain and simple, designed to stop the organizers across Ohio who are fighting to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution.
We’ve seen pro-choice majorities succeed in other states when abortion access is on the ballot. Now it’s time for Ohioans to get that same chance to make their voices heard – without any new barriers in place.
**I’m working as hard as I can to fight back against this latest attack on reproductive rights, but I need to know you’re with me. Will you respond to my live poll now?**

I’m working as hard as I can to fight back against this latest attack on reproductive rights, but I need to know you’re with me. Will you respond to my live poll now? | | With gratitude, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

**Signature Gathering Update:** Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected more than half of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 880 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 132,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. **Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot** Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling.
#### “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young”
“The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: [JAMES BROOKS](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=648cb19bd4161107b09a87ba&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2Fauthor%2Fjames-brooks%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_648caaf94ade26533d93e9df&l=en-US&s=kZreEokfkFDfFolcDT5QnxTeNus%3D "Posts by James Brooks") \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon [https://alaskabeacon.com/2023/04/28/al-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says/](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=648cb19bd4161107b09a87ba&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2F2023%2F04%2F28%2Fal-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_648caaf94ade26533d93e9df&l=en-US&s=_F7rgdCtj2hboLNRigG8Of0e_Ac%3D) **Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting** We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)**Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting.**
---
**We will have more signing opportunities all year, we are hoping to have all of the petition books turned in by August 31st, the signature verification process will take time and we want to make sure to we the correct amount of signatures in every district.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=648cb19bd4161107b09a87ba&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D648caaf94ade26533d93e9df%26ss_email_id%3D648cb19bd4161107b09a87ba%26ss_campaign_name%3DRCV%2BUpdates%2Band%2BMore%2BSigning%2BEvents.%2BGet%2BInvolved%2BToday%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-06-16T19%253A10%253A39Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_648caaf94ade26533d93e9df&l=en-US&s=9F30MVKDzeO25cMwZzUZ8xM5mC0%3D)
---
#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
---
|
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=648cb19bd4161107b09a87ba&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D648caaf94ade26533d93e9df%26ss_email_id%3D648cb19bd4161107b09a87ba%26ss_campaign_name%3DRCV%2BUpdates%2Band%2BMore%2BSigning%2BEvents.%2BGet%2BInvolved%2BToday%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-06-16T19%253A10%253A39Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_648caaf94ade26533d93e9df&l=en-US&s=CPyysdGdIo6kK_1uaqVphBYoU78%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=648cb19bd4161107b09a87ba&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_648caaf94ade26533d93e9df&l=en-US&s=xwDIRZPyWoGaEgDL3gAS4wnS3VU%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Semmel?=
subject: Courageously confronting Adam Schiff
body:
It’s a direct confrontation with Adam Schiff and we’re ready for the fight. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10360327?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

Yesterday the team at the Center filed an official ethics complaint against Rep. Adam Schiff, **demanding an immediate investigation** into whether he violated federal law. It’s a direct confrontation with Adam Schiff and we’re ready for the fight.

As we fully document below, Rep. Adam Schiff has _repeatedly lied_ to the American people and _abused his position of power_ on the House Intelligence Committee to attack his political enemies. Most notably my former boss, Donald Trump.

Earlier this week, Schiff narrowly escaped a censure vote in Congress led by a group of courageous conservatives.

Trust me when I say, _this is now our best option_ in the Republican-controlled House to hold Adam Schiff accountable for his disgraceful abuse of power.

**[Help my team](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=8fb6f2217f&e=17913c7d6d) DEMAND an immediate investigation into Rep. Adam Schiff. **
---
| **Washington is paying attention to our work. **
---
|
---
| It’s no secret in Washington that “Shifty Schiff” feels emboldened by years of abusing his power to attack President Trump.

**As we clearly lay out, his disgraceful pattern of lies and abuse include** :

→ Reading into the congressional record significant portions of the salacious and unverified Steele Dossier (which was later linked to the Hillary campaign).

→ Claiming in a television interview he had seen “more than circumstantial evidence” of collusion between the Trump campaign and Russia.

→ Dismissing a Senate report concerning Hunter Biden’s business dealings as “an election year hit job.”

You can read more here. 👇👇👇
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3b300e9aec&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| **Friends,[we could really use your help on this one](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=1ae2bc2a42&e=17913c7d6d)**. It takes courage to fight when others give up.

Your [support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c9878f8eca&e=17913c7d6d) will help us ensure Schiff is held accountable.
---
| Sincerely,

Rachel Semmel
Communications Director
Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=432e315b34&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=fa3c0bebb6&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0d3e16db1e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Center for Renewing America, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=4b04d4536f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=4b04d4536f).

body:
"If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison..."

| |

---
| | | _**[Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump 's new federal indictment:](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=76af1eb7476b4fa8b0ad522040bc6d98&_e=HTBLmJZuNdds10KMKHqdgf2VOHthux18cGXPKw8Nh_zpTpGs0IBAgNysVFUgG39sKW2R-FHMnvQXz2UDNyxqaee10w6OYQlR39EF1pjQbROBgAWM1I9PdvL25m9JCTcdfgECpq7K2T9ZyqKy41BLnjCOxmULNeBcVPauQ70UI-7Kr8SykoKIljkfXGaP1F7D0oa2t6g6cKyqmC2xNMESgkKxiTU-UvoXwWdXzgIUVEMKoBhSaij38B5athS0oMLJ1DNghvYyxYAdZ3NjOVN2vwnkk46Od9JOdem6wlsrYzQiyvDS_1AWNlcMaLdslU9tx7MwQH5NaWqceC_lGhWn8_baBElHjKGhKk2F1h7bIHVgQAwmkwPhlm1ycj_vTbj8PXEyiVmDcfHii_u3dzM3BdQ_26LchIiPBpkDi_JJEOs%3D "Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump’s new federal indictment:")**_

**" President Trump is 76 years old. If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison... They don't want to just win elections, they want to take control of this country, they want one-party rule. And they have used the Department of Justice and the FBI to get what they want."**

Mark Levin is spot on.

The Deep State, Radical Democrats, and Liberal prosecutors joined forces to take down President Trump ONCE AND FOR ALL. That's why they're indicting him for:

_Not one... not two... not three... not four... not five... not six ... but SEVEN federal charges!_

They're throwing the book at President Trump to make an example out of him: this is what happens if you want to stand up to the Radical Left.

**Step One:** Put President Trump away for good. **Step Two:** Send a message to every Conservative that they could be next. **Step Three:** intimidate them into silence. **Step Four:** TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one path forward. Luckily, we have another option...

We're calling on each and every brave Conservative to join us in standing up to the Radical Left right here and right now.

_**[GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=76af1eb7476b4fa8b0ad522040bc6d98&_e=HTBLmJZuNdds10KMKHqdgf2VOHthux18cGXPKw8Nh_zpTpGs0IBAgNysVFUgG39sKW2R-FHMnvQXz2UDNyxqaee10w6OYQlR39EF1pjQbROBgAWM1I9PdvL25m9JCTcdfgECpq7K2T9ZyqKy41BLnjCOxmULNeBcVPauQ70UI-7Kr8SykoKIljkfXGaP1F7D0oa2t6g6cKyqmC2xNMESgkKxiTU-UvoXwWdXzgIUVEMKoBhSaij38B5athS0oMLJBKubCLjsbCbWPSGmLcGj5h6RzonSX82dtM8fhtxGHqTJoOBCORAM2g3eUH7ucatZpZPjqUrTe3-FYGth34J38TVoY5Z59IScl4Rj8vHEgFZ3OYlcJiw5bzUs8AeaJ2bXsBASw1q-KT4zWIZQ1BUMPo2ypL5xx2pBovuAkqGKzAI%3D "GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_

Look:

It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the Deep State and the Radical Democrats. It'll take numbers.

We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these Liberals don't represent the will of the American People.

**But it will be impossible to make the case without you. **

So if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=76af1eb7476b4fa8b0ad522040bc6d98&_e=HTBLmJZuNdds10KMKHqdgf2VOHthux18cGXPKw8Nh_zpTpGs0IBAgNysVFUgG39sKW2R-FHMnvQXz2UDNyxqaee10w6OYQlR39EF1pjQbROBgAWM1I9PdvL25m9JCTcdfgECpq7K2T9ZyqKy41BLnjCOxmULNeBcVPauQ70UI-7Kr8SykoKIljkfXGaP1F7D0oa2t6g6cKyqmC2xNMESgkKxiTU-UvoXwWdXzgIUVEMKoBhSaij38B5athS0oMLJwyJ9ZSKcI2-WEJ-5xwYSWYUj8FGnuOOe_dtsY5qHvE8tbvz4cA7i6HPfBAy_wVrCf6OUYQKbPGqpsnR3l3id079mlOEsez1skRkzb2KQxA1cZrsuiiMscbWHjAUh5j9KUrkcPpl9Vdl9N6OvhvE5TiEF7V8PrkmtVqN7YTZ5-Gk%3D "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_

We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thanks for having the courage to act in these trying times,

- House GOP

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Stand up to union busting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Workers deserve fair wages, safer working conditions, and a seat at the table. Despite record profits, companies like Amazon, Starbucks, and Trader Joe’s are busting union efforts and often violating labor laws in the process, as documented by the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB). They are threatening and firing workers who support unions, and even closing stores before workers could vote to unionize.

These are blatant attacks on workers’ right to organize. We need stronger labor laws that protect workers from corporate abuse and overreach.

Sign if you agree: Congress must take action to protect the right to unionize. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/oppose-union-busting?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fforward-blue-pro-act-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/oppose-union-busting?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fforward-blue-pro-act-petition-swap]

The Protect the Right to Organize (PRO) Act currently before Congress represents one of the largest change to U.S. labor laws since the 1940s. It would restore the right of workers to freely and fairly form a union and collectively bargain for higher wages and better benefits.

Unions are essential to an economy that works for all Americans. Sign the petition: Tell Congress to pass the PRO Act. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/oppose-union-busting?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fforward-blue-pro-act-petition-swap]

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230616-forward-blue-pro-act]

Ro for Congress

name: Replace Sinema
subject: “Blood on your hands” Democrat calls out Sinema
body:
Senator Tammy Duckworth called out Sinema for weakening airline safety | | | Peter – Yesterday, Democratic Senator Tammy Duckworth took the extraordinary step of calling out Senator Kyrsten Sinema’s dangerous proposal at the behest of the airline industry to loosen pilot training requirements. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zw6BJucWUv-lRwVwSyApnZGsaONNQMB6KeSPoBWOrFbk7vjqmtP-K5E4wr8Eqe2YBKtcSvZPba_niE6nJ-PBfY2rT_HWeieBLqc-BhmwF2I33yzGpqDc6VDz99PduG_Yfldnn-KD92EPh7arQVIUd4qD2cvPuvs765dB7EWJ6ONoHT55w9aZiqQBXNtYb0zR2MklaeE5gjwEWaagq0WlBbHtLwTdZJKoDvKbtf2-4TbkfEoTnaszL2MrtBW8oU5xwpHgUrQqZfttwCctpqLcqSePZN4jUOVcN952Gk4BPTSklVJxd7QiWUfL6PMzP2eozM6PZ4Ha0NhdtCB19yRnhtGl0s6Yi9EQ6o9FUmQty2dhfcEm19NmXkpSolBy0DZDo/3x3/D18RkAyBTbKsC8ZRBafPmQ/h0/h93h0hn7bDg61XGIzTQ1_R9_85yjYIyaD6JrJXosp-I) Notably, **Senator Duckworth, who chairs the aviation safety subcommittee, has a great deal of credibility in this area: she served as a U.S. Army helicopter pilot in Iraq before being shot down by enemy fire and losing both her legs**.
Sinema, meanwhile, chaired the subcommittee in the previous Congress and has worked to advance measures that benefit the corporate airlines instead of consumers or flight crew. Duckworth explicitly said the proposal will result in “blood on your hands,” and she elaborated: “Now is not the time to put corporate profits ahead of the lives of our constituents who may want to board a commercial flight in the future.” It’s no surprise that Sinema once again puts the interests of her corporate donors over her constituents – but it’s truly appalling she would knowingly jeopardize people’s lives to do so. clean_body: Senator Tammy Duckworth called out Sinema for weakening airline safety | | | Peter – Yesterday, Democratic Senator Tammy Duckworth took the extraordinary step of calling out Senator Kyrsten Sinema’s dangerous proposal at the behest of the airline industry to loosen pilot training requirements. Notably, Senator Duckworth, who chairs the aviation safety subcommittee, has a great deal of credibility in this area: she served as a U.S. Army helicopter pilot in Iraq before being shot down by enemy fire and losing both her legs. Sinema, meanwhile, chaired the subcommittee in the previous Congress and has worked to advance measures that benefit the corporate airlines instead of consumers or flight crew. Duckworth explicitly said the proposal will result in “blood on your hands,” and she elaborated: “Now is not the time to put corporate profits ahead of the lives of our constituents who may want to board a commercial flight in the future.” It’s no surprise that Sinema once again puts the interests of her corporate donors over her constituents – but it’s truly appalling she would knowingly jeopardize people’s lives to do so. Sinema’s greed isn’t just appalling–it’s deadly. Given Sinema’s rich history of taking corporate campaign contributions and doing corporate bidding, it comes as no surprise that Sinema has received nearly $200,000 in contributions from the airline industry, including more than $54,000 in 2022 alone. Sinema’s proposal to reduce the number of training hours for pilots is supported by commercial airlines, but opposed by the Air Line Pilots Association , which said in a letter that the measure would undermine safety. Plus, similar proposals to Sinema’s have already been rejected by the Biden administration. When it comes to choosing between shilling for corporate donors or doing the bare minimum to protect voters, Sinema has shown time and again where her priorities lie. And it’s not with hardworking, everyday Arizonans. Thanks for all your help, -Replace Sinema PAC | | Sent via . body:
Will you take one minute or less to share your thoughts on John’s legislative priorities?
#
Derek,
Team Fetterman here — THANK you for being part of this team and having John’s back. 💪💪💪
As John continues his work in the Senate, we want to hear from you.
So we want to ask: **What issues are the most important to you right now?**
**[Will you take one minute (or less) to share your thoughts on what you think John’s legislative priorities should be? Our team will review each + every response.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-20230616/?source=em20230616-1-8414&akid=8414%2E434096%2EVnE9E7)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-20230616/?source=em20230616-8414&akid=8414%2E434096%2EVnE9E7)**
John has never shied away from the toughest and most urgent issues facing our Commonwealth, and he’s in the U.S. Senate to fight for working folks + families. That's a commitment we take *super* seriously, which is why we wanted to pause for a sec to get your thoughts on what our priorities should be.
John’s work has always been about the people, so **[can you share your thoughts via our priorities survey? We really want to know what you think John’s top goals should be in the Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-20230616/?source=em20230616-1-8414&akid=8414%2E434096%2EVnE9E7)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. Your continued support means so much to our team. 🙏
—Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230616-8414-footer&t=1&refcode2=8414_434096_VnE9E7&akid=8414%2E434096%2EVnE9E7)**

I’m a plain-spoken guy; I call things how I see them.

Last week I took to camera to record a message for my followers on social media following the news that Merrick Garland is indicting President Trump. I’m including a link to the video message in this email in the event that you’re not on social media.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

* He pushed to impose $20 BILLION in new taxes on hard-working American families.

* He cast the deciding vote on the bill that authorized the hiring of 87,000 new IRS agents to harass YOUR family.

* He’s spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants (**and didn’t even bring home a doggy bag...**)

* He votes with Joe Biden almost 90% of the time and is responsible for fewer jobs, higher taxes, record inflation, and skyrocketing energy costs.

As long as he is in Washington, **Joe Manchin will continue to bite the hands that feed him here in West Virginia to appease Biden and the radical Democrats**.

Babydog Justice

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

Dear Friend,
---
Were you able to worship with us on the National Mall last fall? It was a powerful time of prayer, worship, and most importantly, REVIVAL!! There is a hunger and thirst for revival in America, and Believers from across America are coming together in unity like I've never seen!

The cameras were rolling at that very special revival in D.C. You may have seen music videos from the event or clips of some of the powerful speakers, but we are releasing the revival IN FULL. All worship, all speakers together, in one powerful film! _**Watch below and SHARE SHARE SHARE!!!**_

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I first came out in college
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Folks, can I share something with you?

When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64954638/411795154/166616108?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2705-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwOTBhMzEyLTgxMGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g4GUjSCNNkBwRzZWyd5I6l3IXcCjz6UyTOAr_s6BCpc=)
Seeing others in the LGBTQ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love – I came to realize that I could do both. **I could run for office and be honest about who I am. And that’s exactly what I did.**

When I became the first openly gay senator in our nation's history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. And from lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that.

That's why I ran for office in the first place – not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. Now, I'm asking you to keep going:
**[Will you help me continue to make a difference by splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64954640/411795155/166616108?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2705-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwOTBhMzEyLTgxMGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g4GUjSCNNkBwRzZWyd5I6l3IXcCjz6UyTOAr_s6BCpc=)****[American Bridge PAC today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64954641/411795157/166616108?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2705-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwOTBhMzEyLTgxMGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g4GUjSCNNkBwRzZWyd5I6l3IXcCjz6UyTOAr_s6BCpc=)**

Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for equality. But folks, we cannot mistake that progress for a total victory.

Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ youth.

And when the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Justice Clarence Thomas called for _Obergefell v. Hodges_ – the case that established nationwide marriage equality – to be “reconsidered.”

[**For all of the progress we have made, there is still a LOT more to be done. I’ll keep up the fight as long as I can, and I’m hoping you’ll support our important work by splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and American Bridge PAC today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64954642/411795158/166616108?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2705-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwOTBhMzEyLTgxMGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g4GUjSCNNkBwRzZWyd5I6l3IXcCjz6UyTOAr_s6BCpc=)

clean_body: | | | Folks, can I share something with you? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. = Seeing others in the LGBTQ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love – I came to realize that I could do both. I could run for office and be honest about who I am. And that’s exactly what I did. When I became the first openly gay senator in our nation's history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. And from lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. That's why I ran for office in the first place – not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. Now, I'm asking you to keep going: = Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for equality. But folks, we cannot mistake that progress for a total victory. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ youth. And when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , Justice Clarence Thomas called for Obergefell v. Hodges – the case that established nationwide marriage equality – to be “reconsidered.” = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your ongoing support. This Pride Month, let’s recommit ourselves to work towards the day when all LGBTQ Americans can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved. – Tammy | | | | | | | | | | | From taking down Trump in 2020 to expanding the Senate majority in 2022, American Bridge is working around the clock to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them by making sure Democrats around the country are elected up and down the ballot. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **__** _President Biden, Democrats’ Agenda Bringing Down Inflation, Encouraging Private Investment_ The latest Consumer Price Index report is out for May and shows continued good news on the economy. Inflation is down for the 11th-straight month, more than halving from last summer. This is bringing more breathing room to Hoosiers, with gas down $1.40 from last year. [Read INDems release.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954837/411796623/903734498?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954838/411796624/-1767582788?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Read INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954839/411796625/-1767582788?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) On top of that, generational investments achieved by the last Democratic Congress in the Inflation Reduction Act, Jobs Act, and the American Rescue Plan continue driving a manufacturing resurgence, including a new $3 billion investment creating 1,700 jobs in electric vehicle and battery production is opening in St. Joseph County. This investment wouldn’t be possible without the IRA which [requires EV assembly in North America for tax credits.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954840/411796626/276342791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) **** _Suzanne Crouch’s Stance on Freedoms Raises Concerns Among Hoosiers_ Lieutenant Governor and 2024 GOP gubernatorial candidate Suzanne Crouch [says he hears](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954841/411796627/-1032594108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Hoosiers are worried about losing freedoms. This shouldn’t surprise her - she’s part of the reason why. [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954842/411796628/468029871?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954843/411796629/468029871?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) As Lt. Gov, she presided over the State Senate which voted to take away the right to abortion, and even voted to force rape and incest victims to [require a notarized affidavit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954844/411796630/289087996?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) to seek abortion care. On workers’ rights, she [voted for ‘right-to-work](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954845/411796631/-6139173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)’ as a state representative in 2012. When it comes to women’s rights, workers’ rights and voting rights, [Hoosiers can’t trust Suzanne Crouch.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954846/411796632/-478761486?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954847/411796633/2073435235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954848/411796634/2073435235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Our bill of the week is [legislation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954849/411796635/-1994815874?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) written by Sen. Eddie Melton (Gary) to expedite economic development for the future of Gary and Lake County. His bill is the first step toward a convention center for Lake County, and a new transit station in downtown Gary. The next mayor of Gary, Sen. Melton [commented earlier on the bil](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954850/411796636/299080546?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)l, “I’m incredibly grateful for the overwhelming bipartisan support SB 434 has received to now be on its way to the governor’s desk. This moment is the culmination of two years of collective effort, collaboration and many conversations to fine-tune the language of this bill to ensure optimal benefits for Gary and Lake County.” **__**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64954851/411796637/-1828193282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2MwNjVmOC04MTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRre_OSSAQIXUl8Zy8zZdFdvNsRmxuvYp3LULImZUBM=&emci=32983046-7c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7cc065f8-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share Rep. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. President Biden, Democrats’ Agenda Bringing Down Inflation, Encouraging Private Investment The latest Consumer Price Index report is out for May and shows continued good news on the economy. Inflation is down for the 11th-straight month, more than halving from last summer. This is bringing more breathing room to Hoosiers, with gas down $1.40 from last year. On top of that, generational investments achieved by the last Democratic Congress in the Inflation Reduction Act, Jobs Act, and the American Rescue Plan continue driving a manufacturing resurgence, including a new $3 billion investment creating 1,700 jobs in electric vehicle and battery production is opening in St. Joseph County. This investment wouldn’t be possible without the IRA which ** Suzanne Crouch’s Stance on Freedoms Raises Concerns Among Hoosiers Lieutenant Governor and 2024 GOP gubernatorial candidate Suzanne Crouch Hoosiers are worried about losing freedoms. This shouldn’t surprise her - she’s part of the reason why. As Lt. Gov, she presided over the State Senate which voted to take away the right to abortion, and even voted to force rape and incest victims to to seek abortion care. On workers’ rights, she ’ as a state representative in 2012. When it comes to women’s rights, workers’ rights and voting rights, Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Our bill of the week is written by Sen. Eddie Melton (Gary) to expedite economic development for the future of Gary and Lake County. His bill is the first step toward a convention center for Lake County, and a new transit station in downtown Gary. The next mayor of Gary, Sen. Melton , “I’m incredibly grateful for the overwhelming bipartisan support SB 434 has received to now be on its way to the governor’s desk. This moment is the culmination of two years of collective effort, collaboration and many conversations to fine-tune the language of this bill to ensure optimal benefits for Gary and Lake County.” Get Involved! INDems IN the News Street Insider: WFYI: LaPorte County Life: WFYI: WIBC: Indiana Daily Student: Indiana Capital Chronicle: WISHTV: WISHTV: WVPE: Opportunities with INDems** To apply for a job with the Indiana Democratic Party, please visit or send a note to mailto:jobs@indems.org. Thank you! [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. name: Tim Burchett
subject: The Inclusivity Illusion 🌫️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3315b9b4586840379bfaad159bbd6c64&_e=KW7_3dBwWstNcwq1PL3cccjCgmEcqnqpHeHMtZBw03vNEocXH2ZthsFnIopCXNOjaHYi1h-lC5e7Kp9Wi6SG8GMwQO3zuCl0fnTVXDrlI_vyxuL7nvFp2aYf-IT_GblBzckLdA3kGmBFflv0tWz22XEw3JPwOcunoE4OwxRAfPrsrxftYnuRXVP0n5yDwbv5O6ZhP1ncNx5dJXaM8ctgL75nb6W7YiHHJuWtvEk7-6Q_1r32DmcbpeXhpZZoChOxZTTz8VNpIvRIeIiw3_rccFon4Wwb0clksy9QY_3Vl_Dxukb8IHrpDR2waBs47HQgx_YN8bljN62lS6kSXGGHfw%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **The Inclusivity Illusion 🌫️ **
---
---
| | The State Department is already an over-complicated rat’s nest—and they just keep begging for more. Gina Abercrombie-Winstanley, the chief diversity and inclusion officer, is asking for over [$75 million](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3315b9b4586840379bfaad159bbd6c64&_e=KW7_3dBwWstNcwq1PL3ccZZlhBBGpe54qT0JNB50Hh-jkG8uunGd4HhuGky7UMoq71wtdl6mYlocmsqf5Hi4_CaCMVVeki6gqb_W7jWqWAijxvqqBKjno4iKltKe19lWMfsKVGcFT2-IS_b_nZGGBg1KpuRlBQkZndoodhfUgjCqSnUP_YVCOA2LCzSBlvbiT2nJACTeqwl9ncNzAdtilHyHZSMR0GLFnNcRERK_6u7NOTZpb7FZkmEMIyQj1Syuoap_ydtvfPNPFf1tYPri-xVlamp4N0CQZ59CKTUTAzVd4tuSvGjYbTbEMT3FdavljccCtGnNj0DulDSglcTzgA%3D%3D) to fund more silly initiatives. These people want to add more staff, study race and gender demographics, track reports of discrimination, harassment, and bullying...the list goes on and on. As always, it's the same old story—lots of questions and hardly any answers. This week's hearing left us empty-handed, offering no specifics about the actual content of these programs. I asked about the $2.9 million for “unconscious bias training,” whatever that means, and didn’t get a description. Ms. Abercrombie-Winstanley couldn’t even tell me how much money the State Department is wasting on these DEI advisers. Time to cut to the chase. These programs propagate nonsense to make people feel warm and fuzzy, but the Biden administration continues to [sign executive orders](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3315b9b4586840379bfaad159bbd6c64&_e=KW7_3dBwWstNcwq1PL3ccZZlhBBGpe54qT0JNB50Hh-jkG8uunGd4HhuGky7UMoqbyp7IIlP8qnLEHu4HRxLGTE0ecGkJPwJiuuCRnrlLmLGQY6Q0q3Jiw6o3su_BIFtt48s9nmI2WXwAwl_81oUDRhjDBSRt5SETb3HJqkB05VhSWVxAigCNzhn036u-tUbeLgDMjDQvrypgGBb0Rvmx29yR4suXb96VCRrxE4KAmQV7dwo5fW0FvT1jhX2b7lXA--QY4zfrGEBSfx9K7_QLAq0pOY_YbqlR2q5T4lFZ66CTWUHfpyueam5mW9Cy3DG8Go9-SA-_CMKuhooA34YkQ%3D%3D) directing agencies to keep on pushing. We can’t dump money down the drain on this fluff. May the best man or woman, regardless of race or sexual orientation, get the jobs they’re qualified for.
---
| | |
---
| | **3 Strikes, Dems Are Out ⚾**
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3315b9b4586840379bfaad159bbd6c64&_e=KW7_3dBwWstNcwq1PL3ccTMl-5jhNjQrjMnWkrtS53aaHPfN86AwyDCuY6xLN0O1_OWx8KPAGsLSPwUB2NWYDRA0AeBQmzHmMU3QBJQwiSrrfqOY-5HO7s5OTGbJVmSSmZEbja6BvLqDyF_0sM_t8r95LqSKQeJ-WWcZAlGZtACZukG40wGuGXpRGgQRMBDVPAb_GmXKLBV7gOOvDKmymEsNANRi_0ug-ek684IHmSQMUb6hUwF_M3fLadID049beKPsyE238Ax3_jbj_2iQO8vsBvvJ1mRXC7VE5cW4cXnGVbnPQMmvFynlJxdh88dfmSu4R5GKVUETCfRa3VH13w%3D%3D)
---
# Photo Credit: Reuters

---
| | We dealt the Dems their third straight loss in the Congressional Baseball Game, and let me assure you, it felt good! Final score was 16-6, and I knocked in two runs with an RBI single to left field [when I was at-bat](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3315b9b4586840379bfaad159bbd6c64&_e=KW7_3dBwWstNcwq1PL3cceAnH_dLbS2emrhB2R-PdXGsSvzib3KqGon1FGujIgjhLecYw6whQ5oD6_-PsFUDemcV7aXLEA_3Pmre1-RjJC88fBXD3uKKG_rXBlHc33GEsa133u7-hih_LFzNv-EBGLDyw34VNDJX4gPi4cxVVimzMPucp7PqXikobPcqHJI5FpVg9aw2yxjn5qaNmxA-TDFEiRHgO01HAy1rkcXWqBmRW_pxoKhiqwePAh5ieE5W). All that practice sure paid off, and Republicans now hold an overall edge over Democrats in the series by three games. This is an event I look forward to every year, particularly because it gives us a chance to come together for a good cause. Politics is a rough business, so any chance for a show of unity is welcomed. We do this every year because it allows us to reach across the aisle, foster friendly competition, and raise money to help make Washington a better place. With 26,653 folks in attendance, we raked in about [$1.8 million for 44 charities](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3315b9b4586840379bfaad159bbd6c64&_e=KW7_3dBwWstNcwq1PL3ccTMl-5jhNjQrjMnWkrtS53aaHPfN86AwyDCuY6xLN0O1_OWx8KPAGsLSPwUB2NWYDRA0AeBQmzHmMU3QBJQwiSrrfqOY-5HO7s5OTGbJVmSSmZEbja6BvLqDyF_0sM_t8r95LqSKQeJ-WWcZAlGZtAAvf0M9rK5-HLfCLYLNsbcZUgjaur9UT37hETqTWyNiXZo0Rd39zcDcDf6ZizpthFICCoRVfa1NCy1kuXZjxcr_lHy5TYJB4xCuYxnXYm2XM8b33hnEAd3Umt_gbyM9k-KvbCJvlVhYh8-keJB1X3g8N12yDgWXPVvyEPcdHe5sxw%3D%3D) in and around the D.C. area.
---

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: NDRC HQ
subject: Our 2023 strategy is simple, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, from helping to secure the fairest congressional maps in a generation to electing dozens of Democracy Defenders all across the country, the NDRC’s fair maps movement has achieved some big victories since our founding in 2017.

**Now, as we look to the future, we’re working to:** ✅ PROTECT our fair maps victories from Republican manipulation efforts ahead of the next election.
✅ PREVENT the GOP from gerrymandering their way into unearned power in 2024.
✅ PROPEL efforts to help ensure a fair redistricting process – both now and in the future. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64954970/411796985/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230616_FR_6R_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4YTYzZDc4LTgyMGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tgBuxBtKuhDEv3m12LNIOgiSrRNn5a66sN9CZwy78TQ=)
---
**It’s a simple strategy, team – but to execute it, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you.

_The end-of-quarter deadline is approaching at the end of this month, so we’re looking for 47 donors from your area to pitch in before midnight tonight to help us stay on track to hit our goal to keep up all our work. Can we count on you?_**
**Supporter Record:**

Now, as we look to the future, we’re working to: ✅ PROTECT our fair maps victories from Republican manipulation efforts ahead of the next election. ✅ PREVENT the GOP from gerrymandering their way into unearned power in 2024. ✅ PROPEL efforts to help ensure a fair redistricting process – both now and in the future. | = It’s a simple strategy, team – but to execute it, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you. | | | There are people that say a Democrat winning in Texas is _impossible_ , but here’s the truth Peter: **2018:** Ted Cruz won by only _**TWO points**_ , the closest a Texas Democrat has come to winning statewide office in **_DECADES_**

**2020:** Joe Biden became the closest Democratic Presidential nominee to flipping Texas in over **FORTY****_(yes 40!)_ years**

**2022:** The “Red Wave” failed miserably, showing Texans are rejecting the extremist trajectory that Texas Republicans are taking And the plan for 2024? Rallying behind two of the most divisive figures: Ted Cruz and Donald Trump 🤮

**We CAN win in 2024, Peter.** Inside Elections has already labeled Texas as a “Battleground” Senate Race for 2024, and we’re going **_ALL-IN_** for Colin Allred.

[We have a CRITICAL fundraising deadline coming up and at the end of the month we have to make HUGE decisions about how we spend our money, where we mobilize, and who we turn out to vote.
