name: Darcy Draeger, Executive Director
subject: Districts for Democracy Weekly Newsletter: We Need to Talk About Sparta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Hi all,

As you know, school boards across New Jersey have seen an insurgence of far-right candidates running and winning seats over the past two years.

This week, I’d like to highlight some of the challenges going on in Sparta, in Sussex County. Yes, it’s a “red town in a red county” but what’s happening there has implications for every board of education race across our state (and nation). **A Little Background** As you know schools across America have been torn by debates over COVID restrictions, **[sex-education standards](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955320/411798021/899159028?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** , how to teach **[American history](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955321/411798022/1081397429?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** and other controversies. New Jersey is no different. In Sparta:
* In 2021, **[the alleged suspension of a beloved high school teacher](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955322/411798023/-1864104406?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** and coach and talk of banning a racially sensitive book had parents and residents accusing school board officials of censorship.

* In August 2022, **[a much-loved Sparta teacher blamed a "hostile" Board of Education for forcing him out of his job.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955323/411798024/1966217341?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** The teacher had been responsible for infusing the state’s LGBTQ, Holocaust, African American history and diversity mandates into the school curriculum and supervised two clubs, the Diversity Council and the Sparta Culture and Climate Committee (Sparta C3), at the request of a former superintendent.

* In November 2022, when 17 candidates vied for six open seats on the Sparta Board of Education, a six-member team running under a “Students First” banner won. Their platform highlighted parental choice and transparency in curriculum, along with promoting shared services to improve the value of property taxes.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955324/411798025/1427390821?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)

* In January 2023, they were sworn in. Since then, the board has debated ending public livestreams of BOE meetings, explored requiring teachers to provide parents with lesson plans, and voted to **[remove a book from the middle school library](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955325/411798026/-70445195?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** over the recommendation from teachers and the superintendent that it remain.

**What’s Happening Now?** In May, Sparta’s board of education introduced a radical proposal to rewrite policies regarding the “selection, removal, and replacement of library materials. This week, the board approved the policy for a second reading.

The following bullets provided by Amy Penwell and **[New Jersey Association of School Librarians](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955326/411798027/-1079630228?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) **NJSAL/NJLA Regional Response Team outline what’s at stake:
* The new policy would specifically target “sexualized content,” including “visual or visually implied” depictions of sex, “explicit or implied” descriptions of sex, and “implied nudity.”

* Sparta’s proposal was lifted verbatim from a policy recently instituted in the Central Bucks School District in Pennsylvania. The Central Bucks School District is currently in litigation with the Pennsylvania ACLU and under investigation by the United States Department of Education.

* This language is reminiscent of phrasing used in book banning efforts in states like Texas, Florida, and Missouri. It has yet to appear in proposals or policies in any other nearby NJ districts with similar demographics.

**Why “Sexually Explicit” Is Coded Language**
* The freedom of speech organization **[PEN America](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955327/411798028/-1698086072?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** has noted that “terminology such as ‘obscene,’ ‘pornographic,’ ‘harmful to minors, and ‘sexually explicit’ is being utilized to restrict a range of content, including books on LGBTQ+ experiences...sex education materials...and art books.”

* This framing, they indicate, “has become an increasing focus of activists and politicians to justify removing books that do not remotely fit the well-established legal and colloquial definitions of ‘pornography.’”

**Why This Matters for More Than Just Sparta**
* In 1982, the Supreme Court ruled in _Board of Education, Island Trees Union Free School District No. 26 v. Pico_ that a board of education's decision to ban certain books from its school libraries based on their content was a clear violation of the First Amendment's freedom of speech protections.

* **If Sparta’s revised policy is approved, it could create further standing for those who would seek to overturn this crucial legal precedent.**

**The Broader Book-Banning Context**
* PEN notes that the “2022–23 school year has been marked to date by an escalation of book bans and censorship in classrooms and school libraries across the United States,” and that there were more recorded “book bans during the fall 2022 semester than in each of the prior two semesters. This school year also saw the effects of new state laws that censor ideas and materials in public schools, an extension of the book banning movement initiated in 2021 by local citizens and advocacy groups... Again, and again, the movement to ban books is driven by a vocal minority demanding censorship.”

* _The Washington Post_ found that nearly 60 percent of all book challenges in this country were filed by only 11 people. Books about LGBTQ people are among the most attacked targets. “A stated wish to shield children from sexual content is the main factor animating attempts to remove LGBTQ books, _The Post_ found.”

* **The school librarians and media specialists who have devoted their lives to this work deserve greater faith in their dedication, expertise, and devotion to the students they serve.**

We’ll be watching this issue closely, and hope you will do the same. **How Can You Help?** As we stated last week: _**Boards can't do good work without good members:**_ Are there candidates who reflect your values running for school in your town? If not, can you help recruit some? Would you consider running for school board yourself? The **[New Jersey School Board Association has great candidate resources](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955328/411798029/870687251?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** you can check out to learn more about it. _**I’d like to learn more:**_ GLAAD, in partnership with **[EveryLibrary](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955329/411798030/-812710442?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** , has created **_[Book Bans: A Guide for Community Response and Action](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955330/411798031/-1113569436?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230616_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZmNjEzMS04NDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pOshTZpzDtlJRN1Q7UF_1bvhOoTUJbSp2hiqZS7LPQ=&emci=20fb3797-7d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c1ff6131-840c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)_** informs and prepares community members to organize, create authentic messages, and work with the media to ensure diverse local voices are heard by all in the community against book bans and in support of LGBTQ+ people and all people of color. We encourage you to check it out. _**I have five minutes:**_ Find and bookmark your local Board of Education website. It will list contact information for members, minutes, and the schedule of upcoming meetings. Start following what’s going on in your district, and be ready to email members and attend meetings to support non-partisan public schools! Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation. Sincerely, Darcy

We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

This school year also saw the effects of new state laws that censor ideas and materials in public schools, an extension of the book banning movement initiated in 2021 by local citizens and advocacy groups... Again, and again, the movement to ban books is driven by a vocal minority demanding censorship.” The Washington Post found that nearly 60 percent of all book challenges in this country were filed by only 11 people. Books about LGBTQ people are among the most attacked targets. “A stated wish to shield children from sexual content is the main factor animating attempts to remove LGBTQ books, The Post found.” The school librarians and media specialists who have devoted their lives to this work deserve greater faith in their dedication, expertise, and devotion to the students they serve. We’ll be watching this issue closely, and hope you will do the same. How Can You Help? As we stated last week: Boards can't do good work without good members: Are there candidates who reflect your values running for school in your town? If not, can you help recruit some? Would you consider running for school board yourself? The you can check out to learn more about it. I’d like to learn more: GLAAD, in partnership with , has created informs and prepares community members to organize, create authentic messages, and work with the media to ensure diverse local voices are heard by all in the community against book bans and in support of LGBTQ+ people and all people of color. We encourage you to check it out. I have five minutes: Find and bookmark your local Board of Education website. It will list contact information for members, minutes, and the schedule of upcoming meetings. Start following what’s going on in your district, and be ready to email members and attend meetings to support non-partisan public schools! Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation. Sincerely, Darcy Executive Director Districts for Democracy * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. Box 01 Ringoes, NJ 08851-0001 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

# News of the Week -- 6.16.23

|

**Kevin Hern led conservatives in Congress this week to introduce a comprehensive budget plan that balances in just seven years! The RSC budget plan slashes out-of-control federal spending, cuts taxes for working families, builds the border wall, protects life, saves Social Security for future generations, and more. **

_**Congressman Kevin Hern Introduces Bill to Protect U.S. Investments in Emerging Markets**_ _City Sentinel_ U.S. Representative _Kevin Hern_ , R-Oklahoma, introduced the Supply Chain Security Act to address the unintended consequences of the final _foreign tax credit _(FTC) regulations issued by the Department of the Treasury and the IRS on December 28, 2021.

[](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=a07b088115c344858215fb8d66b5f336&_e=nAmGmVegY-AoqtJG6RzKrNZlIrByKBE8REXIj2M9-jTfQgDMukGgetEVfDKC5ABAJCK4bYJak1GQRal8-ysJlaEZ4qlQc1GodEE6TthuPiRSymVIArsZTryUu8iNf7QfjUuwU0So3hXzZqeayxY_m_NmiYoyM4cj8Ur026l6BORV9W5AnkAgbvOjE_6UDkWQ8GsvYb5ADQhln8R3K8QxuwTqNCWxGLrdOeqB3FXokqdSdLNbwQgRwr7KxSVUYzo18hI8xZx9nmUdmEdzW6-VnvHWcmIYferGytjkACArDV8%3D)

Fellow American,

I’m a plain-spoken guy; I call things how I see them.

The Department of Justice under Attorney General Merrick Garland has been weaponized – FBI agents are raiding the home of a former U.S. president, lawsuits are being filed against Republican Senate candidates, and the stonewalling of Republican officials seeking information into these outrageous, politically motivated actions on the part of the DOJ has reached levels we’ve never seen before.

Last week I took to camera to record a message for my followers on social media following the news that Merrick Garland is indicting President Trump. I’m including a link to the video message in this email in the event that you’re not on social media.

Fellow American, if Biden, the DOJ and Merrick Garlands were willing to authorize a raid on Trump’s home and have him arrested, imagine what they would do to you...

clean_body: As a law enforcement official, it pains me to see government being weaponized for use against President Biden’s political opponents. | | Fellow American, I’m a plain-spoken guy; I call things how I see them. The Department of Justice under Attorney General Merrick Garland has been weaponized – FBI agents are raiding the home of a former U.S. president, lawsuits are being filed against Republican Senate candidates, and the stonewalling of Republican officials seeking information into these outrageous, politically motivated actions on the part of the DOJ has reached levels we’ve never seen before. Last week I took to camera to record a message for my followers on social media following the news that Merrick Garland is indicting President Trump. I’m including a link to the video message in this email in the event that you’re not on social media. Fellow American, if Biden, the DOJ and Merrick Garlands were willing to authorize a raid on Trump’s home and have him arrested, imagine what they would do to you... name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans took their treason further this week, trying to destroy Adam Schiff for holding an investigation into Trump. Answer them by helping Schiff keep up the fight!
body:
The tried to destroy him for doing his job
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a06293c-3f3f-4e40-9afe-6fcb2557691e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **This week, Republicans took their treason a step further--using the House to try to destroy Rep. Adam Schiff, by attempting to censure and fine him $16 million(!) for investigating Trump-Russia.[Thankfully, they failed.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6aaf66fd-524e-4148-b3b2-0b98a5762e8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41faa8a3-128f-430e-a8ac-4e71d89a8bef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The sponsor of the censure attempt may be the biggest fraud in the House outside of George Santos. Anna Paulina Luna_ , _or as she was known until she decided to run for office in South Florida, Anna Mayerhofer. _ _**Luna **(or Mayerhofer)** was caught lying about an impoverished upbringing, a Jewish heritage, being the victim of a home invasion **and at least a half dozen other things. A failed Instagram model who likes performing & lacks a conscience, she found her place in the GOP House Caucus._ _Then there's Schiff.__ Former Chair of the House Intelligence Committee,__ he regularly destroyed Republican lies,__ i.e., why MAGA targeted him._ _**A House Impeachment Manager, he gave a summation that'll be taught in classes for years, and served on the Jan 6th Panel exposing Trump's treason.**_ **_Now Schiff's running for the Senate,_** _and Republicans are scared as hell, as h_ _e'll bring the much-needed fire to the Senate. _ [**_Will you join us in sending Adam Schiff, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, so this champion of democracy, Adam Schiff, can help lead the charge in the Senate for democracy and against MAGA Republican crime and treason?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30890772-e703-4d8f-889c-18398c602cd9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for making the Senate--and our democracy--stronger! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T644e5bb8-f826-478d-b9a8-4489737dc5be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: A HUGE rally in celebration of Independence Day. | | | Friend, Our movement, much like our beautiful country, is the most resilient in history. We will not bend, we will not break, and we will NEVER SURRENDER to tyranny – even when Crooked Joe has his corrupt DOJ try to put me in jail for 400 YEARS as a completely innocent man. But what better way to display that resilience – and at what better time – than to hold our next MASSIVE rally in South Carolina right before Independence Day! And that’s not all, Friend... At this next rally, I want YOU standing right by my side. | I’ll fly you and a guest of your choice to the rally forFREE. Your hotel will be covered, you’ll get to meet yours truly, and we’ll even get to take a commemorative photo together so that you’ll ALWAYS remember this special day. | It’s hard to believe just how far our nation has fallen in only a few short years under Crooked Joe. Just think back to my 2020 State of the Union Address as your President... Our economy was booming like never before. Overseas jobs were pouring back into the country. Cost of living was affordable. We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT. Our border was SECURE. The wall was being built. Our streets were SAFE. Washington swamp creatures were finally beholden to THE PEOPLE. We were respected on the world stage. We were TOUGH on China and Russia. Your God-given freedoms were protected. Simply put, we were WINNING! But don’t you worry, Friend, all of this can be had again – and more. Very soon, because of YOUR support, I’ll be back in the White House, and our country will come ROARING back! | Thank you, | Donald J. Fellow Democrats,

It’s no secret that the early months of an off-year are slow for fundraising.

While we’re doing some of the most important work of the entire cycle now, it’s easy for people to tune out without the urgency of a near election.

We’re now halfway through June, and I’m getting a bit worried. The end of this month will mark the halfway point of the year, and folks still haven’t started thinking about 2024.

**[There’s a Presidential election and many other important elections in less than a year and a half. With all that’s on the line, we can’t afford to waste any time. Can you pitch in $10 today to help me and the IDCCA keep Illinois on track for a Blue Wave?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955893/411800067/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230616Midmonth_DK_90DO_6_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIwNmE3MmMtODcwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JpJ2R9tlxRWlZVx2lfT5kR1REBZYzv8kurQG5OlyJTY=)**

While we have sluggish fundraising numbers, the GOP has been hosting some of their biggest names at huge successful fundraisers here in Illinois. They believe that they can gain ground in our state.

**_Unfortunately for them, we’re going to prove them wrong... again. That is why I need your help now._**

Even though Democrats tend to do better in Presidential elections, we know the toughest reelection for newly elected Members of Congress is their first reelection. We’ve also seen the impact the national GOP have had on down-ballot races in previous elections. The IL GOP is banking on this.

**[As the largest IL grassroots Democratic partner, there’s a lot we can do to help fight back — but we’re going to be seriously hamstrung if fundraising doesn’t pick up this month. Will you donate $10 right now to help us shore up the Blue Wall and keep Illinois blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955895/411800069/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230616Midmonth_DK_90DO_6_NG_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIwNmE3MmMtODcwYy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JpJ2R9tlxRWlZVx2lfT5kR1REBZYzv8kurQG5OlyJTY=)**

clean_body: The IDCCA needs your help to keep up our vital work. = Fellow Democrats, It’s no secret that the early months of an off-year are slow for fundraising. While we’re doing some of the most important work of the entire cycle now, it’s easy for people to tune out without the urgency of a near election. We’re now halfway through June, and I’m getting a bit worried. The end of this month will mark the halfway point of the year, and folks still haven’t started thinking about 2024. = = While we have sluggish fundraising numbers, the GOP has been hosting some of their biggest names at huge successful fundraisers here in Illinois. They believe that they can gain ground in our state. Unfortunately for them, we’re going to prove them wrong... again. That is why I need your help now. Even though Democrats tend to do better in Presidential elections, we know the toughest reelection for newly elected Members of Congress is their first reelection. We’ve also seen the impact the national GOP have had on down-ballot races in previous elections. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Vulnerable orcas need your help, friend. 6 responses needed before midnight tonight.
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | Starvation and pollution have claimed the lives of three beloved Southern Resident orcas | |
---
| | | **Should greedy companies be allowed to push our precious orcas to EXTINCTION?**
---
[ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1828596?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | | [YES](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1828596?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| [NO](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1828596?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share with anyone else. Deadline: 11:59 p.m._
---
**Friend, this is tragic.**
**Starvation and pollution have claimed the lives of three beloved Southern Resident orcas. Cappuccino, Marina and Ripple couldn’t hold on any longer. Now, to make matters worse, their last surviving family members are wasting away from hunger, grief and constant stress. Under these conditions, we could lose this majestic and gentle species for good!**
**Big Oil and the shipping industry are largely to blame, and here’s why:** These corporations are risking the health of our orcas and oceans for profit. A massive new shipping terminal and expanded oil pipeline are in the works right now – and they could bring an ENORMOUS increase in dirty shipping traffic through orcas' fragile habitat. **The risk of deadly oil spills, high-speed collisions and worsening starvation could lead to the EXTINCTION of the LAST 73 Southern Resident orcas on Earth!**
**Plans to expand a major oil pipeline would send MILLIONS more barrels of dirty tar sands oil in tanker ships through these orcas’ delicate habitat.** That means it’s just a matter of time until the next oil spill could wipe out this endangered orca family for good.
**If that wasn’t scary enough,** the shipping terminal alone could drive away orcas’ scarce food supply, spew huge quantities of fossil fuels into our warming planet and disrupt whales’ crucial sonar signals with underwater noise pollution. That means these **weak, stressed and grieving orcas will struggle even more** to feed themselves, locate each other and avoid being driven from their home by speeding ships. **Unless we act, there will be no safe place for mother orcas to give birth!**
**We MUST raise our voices now to protect these vulnerable marine animals while we still can – and stop these industrial megaprojects from destroying our oceans and our planet. But we urgently need your help. We’re still missing 6 responses from your area, so please tell us before our 11:59 p.m. deadline:**
| | **Should greedy companies be allowed to push our precious orcas to EXTINCTION?** ** **
---
| | | [YES](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1828596?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

|

Peter,

Before we break for the weekend, I'm reaching out to respectfully ask you to make a [**$3 contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955933/411800221/1224595648?refcode=em-6.16.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTZiNTE2Yy04NzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mYzAOfnfuJsQmUwMuDnp71GjbObDO776T3cbm3XhNd4=) to my campaign to flip CA-27 from red to blue.

Here are a few reasons why:
1. In just this past week, my opponent Mike Garcia has given us plenty of reasons why unseating him is so urgent. On Wednesday, Garcia joined with MAGA Republicans and voted to censure Rep. Adam Schiff as a way to distract from Trump's indictment. A day later, Garcia approved a bill in the Appropriations Committee that would _block access_ to a safe and effective medication used in over half of U.S. abortions.

2. Elections analysts are all calling CA-27 a “toss-up” headed into 2024. Democrats need to flip five seats to retake the majority, which means winning here could determine whether or not we strip House control from Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies.

3. At the end of this month, we’ll file a fundraising report with the FEC showing how much we raised and how many individual donors have chipped in to this campaign. After our report is filed, our numbers will go _public_. It's important that we show a large number of donations to send a message about the strength behind this movement.

[**Please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford, to our campaign and put us in position to meet our quarterly fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64955934/411800222/1224595648?refcode=em-6.16.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTZiNTE2Yy04NzBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mYzAOfnfuJsQmUwMuDnp71GjbObDO776T3cbm3XhNd4=)

clean_body: | = Peter, Before we break for the weekend, I'm reaching out to respectfully ask you to make a = to my campaign to flip CA-27 from red to blue. Here are a few reasons why: 1. In just this past week, my opponent Mike Garcia has given us plenty of reasons why unseating him is so urgent. On Wednesday, Garcia joined with MAGA Republicans and voted to censure Rep. Adam Schiff as a way to distract from Trump's indictment. A day later, Garcia approved a bill in the Appropriations Committee that would block access to a safe and effective medication used in over half of U.S. abortions. 2. Elections analysts are all calling CA-27 a “toss-up” headed into 2024. Democrats need to flip five seats to retake the majority, which means winning here could determine whether or not we strip House control from Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies. 3. At the end of this month, we’ll file a fundraising report with the FEC showing how much we raised and how many individual donors have chipped in to this campaign. After our report is filed, our numbers will go public. It's important that we show a large number of donations to send a message about the strength behind this movement. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you in advance for chipping in -- I’m grateful for your support, Peter. George =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

body:
|

Peter — I wanted to make sure you saw my email from earlier this week. Throughout June, you’re going to hear a lot about the FEC deadline, and I want you to have all the information about what it means and why it’s so important.

[Can I count on you to chip in today to support our campaign ahead of the FEC deadline? Click here to give, then read my note below for all the details.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64956529/411802603/-1979257449?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230616_FR_mmfr.1.3_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjkxM2IwNi04OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZbXRIvX7_g7jgJA-zLitOLkBlvLg0b9b06Y322rmBU=)

Thanks,
Seth

* * *
_**Begin Forwarded Message:**_

Peter,

I’ll be honest, asking for contributions is probably my least favorite part of running for office — but it’s necessary to keep building up a successful campaign, especially in a district as competitive as ours.

The end of this month is our next Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly public filing deadline of the year, and I want to tell you a little bit about what that means and why it’s so important. [But first, can you donate $10 or any amount to our campaign to help us have a strong FEC report when we close the books at the end of the month? Click here to contribute.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64956532/411802606/-1979257449?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230616_FR_mmfr.1.3_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjkxM2IwNi04OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZbXRIvX7_g7jgJA-zLitOLkBlvLg0b9b06Y322rmBU=)

Here’s what you need to know: Every three months, we’re required to report all of our fundraising progress to the FEC. Once we do, our fundraising numbers become public for anyone to see. And in competitive districts like ours, we know Republicans are waiting to hunt through our report for any signs of weakness.

**If it looks like our campaign doesn’t have widespread grassroots support, Republicans and their dark money donors will immediately start pouring money into our district to try to win here in Rhode Island next year.**

That’s why it’s so important that we have a fundraising boom during the last few weeks of June. We need the support of grassroots donors like you to hit all of our fundraising benchmarks and have a strong fundraising report when our numbers go public.

[Peter, what do you say? Can I count on you to chip in to our campaign today? With the FEC deadline coming up so soon, we need you now more than ever. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64956535/411802609/-1979257449?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230616_FR_mmfr.1.3_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjkxM2IwNi04OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZbXRIvX7_g7jgJA-zLitOLkBlvLg0b9b06Y322rmBU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | [DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64956544/411802612/-1979257449?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230616_FR_mmfr.1.3_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjkxM2IwNi04OTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZbXRIvX7_g7jgJA-zLitOLkBlvLg0b9b06Y322rmBU=)

name: Peach State Update
subject: Fox News or Faux News?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
Do you stand with Joe Biden or with Fox News?

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64956730/411803490/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNiYTQyMi04YTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CCQFAiu77CqFi_CG-YhghROkeo6j9nelH0Nqnh00Cw=&emci=4b7f918c-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=933ba422-8a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | **_Fox News calls President Biden a “wannabe dictator”_** That’s right – Fox News called Joe Biden a “wannabe dictator” on their 8pm show this week.

[**_If you’re like us and you support President Biden, pitch in right now to help us keep Georgia blue for Joe._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64956731/411803491/710125701?refcode=20230615.2_GADems_6V&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNiYTQyMi04YTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CCQFAiu77CqFi_CG-YhghROkeo6j9nelH0Nqnh00Cw=)

We can’t afford to allow the REAL wannabe dictator – Donald Trump – back into the White House in 2024.

Thank you for standing with Joe and against Fox News.

– GA Dems

| It’s Jane Fonda!

I wanted to reach out before you log off for the weekend with a special endorsement announcement.

**_The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is proud to endorse the following Virginia climate champions ahead of their primary election Tuesday, June 20th:_**

Virginia is special in many ways. It’s home to a diverse agricultural economy and bustling metropolitan areas, _**and it’s one of the most important elections this cycle.**_

Elected officials, candidates, pundits, and voters across the country are paying special attention to Virginia this year, and my PAC team and I are stepping up to support candidates in the June 20 primary who are committed to combatting the climate crisis at its roots – the fossil fuel industry.

The term “climate champion” gets thrown around a lot these days, but to me and the team at my PAC, climate champion means more than paying lip service to green energy; it means being bold enough to stand up to the fossil fuel industry and their allies in office no matter what their party is.

And that’s why we’re asking you to join us in supporting these climate champions; the more resources we have, the more support we can provide to push them over the top in Tuesday’s primary, and have a strong start heading into the general election season. [_**With that in mind, will you contribute to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC ahead of Tuesday’s primary election in Virginia?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64956916/411804163/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230616-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3N2UwZTYwLThiMGMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W1OwZdbDZ5SlHMKakFiVI4-kwyzAv5_MWXkgBpIGIDk=)

| | **In case you missed it:** Brian Kemp recently announced a **six-figure campaign** to flip five vulnerable Democratic-held legislative seats and protect six Republicans in swing districts across Georgia. **If you’re wondering why he’s unleashing such a massive spending spree, it comes down to this:** Even bigger Republican majorities open the door for more anti-voter laws, more anti-abortion laws, more anti-LGBTQ+ laws, and basically, more extremism in Georgia. Kemp’s leadership committee can raise and spend unlimited funds, including during legislative sessions, to tilt the makeup of the state legislature into Republicans’ favor. This news comes as we approach another consequential election cycle in 2024 — which Kemp undoubtedly views as a critical opportunity to solidify Republican control in Georgia. Kemp hasn’t wasted any time launching his leadership committee and signing several anti-voter laws just this year that could criminalize hardworking elections officials and deny them necessary funds for our elections, create a state commission to target and remove democratically elected district attorneys, and remove lawfully appointed Black members and Democrats on county Boards of Elections. At Fair Fight, we’re meeting this moment by building a full-scale organizing effort ahead of the 2024 election. Together, we can withstand Kemp’s big bucks and anti-voter attacks. We’re more committed than ever to ensuring eligible voters can access the ballot box freely and fairly and helping to elect pro-democracy champions up and down the ballot. June 16, 2023

Friend,

It was a big win! I am talking about my latest campaign endorsement by the Tulare County Republican Party. I'm proud to have now earned the support of both the Fresno County and Tulare County Republican Party organizations.

These endorsements are critical measures of local support, and it also shows how committed local Republicans are to not only holding our Republican majority in the House but also winning this congressional seat and defeating Democrat Jim Costa.

Polling shows that the American people want MORE of the _**lower tax, border security, public safety, and anti-"woke" policies**_ that the Republican Majority House is promoting.

[So today, I can use your commitment of $5 a month to help make winning this seat a reality.](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=3e79fc7a0e&e=1722d05e10) Just $5 a month is just $90 between now and the November 2024 Election.
---
| [DONATE $5 MONTHLY](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=c6fa731745&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE $5 MONTHLY")
---
| $90 helps our campaign buy and run 1 tv ad or mail 150 voters information about my campaign. It can pay for a handful of campaign signs and hundreds of pieces of literature for my volunteers to distribute in their neighborhoods. In other words, $90 at $5 per month can do a lot and makes a BIG impact.

[Donate today](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=e87dba7775&e=1722d05e10) and help us DEFEAT Democrat Jim Costa and the "woke" Democrat agenda—help us EXPAND our Republican Majority in the House for the American People.

Thank you for your continued support!

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: It's long past time we address this problem head-on.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, there have already been more than 200 mass shootings in 2023 alone. _That's more than one shooting for every single day of the year._
America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic — and families and communities across the nation are paying the price every single day. It's heartbreaking. It's infuriating. And it's long past time we address this problem head-on.
**Today, I'm asking 5,000 people on this team to raise their voices for change by signing my petition to support an assault weapons ban. [_Please, will you mark this day by adding your name to keep these weapons of war away from schools, off our streets and out of our communities?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64957600/411806564/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4223-su-nd&refcode=jtk4223-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E2NWEwOS04ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k18_4B4ENHzDPNVSSCUa9kHdxqu-xxbs-Udocerwq2w=&emci=5398f9b9-c10b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c7a65a09-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64957601/411806565/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4223-su-nd&refcode=jtk4223-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E2NWEwOS04ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k18_4B4ENHzDPNVSSCUa9kHdxqu-xxbs-Udocerwq2w=&emci=5398f9b9-c10b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c7a65a09-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
It feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shooting — at a school, a mall, a grocery store or even a family's own backyard — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable.
But here's the thing, friend: **This cycle _isn't_ endless. The next mass killing _isn't_ inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take _right now_ to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence.** And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms.
Last year, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including my legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. You have my word that I won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me.
**[_So please, if you believe that we can win a future where communities are free from gun violence, will you add your name to support an assault weapons ban? I'm counting on your signature before midnight to know that you're on my side in this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64957602/411806566/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4223-su-nd&refcode=jtk4223-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E2NWEwOS04ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k18_4B4ENHzDPNVSSCUa9kHdxqu-xxbs-Udocerwq2w=&emci=5398f9b9-c10b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c7a65a09-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64957603/411806567/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4223-su-nd&refcode=jtk4223-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E2NWEwOS04ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k18_4B4ENHzDPNVSSCUa9kHdxqu-xxbs-Udocerwq2w=&emci=5398f9b9-c10b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c7a65a09-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
With hope for the future,

Kirsten

clean_body: | | | Friend, there have already been more than 200 mass shootings in 2023 alone. That's more than one shooting for every single day of the year. America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic — and families and communities across the nation are paying the price every single day. It's heartbreaking. It's infuriating. And it's long past time we address this problem head-on. Today, I'm asking 5,000 people on this team to raise their voices for change by signing my petition to support an assault weapons ban. | | It feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shooting — at a school, a mall, a grocery store or even a family's own backyard — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable. But here's the thing, friend: This cycle isn't endless. The next mass killing isn't inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take right now to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence. And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms. Last year, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including my legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. You have my word that I won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me. | | With hope for the future, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| Hey, I’m hoping to catch you before the weekend. Here’s what’s happening that I need your response on:

**_First:_** The new election is officially underway here in Kansas! Two Republican opponents have joined the race here in KS-03.

**_Then:_** In a great development, the Supreme Court ruled in favor of tribal sovereignty this week, protecting Native American children and their right to grow up with their relatives and cultures.

**_Now:_** We’re facing our first big FEC reporting deadline since these developments. Our FEC report is a public report that happens only once per quarter. Now that we have real opposition in our campaign, hitting our goal is even more critical.

clean_body: | Hey, I’m hoping to catch you before the weekend. Here’s what’s happening that I need your response on: First: The new election is officially underway here in Kansas! Two Republican opponents have joined the race here in KS-03. Then: In a great development, the Supreme Court ruled in favor of tribal sovereignty this week, protecting Native American children and their right to grow up with their relatives and cultures. Now: We’re facing our first big FEC reporting deadline since these developments. Our FEC report is a public report that happens only once per quarter. Now that we have real opposition in our campaign, hitting our goal is even more critical. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: Liz Walters, ODP Chair
subject: Extreme, anti-choice Republicans want to take away our voice [UPDATE]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ohio Democrats are counting on the support of this people-powered team to reach voters and fight back against dangerous attacks
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64957719/411806944/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWVlOWJiZS04ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kxy-pJ5TISvN68dPHR5p405MkjcAFFagseOkYGrawJU=) | Team,

Ohio Democrats are working tirelessly to ensure every Ohioan has the right to make their own reproductive health care decisions. But extreme Republicans are trying to silence voters and impede progress — and we need your help fighting back.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $5 or more to help us reach our $13,000 mid-month fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64957720/411806945/-1720848229?refcode=em23_230616_mm1_fndd_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230616_mm1_fndd_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0eee9bbe-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWVlOWJiZS04ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kxy-pJ5TISvN68dPHR5p405MkjcAFFagseOkYGrawJU=)** _But first, we want to explain why your support is so crucial leading up to August 8:_

This is a critical moment for Ohio Democrats, and we’re on the ground right now to protect the rights and autonomy of individuals across our state. By making a donation today, you will directly contribute to our efforts to:

1\. **Raise awareness:** We will educate Ohioans about the implications of the GOP’s proposed ballot measure that would make it nearly impossible for Ohioans to amend the state constitution — including restoring reproductive rights!

2\. **Counter misinformation:** We will combat the spread of false information and misconceptions surrounding the GOP’s sham proposal and educate our base on the importance of standing up for reproductive rights in Ohio.

3.**Mobilize voters:** We will build a strong coalition of supporters who believe in the fundamental right to make personal reproductive health care decisions. Together, we will encourage eligible voters to cast their ballots and **vote "NO"** on August 8 to stand up for reproductive freedom and save the initiative petition process!

**We have our work cut out for us, and that's why I’m personally asking you, team:[Will you chip in $5 or more today and help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal before tomorrow at midnight? Every dollar you give brings us one step closer to protecting the rights of Ohioans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64957721/411806946/-1720848229?refcode=em23_230616_mm1_fndd_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230616_mm1_fndd_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0eee9bbe-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWVlOWJiZS04ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kxy-pJ5TISvN68dPHR5p405MkjcAFFagseOkYGrawJU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $5→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64957722/411806947/-1720848229?refcode=em23_230616_mm1_fndd_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230616_mm1_fndd_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0eee9bbe-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWVlOWJiZS04ZjBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kxy-pJ5TISvN68dPHR5p405MkjcAFFagseOkYGrawJU=)

clean_body: Ohio Democrats are counting on the support of this people-powered team to reach voters and fight back against dangerous attacks = | Team, Ohio Democrats are working tirelessly to ensure every Ohioan has the right to make their own reproductive health care decisions. But extreme Republicans are trying to silence voters and impede progress — and we need your help fighting back. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = But first, we want to explain why your support is so crucial leading up to August 8: This is a critical moment for Ohio Democrats, and we’re on the ground right now to protect the rights and autonomy of individuals across our state. By making a donation today, you will directly contribute to our efforts to: 1\. Raise awareness: We will educate Ohioans about the implications of the GOP’s proposed ballot measure that would make it nearly impossible for Ohioans to amend the state constitution — including restoring reproductive rights! 2\. Counter misinformation: We will combat the spread of false information and misconceptions surrounding the GOP’s sham proposal and educate our base on the importance of standing up for reproductive rights in Ohio. 3.Mobilize voters: We will build a strong coalition of supporters who believe in the fundamental right to make personal reproductive health care decisions. Together, we will encourage eligible voters to cast their ballots and vote "NO" on August 8 to stand up for reproductive freedom and save the initiative petition process! We have our work cut out for us, and that's why I’m personally asking you, team:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks for your support, Liz Walters Chair Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: A Bunch of Squishy Republicans!
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-aoihuk-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! Yet another person has __[joined the race](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-y/) for President.**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-t/) **Squishy Republicans** **[20 Republicans voted with the Democrats](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-i/) **to stop the ethics investigation, censure and fire of Adam Schiff. _Is your representative on the list?_ **One Flag for All** A new GOP-introduced bill**[would ban the government from flying flags other than the American flag](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-d/)** after the Biden White House flew the progressive Pride banner. **CHOO CHOO!** Biden announces **[an AMBITIOUS plan to run a railroad](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-h/)** all way across the **[Pacific and Indian oceans](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-k/)**.

**What Are They Hiding?** A government watchdog group is**[filing a federal lawsuit against the FAA, arguing the agency has stonewalled records](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-u/) **detailing Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg's use of private government jets. **Not Tech Savvy** Ted Cruz says**[Congress "doesn't know what the hell it's doing"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-o/) **when it comes to regulating artificial intelligence. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aoihuk-trhiujldw-x/)!**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of these facts. | | Peter, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: If you open one email today, make it this one
body:
These state-level elections, which often come down to just a handful of votes, determine who will represent you in decisions surrounding: | | |
---
| | **One of the most critical takeaways from last year's midterms was this: State legislative elections are some of the _most_ important races in the country, yet they receive the _least_ amount of attention and funding.** These state-level elections, which often come down to _just a handful of votes_ , determine who will represent you in decisions surrounding: **→** Abortion care
**→** LGBTQ+ rights
**→** Voting access
**→** Gun safety
**→** National election integrity
**→** Economic relief
**...and so much more.** **Republican extremists have shown they’re hellbent on forcing their unpopular, right-wing agenda on our communities by winning state legislatures across the country – and it’s critical that these decisions are made by Democrats who will protect our democracy and pass policies that improve the lives of their constituents.** The DLCC is working around the clock to give Democrats the resources they need to WIN against their Republican opponents in elections across the nation, but we can’t win this battle alone. That’s why we’re counting on grassroots Democrats like you, to own a piece of this fight and invest in our work today. [Will you chip in $7 today to fuel this movement and support state Democrats as they take on Republican extremists in elections across the country? Contributing to our grassroots movement is the _best_ thing you can do today to stand up to Republican extremism in the states.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt3B-Jxc4nNvF-EVj5ZQXouU43TuyW-ZQv-di3wSQByNTNMX7DKD0zJu1He3OaMEWVJjGBnaKeJObgIcIK9X8v8qjm2WB0YbFZ2_T9Q1S4ePk0WQfFsStkeNBrNcKCnNaQbKy5p27YHG18yNidj57P84L3_8weFZf4o7RMpYTCkm03ZshV5bgMZ1PZqxvd__5caanBdKdSB7Sy3X72RiUK1kkrObr6v5QT-adKpj_CKe7KNCGbTWT3uzpHWjCrgfEYsIPbjM6iaDxIJml7A4afcgqGTGvrIssszVtXr5MvAWGnUztam_83LYbocI79BS7o3mcVqy-dxHEhhr9npUUAVZphxzKqBO09yyY87gpMx2MPuu95JX8Jx2vM3ywqQNuJxNSYggoQNPtWjiBl6LKMww/3x3/VO_s3L6GStCGrzr5IbC5OA/h0/NYcSYx7r0OVdY_xZp8gKJl0HXoQ4GHKb0Z63OXVVWAU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

To continue building our pro-democracy power in the states, we’ll need to work harder than ever before to compete against Republicans’ outsized spending. **And we’re already at risk of falling behind – last year, Republicans outraised the DLCC by _$30 million._**
Electing Democrats to our statehouses is the _key_ to protecting our democracy, our rights, and our elections from Republicans’ ruthless attacks. But we need to be more equipped to meet this moment – and that starts with investing in the infrastructure state Democrats need to build power in 2023, 2024, and beyond.
That’s where you and the DLCC come in. Our mission is to give Democrats the resources they need to win against their well-funded Republican opponents in local state elections across the nation, but we can’t win this battle unless more Democrats start paying more attention to these critical races.

clean_body: These state-level elections, which often come down to just a handful of votes, determine who will represent you in decisions surrounding: | | | | | One of the most critical takeaways from last year's midterms was this: State legislative elections are some of the most important races in the country, yet they receive the least amount of attention and funding. These state-level elections, which often come down to just a handful of votes , determine who will represent you in decisions surrounding: → Abortion care → LGBTQ+ rights → Voting access → Gun safety → National election integrity → Economic relief ...and so much more. Republican extremists have shown they’re hellbent on forcing their unpopular, right-wing agenda on our communities by winning state legislatures across the country – and it’s critical that these decisions are made by Democrats who will protect our democracy and pass policies that improve the lives of their constituents. The DLCC is working around the clock to give Democrats the resources they need to WIN against their Republican opponents in elections across the nation, but we can’t win this battle alone. That’s why we’re counting on grassroots Democrats like you, to own a piece of this fight and invest in our work today. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | To continue building our pro-democracy power in the states, we’ll need to work harder than ever before to compete against Republicans’ outsized spending. And we’re already at risk of falling behind – last year, Republicans outraised the DLCC by $30 million. Electing Democrats to our statehouses is the key to protecting our democracy, our rights, and our elections from Republicans’ ruthless attacks. But we need to be more equipped to meet this moment – and that starts with investing in the infrastructure state Democrats need to build power in 2023, 2024, and beyond. That’s where you and the DLCC come in. Our mission is to give Democrats the resources they need to win against their well-funded Republican opponents in local state elections across the nation, but we can’t win this battle unless more Democrats start paying more attention to these critical races. We need you in this fight. Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . Hi friend,
FIRST: We launched our campaign to elect Arizona’s first Latina congresswoman!
THEN: We received endorsements from folks like Sen. Mark Kelly, Congresswoman Ann Kirkpatrick, community organizations like LUCHA and Moms Fed Up, and thousands of community members just like you!
NOW: We’re only two weeks away from our first FEC deadline!
In just a few weeks, all eyes will be on our campaign when the Federal Election Commission publicly discloses our fundraising numbers for our first quarter.
There is no more important deadline than our first-quarter goal. This is the quarter that sets the tone, and everyone will be watching . It’s vital that when we release our numbers, we can prove to our allies, opponents, and the community that we have the supporters and the resources to make it across the finish line. So please, if you’re able, can you rush in a donation of $10 right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_061623_stateofourrace&amount=10]

Team Terán

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We need just 8% of folks who open this email to make a donation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this isn’t
the email we had hoped to send you today.

We just barely missed our mid-month fundraising goal. But, the good news
is that if 8% of folks who open this email today each chip in
$3 then we can make up for this shortfall.

Look, we don’t have tens of millions of dollars in the bank like the
Democratic establishment. The DCCC raised $37 million in the first quarter
of the year — that is a whole lotta money to protect entrenched incumbents
from progressive primary challengers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135002?refcode=em20230616-29462&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29462%2E1203867%2EH7uwtT ]Will you be one of the folks who we need to make a contribution before
midnight to catch up on our fundraising?

Even if we miss a fundraising goal we’ll never try to scare you into
donating. We’re not going to send you any terrifying, DCCC-style “the sky
is falling” emails. There is no reason to kiss all hope goodbye. And we
don’t have any generous donors to QUADRUPLE MATCH your donation.

But, we will politely ask you to contribute if you can afford it, so we
can keep our work going and keep providing critical organizing help and
other campaign services to our Justice Democrats running for office.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135002?refcode=em20230616-29462&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=29462%2E1203867%2EH7uwtT ]Please contribute today. Every single contribution will make a
difference in helping us reach our fundraising goal before the end of the

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, this isn’t the email we had hoped to send you today. We just barely missed our mid-month fundraising goal. But, the good news is that if 8% of folks who open this email today each chip in $3 then we can make up for this shortfall. Look, we don’t have tens of millions of dollars in the bank like the Democratic establishment. The DCCC raised $37 million in the first quarter of the year — that is a whole lotta money to protect entrenched incumbents from progressive primary challengers. [ ]Will you be one of the folks who we need to make a contribution before midnight to catch up on our fundraising? Even if we miss a fundraising goal we’ll never try to scare you into donating. We’re not going to send you any terrifying, DCCC-style “the sky is falling” emails. There is no reason to kiss all hope goodbye. And we don’t have any generous donors to QUADRUPLE MATCH your donation. But, we will politely ask you to contribute if you can afford it, so we can keep our work going and keep providing critical organizing help and other campaign services to our Justice Democrats running for office. [ ]Please contribute today. Every single contribution will make a difference in helping us reach our fundraising goal before the end of the quarter. Thank you for your solidarity, Team JD Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you're struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.
