Hi Peter — a lot has been going on with our race, **so we wanted to update you on where things stand:**

_**First:**_ A dark money group tied to Republican House Speaker Kevin McCarthy **spent six figures targeting Yadira**.

_**Then:**_ Yadira was added to the **DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

_**Now:**_ We have an **important quarterly fundraising deadline approaching** , and we can’t afford to fall short with Republicans watching.

**[Folks like you are powering this grassroots movement with a few dollars here and there. So please, Peter, will you donate any amount today? No amount is too small, and Yadira appreciates every effort from this incredible team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64960295/411815442/533250332?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.06.16_b1_tc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmZmODI0NS05ZTBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPCqHV6EYRtsIwnth2hGmJJ5J26_C14eRNetvEWPoNM=)**

While I am working hard in Congress to protect our values, I'm also determined to do what I can in our Commonwealth to ensure that we hold the State Senate — where Democrats have only a 2-seat majority — so we can block MAGA Republican bills from reaching Glenn Youngkin's desk.

That's why I'm reaching out today about my friend, Delegate Suhas Subramanyam, who has a primary coming up on June 20th — for the State Senate seat I used to represent!

**I am proud to endorse Del. Subramanyam for State Senate District 32. I trust him to continue protecting our values in the Virginia General Assembly, and run a strong race to keep the State Senate blue.[ To make sure that happens, can you rush a split contribution of $10 now to our campaigns? He’s also been a tireless champion for funding our public schools, recruiting and retaining great teachers, and prioritizing academics over culture wars.

**Suhas will never compromise on our shared values and has always fought back attacks on our rights and democracy from extremists.**

There is much to do when it comes to the issues that are keeping us all up at night, and there is no candidate that I trust more to deliver on these issues than Suhas. name: Tina Smith
subject: Louis DeJoy. Why is he still the Postmaster General?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Do you remember Louis DeJoy, folks? Donald Trump hand-picked him for Postmaster General after being one of his wealthiest campaign donors. That’s right. He’s the guy who slowed down mail delivery, cut pay for thousands of postal workers, canceled employee overtime, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, removed drop boxes, and more. Yikes. Here’s the real kicker: President Biden can’t directly remove him from the United States Postal Service. But he did appoint a new Board of Governors who have the power to remove him. Except so far, DeJoy hasn’t budged. It’s on us to turn up the heat and public pressure before the postal service is reduced to rubble. **Just this week, postal workers made their voices heard at protests calling for his removal. Now, it’s your turn to join the call:** [**Will you sign my petition to demand DeJoy’s resignation from the postal service? We need a new Postmaster General to save the USPS from further sabotage and reverse the damage done to this critical lifeline millions of Americans depend on.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64960544/411816119/-1457886626?contactdata=7OSnGMn0UitRK7IQpAESjiAl3K/bkYlwbvjdMof09B9SrmhHBx+w9UJbIsgPv/2J7DGvhzC7GN6NK49K1tnzR3/h4Z3o6IGZ/tD1RAwG6Mw4paOeC5KkNec9XRM9X7VTtSsm3jkAPnlyIWaSm3pngQ==&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDZiYWMwMy1hMDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRZ3s3sKjQUWy4g6pgncnOSOgTDmM9CmYqGSQIO26bM=&emci=0bff45f9-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a46bac03-a00c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64960545/411816120/-1457886626?contactdata=7OSnGMn0UitRK7IQpAESjiAl3K/bkYlwbvjdMof09B9SrmhHBx+w9UJbIsgPv/2J7DGvhzC7GN6NK49K1tnzR3/h4Z3o6IGZ/tD1RAwG6Mw4paOeC5KkNec9XRM9X7VTtSsm3jkAPnlyIWaSm3pngQ==&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDZiYWMwMy1hMDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRZ3s3sKjQUWy4g6pgncnOSOgTDmM9CmYqGSQIO26bM=&emci=0bff45f9-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a46bac03-a00c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)

You can do your part by [**signing your name today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64960546/411816121/-1457886626?contactdata=7OSnGMn0UitRK7IQpAESjiAl3K/bkYlwbvjdMof09B9SrmhHBx+w9UJbIsgPv/2J7DGvhzC7GN6NK49K1tnzR3/h4Z3o6IGZ/tD1RAwG6Mw4paOeC5KkNec9XRM9X7VTtSsm3jkAPnlyIWaSm3pngQ==&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDZiYWMwMy1hMDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRZ3s3sKjQUWy4g6pgncnOSOgTDmM9CmYqGSQIO26bM=&emci=0bff45f9-8f0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a46bac03-a00c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)

clean_body: | Do you remember Louis DeJoy, folks? Donald Trump hand-picked him for Postmaster General after being one of his wealthiest campaign donors. That’s right. He’s the guy who slowed down mail delivery, cut pay for thousands of postal workers, canceled employee overtime, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, removed drop boxes, and more. Yikes. Here’s the real kicker: President Biden can’t directly remove him from the United States Postal Service. But he did appoint a new Board of Governors who have the power to remove him. Except so far, DeJoy hasn’t budged. It’s on us to turn up the heat and public pressure before the postal service is reduced to rubble. Just this week, postal workers made their voices heard at protests calling for his removal. Now, it’s your turn to join the call: | DeJoy has degraded the trust of millions of Americans and dismantled a crucial public service. It’s time we remove him before he can do any further damage. You can do your part by — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert last year, we were the underdogs until the very end. Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.

Hello,
When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert last year, we were the underdogs until the very end.
Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies.
Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.
The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money.
In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we _knew_ we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions.
Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book.
It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he’s running again against Lauren Boebert. We need to make sure that we have the time and the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024.
Adam can win. But Boebert’s allies are already attacking him, and Adam’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to defeat Lauren Boebert, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now:
[**This was the closest race in the country in 2022. It could be even closer in 2024. Please, will you give $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign – any amount you can afford will go a long way – and make sure we have the resources to finally defeat Lauren Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64960559/411816194/1610638071?refcode=em20230616pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=3339380d-a00c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MzgwZC1hMDBjLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B-fDEzkqiPRtwMKsPLDDMg_M2qwfovy6l7_Fq___u3I=)
